name: Don Jr.
subject: I’m coming to ask for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Could you complete this crucial survey for me?| | | Peter, Don Jr. here.
As a loyal supporter of my father, I’m reaching out on behalf of Senate Republicans
_**[because they desperately need your help.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b871be96d5eb4dc7b09be93fe0b951f0&_e=uJlYxTOII3O1Lfz3xd5zJN-QyXAtYLG565hrJhzLlGSF0BTdnhvhhV-42Piy-JBNIQxS2XoO3VgFfdQWw9qRO1AXeTJ-Jx3FE2pA-4Y4AalB-TO0Fl7mNMYEZlfWfNINfY4SMUjcmf7F_58NKUnbbR7SSVzMkUoRNag3Xu0S7FncOnDoG40Ua8NnDjEsLGKOMBMUlW1NrI3B_-WWOj4N5xwqesXaOBGFHHe6yZsaXqaCrAvEV9jW8PtQ0zo5pfvOldgTMD6DKGT_4a5XSMImTNEJSbM2TPLZJLZvXb_WX-SPX95CJoa7I0nv3atUyKSbSpdmkk7xyhe-1Ulk50fLGZyLIGKvenm2SFKmiMnWcOG3SLYFsa3SzeMyjCHt80K4nf5rCu_TaTWPTZ1HrFam61_ZWzWGi6UidmJFTMTnenN2Vqs6s1Vkyp2RpAmnnNIUV-1Sxvb15UrD4lCCk8N-DfJGVfeVUSmzXvh5qKpH1xc%3D)**_
After reviewing your donor profile, I believe you are the right person for this job.
In Quarter 2, Democrats have raised an astronomical amount of money and it appears we are falling behind.
**However, I’m not asking for money to help out Senate Republicans.[I’m asking for input.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b871be96d5eb4dc7b09be93fe0b951f0&_e=uJlYxTOII3O1Lfz3xd5zJN-QyXAtYLG565hrJhzLlGSF0BTdnhvhhV-42Piy-JBNIQxS2XoO3VgFfdQWw9qRO1AXeTJ-Jx3FE2pA-4Y4AalB-TO0Fl7mNMYEZlfWfNINfY4SMUjcmf7F_58NKUnbbR7SSVzMkUoRNag3Xu0S7FncOnDoG40Ua8NnDjEsLGKOMBMUlW1NrI3B_-WWOj4N5xwqesXaOBGFHHe6yZsaXqaCrAvEV9jW8PtQ0zo5pfvOldgTMD6DKGT_4a5XSMImTNEJSbM2TPLZJLZvXb_WX-SPX95CJoa7I0nv3atUyKSbGv3qYQjFvHwK3OXgYaCoZLuxUQaY7MqNjG_0zwM36M2Xq4K9fY0is_DOf2Mku5lqs-d93LtOb6rUh_-2eZvwWDvm25tui15oE-E2lDiwOsLI52PXoMcDUSbrKmQjtOHKC0vmZWs1y-WmyXA3hepkfkCwJBoN7Oeh-8J_WizGYR4%3D)**
---
Senate Republicans need your help strategizing their next steps. If we strategize
correctly, then money won’t matter.
I’ve put together a strategy survey that I need you to complete.
Once you’re done, I’ll send it over to Senate Republicans.
---
**[Please don’t let me down and complete it RIGHT NOW.>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b871be96d5eb4dc7b09be93fe0b951f0&_e=uJlYxTOII3O1Lfz3xd5zJN-QyXAtYLG565hrJhzLlGSF0BTdnhvhhV-42Piy-JBNIQxS2XoO3VgFfdQWw9qRO1AXeTJ-Jx3FE2pA-4Y4AalB-TO0Fl7mNMYEZlfWfNINfY4SMUjcmf7F_58NKUnbbR7SSVzMkUoRNag3Xu0S7FncOnDoG40Ua8NnDjEsLGKOMBMUlW1NrI3B_-WWOj4N5xwqesXaOBGFHHe6yZsaXqaCrAvEV9jW8PtQ0zo5pfvOldgTMD6DKGT_4a5XSMImTNEJSbM2TPLZJLZvXb_WX-SPX95CJoa7I0nv3atUyKSbbQ-5jzvDWoZlGADywD4BqWm7O-5AHysqIBcTz7wGTvLp083RnMraYqy28lK8DOGSrz1FoawnFgmv6_M3zuy4gC18sNN0R-GkrMOoeMYc4l6DAcXg8z1h00F8A2-N15kpYcUB6y4W1m4WvrNOQ-zl4n1YfTcwfyrWgdoXQVIFAxo%3D)**

[**TAKE THE SURVEY NOW** **> >**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b871be96d5eb4dc7b09be93fe0b951f0&_e=uJlYxTOII3O1Lfz3xd5zJN-QyXAtYLG565hrJhzLlGSF0BTdnhvhhV-42Piy-JBNIQxS2XoO3VgFfdQWw9qRO1AXeTJ-Jx3FE2pA-4Y4AalB-TO0Fl7mNMYEZlfWfNINfY4SMUjcmf7F_58NKUnbbR7SSVzMkUoRNag3Xu0S7FncOnDoG40Ua8NnDjEsLGKOMBMUlW1NrI3B_-WWOj4N5xwqesXaOBGFHHe6yZsaXqaCrAvEV9jW8PtQ0zo5pfvOldgTMD6DKGT_4a5XSMImTNEJSbM2TPLZJLZvXb_WX-SPX95CJoa7I0nv3atUyKSbPkyLTWAIz7uJbv1MlnmKkJMOLfc8q5-SxmYr-YNFiR_jAiIgkrSHN6E6hgHQQbUVt220yXIVBaJ53Pc4nbvOyuIPyk9ETHF6cOT8fE4doS-vXnNr-WFo3tgl1t6lTy8TRmNwr0-RTOO6K5Mv_FdRqKjyl2ABigo-_-xMKRUJLrg%3D)

Signing up for our emails is the best way to receive the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

Thank you for joining the Team. It’s because of patriotic supporters from all across the nation that we’ve been able to FIGHT BACK against the Left, we need YOUR help.

**TEXT WIN to 55404** to start receiving text messages from the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5a84f2bd46b149a0b5383844f0a654f6&_e=5rse0592LxzgihYMbwA5eFUoc0fHzzBfSQeTp1tdhb4dk_0EpTefOpUnLDAR6eqHK1dZPU6WXyRkacr0aeb036BHW0bTS9MOYT-1CsbefrsRhlBL4t1g8vfye4Z6UVrPCNhoFcGL9ING5VdTibFEPdx4RE63QaeRYW4qmIs63N_16U709Z088ooKtxq8GH9HUswmFByiv7hcyQXWx_1PJeBrLcMGYP0V1E0ZFzvbf-PN8uDNHckCwwl578gYt1jOuM8F1CA21ZKOztigVuKqgauc0nf9coAAOWpobbgEPdyCnDOeG3nz81CFSfKjrKhtCTc8mJ61ZkAzHboFnKD81NFFDU2ITfo46QjeLMPdHJX63mifzYixrHVmf9EpVYxcokxmnompEfccUsKKE-hVw4SPdIEr33lbPCzz-pcGje8%3D "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---

name: PANICKED (via UNITEDemocrats)
subject: you need to hear this, Peter:

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We know that with your help, we’ll get back on track in no time. |
#
Team — We’ll keep this as brief as possible. We’re just a few hours out from our mid-quarter deadline, and right now we’re behind pace on our fundraising goal. **At this rate, it won’t be easy to catch up on our quarterly goals.** Tina’s been working hard to build the resources to fight back against Republican attacks on vulnerable Democrats in states like Montana, Ohio, and Nevada — and we’ll need to do even more to stay ahead of them as election season really starts to ramp up. But we know that with your help, we’ll get back on track in no time. **We’re reaching out to directly ask for your contribution to support our efforts. Your donation ahead of our deadline, no matter the size, gets us closer to hitting our goals and fuels the movement to protect the Senate majority.** Right now, we’re $2,398 short of where we need to be by midnight tonight. Can you chip in with a donation of $10 to help us make up the difference? | | **Peter, 2023 is speeding by... we’re already halfway through August.**

We’re getting closer and closer to 2024, and it’s clearer than _ever_ just how high the stakes are. **Gun safety, healthcare access, reproductive freedom, voting rights – it’s all on the ballot.**

[We’re quickly approaching the halfway point of the month, and Peter, with the stakes this high, we can’t afford to fall short. It’s vital we elect Dr. Williams as the next representative from TX-32 because we need a voice at the table in Washington with frontline experience dealing with the realities of gun violence to stand up for policy change. Dr. Williams will be the first Black doctor and first trauma surgeon voting in Congress, and he’s running because he wants to put trauma surgeons like himself out of a job. His years of frontline experience and leadership make him the person we need in Washington.

[Our momentum is strong, Peter, but we have to keep it going. name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: we scare the shit out of Republicans.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of.

| Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

[_**We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Stop Gun Violence PAC today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68154702/422114806/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230815-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM2MWJlMzYtY2MzYi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SiHh4vRCqpv3I7XlNjIy9zpc-qYo-w0Gj4QfNNc4taA=)

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.**

[_**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Stop Gun Violence PAC today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68154704/422114808/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230815-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM2MWJlMzYtY2MzYi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SiHh4vRCqpv3I7XlNjIy9zpc-qYo-w0Gj4QfNNc4taA=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The amount doesn’t matter as much as the contribution itself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m eager to keep moving forward, share my positive vision for California and the country, and set out the actions we can take in the U.S. Senate to make real progress.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3412%2E5257348%2EAzNnsD)
Derek, tonight at midnight our campaign will reach the mid-quarter fundraising deadline for this FEC reporting period.
I’m eager to keep moving forward, share my positive vision for California and the country, and set out the actions we can take in the U.S. Senate to make real progress.
But we will also need the resources to continue responding to GOP attacks — especially those from Donald Trump and GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy.
Doing both — reaching voters _and_ responding to the deluge of negative attacks — will require everyone getting involved.
**Yes, even you, Derek.**
Because of the way that we are running this campaign — and the fact we are not accepting corporate PAC contributions — it’s not the size of the contribution that matters, it’s the number of contributions we receive — $3, $10, or $25 at a time.
And with our fundraising deadline at midnight, a contribution of any size makes a big difference. So I’m asking:
**[Will you contribute $3, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign right now to help hit our midnight fundraising goal and file the strongest possible report with the Federal Election Commission?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20230815_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3412%2E5257348%2EAzNnsD)**

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift
body:
In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=63ba266e594c46919d8ae9b8328aafe3&_e=D756qVk0w1v1yJHSKnw5BwGB-DiMYbgeXfXsaw-FUmA9Sqq09OG1v_XuOw7kEPAIgkItQW82UfNAsSbdTm-zDeRkAPvSrxMxG1jfnaeHYcLIn93QtcJx2KaFmB_3EscuZ1NlofP2sElzLs1w2Za-M0IiNmEXmBH8IOxlsYUiZ5wc5-JxGigqm4b4TrsYa9-gf5yxC3HaCmSTl0G8oclONXxAgffiq_dLXa8ybi2SocqXBFQUf7Q0GJwiNIYsddUOcNlHh8NONrNz67gkRf5RYJXamVJsWLNdZnAyasTyfWesIrVwf1UAe2RnLDpGEduM)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

Fellow Conservative,

Our country is at a tipping point.

The United States of America as we know it is on the verge of complete and total destruction if we lose in 2024. We can’t keep doing the same thing - we need bold action.

However, it appears that the radical Democrats threatening the future of our country are out-gunning us already. A Democratic Super PAC dedicated to DEFEATING SENATE REPUBLICANS announced a MASSIVE HAUL of $37 MILLION in just six months.

We simply can’t let this go unanswered. The **TOP SENATE RACES** most likely to FLIP are ALL held by _LIBERAL DEMOCRATS in states President Trump DOMINATED in 2016 AND 2020._ If we’re going to save this country from TOTAL destruction, we must win these Senate races.

name: moms for katie porter
subject: 2056 is too late
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Moms are amazing, but did you know they’re often not paid fairly? If women in the US were paid for the caregiving work they do, they’d make $627 billion more each year!
Today is Moms’ Equal Pay Day , and it shows us that moms have to work longer than dads to earn the same money. Without change, this won’t get better until 2056. That’s way too long!
We know that Katie Porter wants to help fix this. She’s a mom and knows what families are facing. That’s why moms for Katie Porter and working families across California rally behind her to help her get elected. She’s running for US Senate in California, and she’s all about making things better for working families.
Can you help? Even a little bit can make a big difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
With your help, we can fight for fair pay for moms. Let’s make sure moms like Katie get the chance to fight for us!
Thanks for being a part of this!

clean_body: [] Peter, Moms are amazing, but did you know they’re often not paid fairly? If women in the US were paid for the caregiving work they do, they’d make $627 billion more each year! Today is Moms’ Equal Pay Day , and it shows us that moms have to work longer than dads to earn the same money. Without change, this won’t get better until 2056. That’s way too long! We know that Katie Porter wants to help fix this. She’s a mom and knows what families are facing. That’s why moms for Katie Porter and working families across California rally behind her to help her get elected. She’s running for US Senate in California, and she’s all about making things better for working families. Can you help? Even a little bit can make a big difference. [] With your help, we can fight for fair pay for moms. Let’s make sure moms like Katie get the chance to fight for us! Thanks for being a part of this! CHIP IN [] Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #momsforkatieporter DONATE NOW [] [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . body:

Just like you, Peter, I get political emails too. Don’t they all sound the same?
If you don’t contribute today, the world will end!
Can you contribute to our 500x MATCH FUND? We promise it’s real.
If you don’t donate, the puppy 🐶 gets it!
Here’s the deal: grassroots donors are important and that’s why so many candidates ask you for help so often. I need your help too.
I’m not in this race to sound just like every other candidate - that’s why I’m announcing The People’s Campaign. Can you chip in right now to kick us off? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=08152023]
Congress is the People’s House, but right now, it’s beholden to the special interests that run our political system. It’s broken - plain and simple. So, what does The People’s Campaign mean?
*
Talking
directly
to
voters
early
and
often
*
Using
email
to
bring
you
behind-the-scenes
of
our
campaign

Telling
you
-
honestly
-
what
your
investment
in
our

means.

Can you step up right now and own your piece of this campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=08152023=25&recurring=1]
I just got back from knocking on doors this afternoon - voters are fired up and ready for change. I’m excited to take you on this journey.
In the fight,
Kurt

body:
I need top Democrats like you to help me lay the groundwork
| | |
---
Peter, I'll get right to it. Here are three reasons to **[donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68155121/422135371/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=3&refcode=jtk102-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQxOTAyMi1kNTNiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUEdlCY_AKyTUFwAV2cLDZEFZZS0GyKsX7D5YyntSGk=)** before my mid-month deadline at midnight:

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: the Voter Protection Project let me know I could reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi there, my name is Christina Bohannan, and I just launched my campaign in Iowa’s 1st Congressional District to defeat anti-abortion Republican Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

With so much on the line, my friends at the Voter Protection Project let me know I could reach out to you, so I have to ask: [_Will you become a Founding Donor and split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign? Your donation will lay the groundwork for defeating anti-abortion extremists like Mariannette Miller-Meeks in Iowa._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51514?t=6&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz) | [FLIP IA-01 BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51514?t=7&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
---
I’m the daughter of a construction worker who worked long hours to make ends meet. Growing up in a trailer just off a dirt road, I never thought I would be able to go to college or become a law professor _let alone run for Congress._

Through hard work and public education, I was able to achieve the American dream. _That’s the future I want for all Iowans, and it's that mission I kept top of mind when making the decision to run for Congress._

**My opponent Mariannette Miller-Meeks, on the other hand, has put the Republican Party over Iowans.** Time and time again, she’s abandoned the best interests of her constituents to stand with the far-right, voting against affordable drugs, good-paying jobs and abortion access.

I’m running for Congress because farmers, small-business owners, moms and dads - _Iowans just like me_ \- deserve dignity. **When I’m in Congress, I will put you first,** and I’ll fight for the best interests of our community.

[_It’s going to be a tough fight ahead, but I know with your help I can flip this district blue and play a part in taking the House back for Democrats. With so much at stake, I have to ask you again: Will you become a Founding Donor with a $10 gift split between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51514?t=8&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Christina Bohannan and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51515?t=9&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51516?t=10&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51517?t=11&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51518?t=12&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51519?t=13&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
Thank you, friend.

Christina Bohannan
_Candidate for Iowa’s 1st Congressional District_
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51514?t=14&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9912%2E878179%2EiZryXz)

body:
“All of the efforts by Donald Trump, his allies, and his enablers to try to silence the truth, to try to undermine democracy have been brought into the light.” – Hillary Clinton | | |
---
| | Did you see what Hillary Clinton said last night on _MSNBC?_ [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xaRu3n0cGNQE4QBeKFCbB9vE7lf25zn2xgqmQkZ2O5_GbUOPSVksWQg8nvCUsLaxdRgITyDOc2NPkj_AA3EERGNoOmwXg46yBd6CvYaQ_0rOQWUWLDj3A6rBSpm23U6_5Z0Q4AxEboG4MJ8MAH2GWm-puX7swwQF0qLV5tXSsmorfotZ77i_7WzaaBt-6hl24Uol62SYP539V5fWQIZEzS7BNDpqzJRDu1_kKiwFZYMz1dZoFDY9pf5wzpkh9ZQGvs_9kKsapWGiwjs_gKTf1JcJRNeRZ4bJqK4YSgok0TK0VpyET6wlqKdCYg6THBluv_vdiDjzXLrHEWdUs8hNBiUKxvu7yUxvKGv-gLN668zS_Ym5LOEmjzrgvst8Y9nxa-pGpCm-xZ_0O1fI-O8UXH/3ys/1lisGE7rR4qZdEuB3mVr7w/h0/ahagTDqz8WD_6j6qZrLYTQU5RZcNcKvu8G754fVaqnw) **There are still hundreds of state legislators in elected office who pose a direct threat to our democracy** – some were in attendance at the Jan. 6th insurrection, others supported the Big Lie – many while advancing anti-democratic legislation and sowing the seeds of doubt into our democracy. **Here’s the truth: Anti-democracy elected officials are in positions of power and will have direct influence over deciding the 2024 election in swing states like Arizona, Michigan, and Wisconsin.** [That’s why we’re reaching out – if you agree with Hillary Clinton and stand against Republican insurrectionists and their enablers, can you donate $7 to our Stop the Insurrectionist Fund today? subject: Upcoming Republican Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join fellow Republicans at any of these upcoming events nearest you! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=62de57a807&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| We are already halfway through August and well into the summer months. Check out some of the end-of-summer Republican picnics and BBQ's below to see if there is one in your area. Join us if you can, or help spread the word. And keep a look out as we continue to roll out more events for the summer and head into the fall. These events are an easy and fun way to help grow our party as we build toward the statewide elections in 2024.
**_Local Republican Events Below_**
---
| **South King County Republican Picnic - August 17**

This Republican picnic will have everything. Raffle prizes, candidate speeches, important updates on efforts in King County. And enjoy a tasty picnic dinner with your fellow Republicans. This event will be held in the important 47th Legislative District, a top swing district for both parties in the 2024 elections.
---
| [Get Tickets - South King County Picnic](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b64f03c318&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets - South King County Picnic")
---
| **19th Annual Pink Flamingo BBQ in Spokane - August 24**
_honoring Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers_

This annual event is one of the biggest summer BBQ's in our state and always promises a fantastic evening in honor of our great Congresswoman from Eastern Washington. It will be jam packed with fellow Republican supporters and local elected officials - this is an event you don't want to miss!
---
| [Get Tickets - Pink Flamingo BBQ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7d31f0f025&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets - Pink Flamingo BBQ")
---
| **Yakima 'Heart of the Party' BBQ- September 14**

Have fun with fellow Republicans, while enjoying plenty of food and drinks, and meeting with local elected officials and party leaders like State Legislators Alex Ybarra and Bryan Sandlin, and Yakima County Commissioner Amanda McKinney! 2023 & 2024 candidates for local and statewide office will also be featured at this event.
---
| [Get Tickets - Yakima 'Heart of the Party' BBQ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=37aed97244&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets - Yakima 'Heart of the Party' BBQ")
---
| **Kenmore 'Heart of the Party' BBQ - September 15**

Have fun with fellow Republicans, while enjoying plenty of food and drinks, and meeting with local elected officials and party leaders like Snohomish County Councilmember Nate Nehring, Snohomish County Sheriff Adam Fortney, Bellevue Deputy Mayor Jared Nieuwenhuis, and King County GOP Chairman Mathew Patrick Thomas! 2023 & 2024 candidates for local and statewide office will also be featured at this event.
---
| [Get Tickets - Kenmore 'Heart of the Party' BBQ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f3334e4585&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets - Kenmore 'Heart of the Party' BBQ")
---
| **Cowlitz County Republican Party Lincoln Day Dinner - September 23**

This annual Lincoln Day Dinner in Cowlitz County will be one of their best yet as they have an inspiring speaking program emceed by Glen Morgan - featuring Gubernatorial candidate Semi Bird, WSRP Endorsed Congressional District 3 candidate Joe Kent, and Chairman Jim Walsh. Get your tickets today!
---
| [Get Tickets - Cowlitz County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cd97f8f8b8&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets - Cowlitz County Lincoln Day Dinner")
---
| These final days of summer events will bring together like-minded individuals who believe in the principles of the Republican Party. There will be inspiring speakers, lively discussions, and opportunities to connect with our great candidates and fellow supporters.

**Don't miss out on these fun opportunities to help grow the Republican Party in Washington State. **
---
| We look forward to seeing you at one of these upcoming events!

-Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/heart-of-the-party-1341320?e=6a281f566d)
---

name: Team Scholten
subject: We need the resources to fight back now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Hillary has an incredible economic agenda that aims to better the lives of everyone, not just like the ultra-wealthy that Republicans serve.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68155377/422136699/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230815-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdmMTY3OS1kZjNiLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8ejJLD1_3nYXha0Zzp4L0-HHM3ljGtyoCtPchRV5Tc=)
---
| Hi there, The NRCC is attacking Hillary. They are trying to flip her seat with everything they’ve got, and the only way they can think to do it is to slander her economic record. Hillary has an incredible economic agenda that aims to better the lives of everyone, not just like the ultra-wealthy that Republicans serve. So, the GOP is trying to act like her plans are bad for the economy. Well, we’ve got news for them. We have seen consistent drops in inflation and massive economic growth because of policies she’s supported! body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkujvragih8dnovjvb9svi8oe69qq3o8rqmbdhog_rp22sh2s8i66p72chge0o36clh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

body:
When The Government Says “Don’t Worry”,Then It’s Time To Panic...

| | | **When The Government Says “Don’t Worry”,Then It’s Time To Panic ...**
---
**When The Government Says “Don’t Worry”,Then It’s Time To Panic ...**
---
As you already know, in 2008 we experienced one of the greatest financial meltdowns in modern history. Markets around the world crashed. Stock prices dropped. Once “invincible” financial institutions started showing signs of collapse. Then Governments “came to the rescue”, handing out massive bailouts and stimulus packages to keep the world economy afloat. We’ve been told these drastic measures prevented a total collapse of our system... But all it did was show the cracks in the system. Many lost faith in the financial system and the U.S Government. **And now it’s possible things could get worse.** Because we’re nearly $31 TRILLION in debt, and if that bubble pops? Your money could go to zero. Here’s how:
---
_Once investors who are buying Treasury securities (which finance the U.S. government’s debt) start to think the United States is in over its head, they may demand higher interest rates to cover the growing risk of buying Treasuries. This could trigger a further debt spiral, leaving Washington short of money._
---
In other words? **Boom**. Because once our debt collectors come knocking on our door, we’re screwed. $31 trillion in debt would be owed... Which means every legal citizen would owe more than $91,806.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I8zXnEwHn39%2b98chcX01zQ&sysid=1)

Friend, I enjoy real debate. I think the insults being thrown at me from the legacy media and political class are so phony and juvenile; I don’t believe that’s the way a great nation should be conducting itself, or the way a President of the United States should conduct himself. I am looking forward to taking the stage on August 23rd to address the nation for the first time. I will make my case to the American people of my vision for the future of our country and freedom restored across our land. I need your help to walk onto that debate stage with as much momentum behind me as you can give. **__I cannot win this debate without your support on that stage with me_._**

Here’s what you can expect from me: **_I will debate about the issues. I won’t insult somebody, their looks, or how they dress. I have a six, a five, and a three-year old. I wouldn’t teach my kids to treat people any differently than they want to be treated themselves, so I will set that example_.** There are MILLIONS of voters out there who do not like what Biden is doing to this country, Friend. They do not like the direction the country is going in, and they are ready to sign up for a candidate who will reverse the decline and get our country back on track. We must reach them. I need YOUR help to do it.

Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._W2boaR4mwG_tYVA)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I enjoy real debate. I think the insults being thrown at me from the legacy media and political class are so phony and juvenile; I don’t believe that’s the way a great nation should be conducting itself, or the way a President of the United States should conduct himself. I am looking forward to taking the stage on August 23rd to address the nation for the first time. I will make my case to the American people of my vision for the future of our country and freedom restored across our land. I need your help to walk onto that debate stage with as much momentum behind me as you can give. I cannot win this debate without your support on that stage with me. | | Here’s what you can expect from me: I will debate about the issues. I won’t insult somebody, their looks, or how they dress. I have a six, a five, and a three-year old. I wouldn’t teach my kids to treat people any differently than they want to be treated themselves, so I will set that example. There are MILLIONS of voters out there who do not like what Biden is doing to this country, Friend. They do not like the direction the country is going in, and they are ready to sign up for a candidate who will reverse the decline and get our country back on track. We must reach them. I need YOUR help to do it. | | Help me get ready to take the debate stage and reverse the decline for good. By chipping in to my campaign today, you are giving me the momentum I need to WIN. | | I will get the job done, but I am COUNTING ON YOU to help me sweep the stage on August 23rd, Friend. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
These are dark and trying times for America
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfhqhfq4ukvtrebcfadsli7ps2vc1dp5n5lekq60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdme6o76t1km1ib8tpmcipm6sjhmmp34pj2mlqj6tjh6dom8pbme9hm8t1kelgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35c5jc3g7eo366pgb6phnm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9oj4cjg61oj6c8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqcgtd54vd12rcbi6hv3j8r2hhm599c5rj394hmg_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That’s why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! **And, after reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL, we are in the FINAL WEEKS of our 2023 tour ... and we'll be roll through the final states in 2024.** [**Will you help TPUSA Faith finish our FINAL EVENTS for the Kingdom to Capitol Tour this year, with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more to help us reach as many people as possible before September 1?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd0lhndmrsv7tt0dnkajr23g399jspbqkfr6vbm8_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z46ihs2oq22udpq1emd5rnrfg3v3cjav1n9kpndg_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
So far, **Kingdom to the Capitol** has visited almost half of America's capitals. We only have two more weekends, where we will visit six states to finish out this summer. We plan to roll through the rest of America in 2024. Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it’s the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don’t have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that’s exactly what we’re pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can’t do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj29vd8far769d0ub9mqna6kml2e6cihbgn656qg_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za23niglob1c632h2b04a81mjns8bhve3ruca9no_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zemg01lum4o20mj33r4is4se0151m9snrneiblv8_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
After reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL this summer, we want to reach THOUSANDS more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, are bringing the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God’s kingdom near. That’s exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgrdpqeirdkfa077idhtiq90oem57j6rckupjq9o_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdf4vgilqjleabtkmdvfi66995tftei58o7uhat0_rp22sh2s8i66p72chie0o72cph2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

subject: Conservative Anthem Tops Charts, Hunter’s Lawyer Withdraws, and a Robotaxi Traffic Jam
body:
Donald Trump’s lawyers attacked a Georgia grand jury process that posted all charges against Trump on the court website while the jury was still hearing witnesses, calling it a “glaring constitutional violation.”

# WEDNESday, August 16, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we mark the 165th anniversary of the first [transatlantic telegraph message](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GO6yAQQNGvgc4WDBhIQfEad3ntlha2x_GsiLFgFCt_v8rWW9_i6H7dp3uiTMfjf3pi5K1MaWF64aRCp10HZgK5xg0R0EiM2t1ABzsYJ_e4oV8HgwHC4I01MIOejR6CtSnMHpKkCAqMCtqpm_E69EovNzNrG4J3ygYvrMKVuNT-u9DBO275XV5Y-6U8ZY4789mE-SdgFDBe19Xv1LjU96cLGA-8moBxo9q445qOljing2npGDM-ajr3bklzRlnjel6UMzX3UR_PRPlX4b-nfwIAAP__wLlYqQ), a congratulatory note sent in 1858 by Queen Victoria to President James Buchanan. The cable broke just a few weeks later. ## Trump Lawyers Blast Early Posting of Indictment
Donald Trump's lawyers [attacked a Georgia grand jury process](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyqzAQQNGvgW4ZaYVBLlS8hs6vTcnI0spsIiSPWZvw9xmnTn2bM_fjMl88Zy63_34lJ6nOPgi_aFYW9ABoZmyjS0RIpiWnhzNq25_M0C5uNGM6mWskNN7j2OOoB3Pqrba6Vxhsyw4VGmX1oM5m1LZTOpzNVffWjoPq7dj0iiJLfXSflYsslPJRX_ToQl3b7BaR-9aYfw1ODU77vnepfhfat3dvcLrXzMJha3BKzyy1QKjPIgdED5FSpiAb1AJL3YFL5CArFYFM_osiMARfBIRyhqM-wZdDFi639uHifeeceRvewtvqOf-K5O9BPwEAAP__YyJosA) that posted all charges against Trump on the court website while the jury was still hearing witnesses, calling it a "glaring constitutional violation." District Attorney Fani Willis deflected discussion of the issue Monday night, and a [court clerk apologized the next day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyqzAQheGnEd16pEXGoqC4DZ1vm5KRxQKbLBIDizN--4xTpznNab75P-7DPbJwnv_HlTqdyhCT8pMGG8A1gPWA1dhNREh1RZ1rWnTBX-umWjryzia6tpO3IUVKIwUMzXvRT84_Ku7QYm2Da2xb31y4WJfa-uF8CLfG-nAz3tLIWvbLZ-GsC03yKk_aL6mslXSL6naY-p_B3mCvCy0s8v4M9jvNp0Tlkg32qZy7wiOqCh0Ge--u3rkA0ylaMqRyZn1BEtq_II4r6wFaIKbEI2WNIi_YyqGcZzjiugnBWNK5UlbgDLqf6wYpHmSwr_Zu3L5ZhI_m7Z_XyL-mSv_O9xMAAP__On5zuA) for posting a "sample working document."

Willis charged Trump and 18 others with conspiracy and racketeering charges related to the 2020 election and gave them [until noon Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3oj4C4aBoUu2dO1oYe61cyMMFiaJ8vaV07Xj0fcNR-fnOl4DJcrLd1jRt7mMITZ64sgtE4ZJNcoe_IwoUfXohXFSWH1Wpr95ZSfUM2hp3HxWABYRnJ6G4PikghY9ecml4lYY7tQg7ImL6NQktLWD4doOneYI1Eo93QvldsM5vcsT6ymWtU_-1tq2d-qrk5dOXsKW8bUf0wG1UUzYyUurj3VjC5a6UGCYMDYqmVF-4t5oCR9aasjA7o_6Zi9KiXYGyp2NjAhzNByMdtoO3AKKiQuBoPrqYfv7msNzWQOlj1f7P9NvAAAA__97Cmkv) to voluntarily surrender. Trump is now charged with[ 91 counts in four different cases](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAUheGnwR0RXDDGBcU2dNl2SwvjS3xXNlhAMsrbjzL11Ec6-vT_uy_3QAflx99wouupLCF2euEiLJeGg1pg2FxCBFQDOmlmkFaPygy7w2CEkmq1awJtxxDFaFcUcrR6sttkBnIgQAkrjZjVJO1NyDirVWprJyO0nZgWuFEv9fa_UO47puNdXlhvsZzD4fber8bUHwaegc_vq7T-mRj4zzEDLywDL0cGfseKPFTkfUc-Sx7LM_fGe32eF6fGU4iUH5wy13yjlLBi7jyGho2BH6rbri86Dmrmo3qcgY4fRf89yncAAAD__xRWYBU) while a leading candidate for president. He called the Georgia charges "a continuation of the greatest and longest-running witchhunt in American history."
## Streaming Services Beat Cable for 1st Time
For the first time, TV viewers in July [watched more shows on streaming](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQxvGnMdsh-0yMGRiyMDVdOyID5-QqY0fGwerbV-nc7ZO-5af_122-OQ4c759up7H4NLu18EmztKAMoJ6x2UZPhKQbGpUZUNnuok3zGDu3KNTdgNYptVFnLfb-IhfTezvIzTQ8okQtrTJy0L2yrVTroBfVWdsb2dledJI2Lim334ljeZAPP-mk3K5pb8L4KOV5CH0VOAmcaq3tfsT3J3CiCK9D4FROgVOk-t6BI7kM5QTvQjhgoZAqXCQ8Ka8UCyQPJ1PleAefMnjOR4HCOwmcXIbrVXl-fXCTx-1ZOQQ-zNt43x2HP1P5P9FvAAAA__91tWb6) services than on cable. Streaming platforms had a combined record-high share of almost 40% of the total viewing audience. Among the streaming platforms, YouTube [had the highest share at 9.2%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PszAQhH8NdIv8QcAuKN6GLm97JXLwAhsZO2cvQfn3J66-eqR5Zp6v-3R3FCiu_92OAy9pcjPTGydhQHag9KRqPyyICnWNg-yskqa96a7eBiustjcjHSon7TJL67xte7885M1K39Y0KKG0MLITVvfSNELOVj9ka0zfidb0VSvQE6fcPBNF3nAJn_TG3Mxpr8OwMb9Kpf9VaqzUeJ5nEwlDwXjllRopFlo3LpUaL1ClxsIZ3U5xhTW7RwEHGeeUPWgDPaQFOLELwG84ilsRKMLzCB84iTdw8_dBGT0wccAC6eCXm6-yiCekTCtFFy5anQf_OikEKt11Yt0dhd_R_LfDnwAAAP__boN0Kw), followed by Netflix at 8.5% and then Hulu and Prime Video, both around 3.5%
## 'Rich Men North of Richmond' Anthem Hits #1
"Rich Men North of Richmond," a new right-wing country anthem from unknown artist Oliver Anthony, [has rocketed to No. 1](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3O2zAMAJ_G3hjoJ5XlwUOAItvXtd0MWaJjfZBEQ6Jj9O0LZ-5E4EjgcPz9NX-5mGJ5_XIZJ15pdp7jG2dhQRpQelZ9mFZEhbrHSZpRSXv_oU2_TcLhKo3V1ovgFhwHq3AJgx7HYNZBYR8nJZQWVhox6kHam5B-1Iu8WzsYcbdDdxcYIlO9fVMsvOGa_tIb681T7tO0Me-t049OPTv1PM_zllu5dp16YoGjfSZjZRdLxsKdehY8L7ykA8FTSq7CTily9C6BuxwZavQbZCxQqPIGtH5IphJgOfLe4Ns1KuBSQFegUXkBHXzdMe3QdmKgAn5z9TK6Co-HXLc__LOvU9jPmFJs5op7ZRfTJ4b__9t_AQAA__9dfn41) in the music charts in the past week, displacing Jason Aldean's "Try That in a Small Town." The song, filled with bitter working-class frustration against wealthy Washington elites, shot to prominence after going viral with prominent conservatives. The [YouTube video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAURb_G3oKe_Ywxg4dIFeqSLhmqTsjg5-DKxCk4oPx9Reeu90rn6Hxe-ouLKd5vH24mW0Lu3VjiRj2Yk9Anib3k3gYiScjJCt1KYVSNmk8WnQalgobRawVSQY2m9XVwvqUBvOPRSpAIRmhosRGmAjG2OAhlTKNBmYYpIB9LXqrvHO9lopBeeaOlGvPMk51KeawMz0x2THb7vlev_CzPgY7_WFwZJ4bdxvBt_bmeT9ev-n3JfLH-sceU4qoPxW12Mf0hy_-FvwEAAP__Ol1Qaw) of the song was up to 13 million views by Tuesday. Little is known about the singer/composer, a red-bearded farmer who reportedly lives off the grid with three dogs in Farmville, Va. [Progressives are suspicious](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2O6yAYAE8DHYi_AC4oXuMur93SIvARWGGIMHLk26-y9fYjzWi-7tvdl1ra87_fwc3UNx9mOWFjlnBNhNwEji4BCJAYHNeL4FbdpMbZKSm1EpHxBDbaRYbgHz4loyxEz7jBxQkmJLNcs0UabinjYZEPrqw1milrkGIQy-yDfvfSZoZUr37CoKHvuLo85-tA8h8SKxJr8PR49TEPevnc-4dBYm3wPpBYey0nDOLbzL1dZJSQyQ6NtD5mJlwzzc1tUTTPveLh4utdai2H_iQ8d1_qr3L-feAnAAD__6tIXEI) he's a music-industry plant, given how rapidly he went from unknown to chart-topper.

clean_body: Donald Trump’s lawyers attacked a Georgia grand jury process that posted all charges against Trump on the court website while the jury was still hearing witnesses, calling it a “glaring constitutional violation.” | | | | | | WEDNESday, August 16, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we mark the 165th anniversary of the first , a congratulatory note sent in 1858 by Queen Victoria to President James Buchanan. The cable broke just a few weeks later. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Trump Lawyers Blast Early Posting of Indictment Donald Trump's lawyers that posted all charges against Trump on the court website while the jury was still hearing witnesses, calling it a "glaring constitutional violation." District Attorney Fani Willis deflected discussion of the issue Monday night, and a for posting a "sample working document." Willis charged Trump and 18 others with conspiracy and racketeering charges related to the 2020 election and gave them to voluntarily surrender. Trump is now charged with while a leading candidate for president. He called the Georgia charges "a continuation of the greatest and longest-running witchhunt in American history." Streaming Services Beat Cable for 1st Time For the first time, TV viewers in July services than on cable. Streaming platforms had a combined record-high share of almost 40% of the total viewing audience. July also marked the first time that the combined share of both cable and broadcast TV . Among the streaming platforms, YouTube , followed by Netflix at 8.5% and then Hulu and Prime Video, both around 3.5% 'Rich Men North of Richmond' Anthem Hits #1 "Rich Men North of Richmond," a new right-wing country anthem from unknown artist Oliver Anthony, in the music charts in the past week, displacing Jason Aldean's "Try That in a Small Town." The song, filled with bitter working-class frustration against wealthy Washington elites, shot to prominence after going viral with prominent conservatives. The of the song was up to 13 million views by Tuesday. Little is known about the singer/composer, a red-bearded farmer who reportedly lives off the grid with three dogs in Farmville, Va. he's a music-industry plant, given how rapidly he went from unknown to chart-topper. () ➤ Chris Christie is ahead of Ron DeSantis in New Hampshire, according to an Emerson College poll released Tuesday. Christie had 9% support compared to DeSantis at 8%. () Flying together with: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet Ever heard the saying, "Good things come in small packages?" It's certainly true for the latest Horizon AX hearing aids by . These devices pack an extraordinary amount of technology into a device so small, they're nearly invisible! and see for yourself how Horizon AX completely disappears behind your ear. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Not your typical Senate campaign
body:
If there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc68bd622-99cc-4c11-8333-e9670823cfbd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, if there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly. Just look at how they’ve reacted in the last six months since we announced this campaign: As soon as Kevin McCarthy had scraped by in the Speaker election — with a bare minimum number of votes after his fifteenth humiliating attempt — he removed me as the top Democrat on the Intelligence Committee. McCarthy is so weak that his chief antagonists in the Speaker’s race — like Matt Gaetz and Anna Paulina Luna — have hijacked floor proceedings time and again to target me even further with political attacks. Introducing legislation to bar me from receiving classified information. Censuring me in political retaliation for investigating and impeaching Donald Trump. Even trying to fine me $16 million. And Trump himself continues to attack me too. Including calling me out by name in an exclusive sit-down interview with Fox News last week, and expressing his hope that I will not be elected to the Senate. Why do they continue to make me the target of their attacks? Because time and again, when Trump has violated the law and abused his power by...
* Soliciting and using Russian help in the 2016 election
* Leveraging his office and U.S. military aid to Ukraine to get Zelenskyy to smear Joe Biden
* Inciting the deadly insurrection to stop the peaceful transfer of power on January 6

...I’ve stood up again and again to say it isn’t okay. It’s criminal. Investigating foreign interference in our elections. Impeaching him for abusing his oath of office. Speaking the truth about what Trump knew and did on January 6. MAGA Republicans do not want to see Californians elect me to represent them in the Senate, because no one has stood up to Trump and his cronies as often and as effectively as I have. For years. They aren’t going to stop attacking me or our campaign. And very often I’m going to need your help to respond. That’s why I’m asking: [Will you split $10 or any amount to Blue Amp Action and my Senate campaign today to help us respond to Trump and MAGA Republicans’ attacks and keep up the fight for our democracy and an economy that works for all?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00e160c0-0abf-4497-9f1d-034d8f4bf1a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

| | | You are an essential member of our team, and with your support, we’re going to win this race, stop Trump in his tracks, and make the progress that the American people demand. Thanks for everything, — Adam

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. | | Fellow Patriot, Monique Worrell ran for prosecutor on a promise to _"change the culture of prosecution,"_ \- and she delivered by **simply NOT prosecuting criminals.** _I'd say that's a pretty big culture change!_ It's no wonder Governor DeSantis removed her from office for _**[dereliction of duty and incompetence.](http://trk.readactnews.-EJMoUxQ)**_ Just how bad was she? Let's look at the numbers:
* Of **83 gun crime arrests** , including robberies, carjackings, and home invasions, she secured **only 2 mandatory minimum sentences.**
* Of the **130 cases** involving possession of a firearm by a convicted felon, she secured **only 5 mandatory minimum sentences.**
* And of the **64 drug trafficking cases** referred to her, she got a whopping **ZERO mandatory minimum sentences.**

She refused to do even the bare minimum job as a prosecutor. And what did some of those violent, repeat offenders go on to do with their second or third chances?
* _One murdered his pregnant girlfriend. _
* _One shot two Orlando police officers. _
* _And too many others simply resumed their lives of crime afterward._

**Patriot, this is beyond "soft on crime." This is flat-out making crime legal.** **Monique Worrell is the second Soros prosecutor to be removed in Florida.****That's great news, but we can't stop there.**

| | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and to Save America continued last week with a video endorsement of Nhan Huynh’s candidacy for the Virginia House of Delegates in VA District 9; a Meet and Greet in Orange, Virginia; a dinner and event with Tricia Stall in Hudgins, Virginia; a tennis tournament in Norfolk, Virginia; an appearance on the Robert Scott Bell Show; an interview with Andrew Wilkow on Wilkow Majority on Sirius XM Radio; an article for Townhall.com; and an appearance at Nhan Huynh’s Rally for Parents-Rally for Virginia in Chantilly, Virginia.

| | |

| | On August 8, I recorded a video endorsement for Nhan Huynh, who is running for the Virginia House of Delegates in VA District 9. Nhan is a strong advocate of individual liberty who survived communist Vietnam’s brutal New Economic Zones (labor camps) to become an American citizen who will fight vigorously to defend our rights in the General Assembly.
