name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Do you believe in our Great American Comeback?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I am running to restore energy to the executive.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znpuriitjkvoh34sna2svq32f7kjakvvp27h0rt8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
Friend, **There is only a finite period of time to get things done as President. Two terms. Eight years. I plan to use every second working for the American people if I'm elected your next President.** Every morning when I wake up and see my three children, Madison, Mason, and Mamie, I'm reminded of what's at stake in this election. It's not our generation that we're fighting for, it's theirs. It shouldn't be a struggle to afford groceries, gas, or to buy a house, but under Joe Biden's leadership, it is.
* The price of a gallon of gas has risen 30 cents over the past month.

* The average sales price of a home rose more than 36% from the end of 2020 to the end of 2022.

* Interest rates rose once again just days ago, bringing them to their highest level in 22 years.

---
| | [HELP ME GET OUR COUNTRY BACK ON TRACK](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg9bdklvqf6itd2g8fl52l1ghutcnmcno6d56a0g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
Here's my plan, Friend. We will lean in, and we will go on offense. The media won't be able to keep up with us and neither will the Left. We're going to repeal and reverse **_every one_** of Biden's disastrous economic policies that are making your life more difficult and making your groceries cost more.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpqn7qcoltlo87tlakf1rkvnb9ga613vib4u4pjg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
If you share the belief with me that the future generations of this country deserve to see American freedom restored, I want you to join me in fighting for it. **Let 's DEFEAT the Left for good!**
---
| | [Donate $25 here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc0kvrfsrfg7aob7cp2f17co57e6dnsm7dft16to_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
| | [Donate $50 here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zev57t38u6410j2eva1akgb0oc9gko12a7b3d058_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
| | [Donate $100 here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zit1tbhg9soirtdb9o8e0jrvr27m832vpjke99bo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
**_Help me DEFEAT the Left once and for all and restore freedom for the future of this country. I am counting on YOU._**

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5r1dmifaejccjgj7fl7tjm4iadh1kbbeglp712g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmrhf04v357enptvia4i3rjgfa0o91csmh0di5m8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6cob1cph2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

---

This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: July Average Donation = $32.80
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vstv6SSDN7

Vivek 2024

This campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people
like you - not the Washington elite

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ostv6SSDN7

$32.80
That was our average donation in
July, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign on
February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters
across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.
Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this
month's debate, but the next one too!

This campaign is proving that
building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington
insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them.
That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that
our message and solutions are what are going to revive our
nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To
keep this going and actually impact change, I need you to join me
and put some skin in the game with me.

Can I count on you to chip in $1,
$5, or even our average gift for last month - $32.80?

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $20 ➔

Chip in $32.80 ➔

This isn't just a political
campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic
pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our
purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of
your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from
conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a
grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the
Washington elite.

I will do what the other GOP
candidates appear afraid to even say but I need your help to
amplify our ideas and message.

Please add your voice to the
growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN $32.80
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/istv6SSDN7

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ostv6SSDN7

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: 🗓️August 16: State of the Race Update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If Ruben wins in November it will be because we managed three factors well: People, time, and money.
#

Peter -
We pushed hard to hit our mid-month goal, but we came up short.
So today, we’re trying something different. Stick with us for a minute.
**_Official State of the Race Update for Peter Willis_**
If Ruben wins in November it will be because we managed three factors well: People, time, and money.
We’ll start with our people. That’s you. We’re putting a lot of work into building up our grassroots team right now, the people who fund this campaign and will make calls and knock the doors through Election Day. But it takes a lot of time to build that up.
Today, time is on our side. But it’s ticking down, and we don’t have as much of it as we think. Between now and Election Day, we have five more quarterly FEC deadlines. We set big goals for those deadlines, and we’re already halfway to our next one.
And finally, the money. That’s how all of this moves. Money for staff, money for organizing, money for advertising. It’s going to take millions of dollars to win.
And here’s the truth: We can manage our time and our people better than anyone, but if we don’t have the money we need, it will all be for nothing.
Kyrsten Sinema’s not going to have any trouble raising millions from the wealthy and well connected when she announces. And Kari Lake is the MAGA Queen — Trump’s millions of supporters will rally behind her.
But Ruben Gallego depends on you. And he needs your help today.
[**Make your first $3 donation to Ruben’s campaign. With your help we’ll run the best race we can and send a good man to the Senate. Today is especially important, because we have ground to make up after missing our mid-month goal.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230816-1-f&t=1&akid=945%2E734936%2EPlrpfq)

---

And Kari Lake is the MAGA Queen — Trump’s millions of supporters will rally behind her. But Ruben Gallego depends on you. And he needs your help today. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for reading through our update, Peter. And if you can afford it, make that donation. Gallego for Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: dirty diapers...
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T694d1fa3-22ef-4310-95a0-d6cc3a59a68c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country. Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby! [While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b11b2af-d20b-455e-9208-1978d5d5ff12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79f8b462-523a-49ea-ba80-37403ce9aea0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more! We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te38a84b5-b262-4de0-9887-4f6a060cc9ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(The really tall guy is Josh.) After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers. Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy. [So what do you say, Peter? Will you split $15 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10f1881e-5a23-4a17-a0f3-48a393bf077d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al
P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [So donate now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80602e47-145e-4613-b49a-4485915b47bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Speaker McCarthy, me
subject: FWD: It's urgent that I hear from you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m not sure if you saw my first email, but I STILL need your input!

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I’m not sure if you saw my first email, but I STILL need your input! You were hand-selected as a representative for your area, due to your outstanding record as a top patriot. Your opinions are VITAL to ensuring that our legislative agenda aligns with the wants and needs of the American people.

**In an effort to increase our sample size, we’re extending this survey’s deadline to 11:59 PM TONIGHT - THIS IS A HARD DEADLINE.**
---
| | [TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PMaDxhf2%2f5U%2bof48zHOlPQ&sysid=1 "TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY")
---
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
From: Speaker McCarthy
Subject: It's urgent that I hear from you.

This is Speaker McCarthy and it’s urgent that I hear from you.

I promised that when we took back the House and FIRED Nancy Pelosi, things would change, and we would deliver results.

We are now in a position to do so. I’m reaching out to my top patriots for their priorities, input, and feedback.

You are part of an extremely select group that I’m reaching out to. What you have to say will determine the next steps we take. Please complete this survey by midnight tonight.
---
| | [TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21659%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PMaDxhf2%2f5U%2bof48zHOlPQ&sysid=1 "TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY")
---
Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21650%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YpVrFPMsfvHL8FChRuSiRw&sysid=1 "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden’s cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I’m sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won’t let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21651%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=utVxj64%2fp0yrYRNVP7z%2bAg&sysid=1 "Can you rush $8, $15, or
$25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their
tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

clean_body: I’m not sure if you saw my first email, but I STILL need your input! | | | | | Friend, I’m not sure if you saw my first email, but I STILL need your input! You were hand-selected as a representative for your area, due to your outstanding record as a top patriot. Your opinions are VITAL to ensuring that our legislative agenda aligns with the wants and needs of the American people. In an effort to increase our sample size, we’re extending this survey’s deadline to 11:59 PM TONIGHT - THIS IS A HARD DEADLINE. | | "TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Speaker McCarthy Subject: It's urgent that I hear from you. This is Speaker McCarthy and it’s urgent that I hear from you. I promised that when we took back the House and FIRED Nancy Pelosi, things would change, and we would deliver results. We are now in a position to do so. I’m reaching out to my top patriots for their priorities, input, and feedback. You are part of an extremely select group that I’m reaching out to. What you have to say will determine the next steps we take. Please complete this survey by midnight tonight. | | "TAKE THE SPEAKER'S SURVEY" Thank you, Kevin McCarthy | | "Never Give Up: Donate now!" I write to you with a heavy heart. The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden’s cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown. We must never give up on our crusade for freedom. I’m sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won’t let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority. "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?"** Thank you, Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy | | "DONATE" | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Sabina

| Folks, _Roll Call_ ranked me as [**the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68161623/422156613/836544485?refcode=em_fr_b1_081623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQ3YjNlNy0zNjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPDS_GJjHgsN6UnBAxxsNtpAwYiPihrrAqsgvDRmS2A=) That’s on top of _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ and _Inside Elections_ calling this race a [**toss-up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68161626/422156614/836544485?refcode=em_fr_b1_081623_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTQ3YjNlNy0zNjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPDS_GJjHgsN6UnBAxxsNtpAwYiPihrrAqsgvDRmS2A=) And it’s why Mitch McConnell has made Montana his top target. Not to mention, national Republicans are already hammering me with political ads that distort my record. Look, I’m not panicking — _but I am sounding the alarm._ A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map. It’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win. [**Montana is a top battleground this cycle, and whether or not we pull off a win could come down to you. We’re $17,612 behind our mid-month fundraising goal. subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=a6f122b2b0334e92bc555776f0ccc3c6&_e=zduh4fkXdSi4ig1skfK8y9MMnZCteIS4YkEIS-_ngFak9ilQHBgoj6Rz6OGIAEeuMHOotR0jGtpOymdtgdDdEWn7YDxxVnvGZfDQ1Quec3T-fPBNUlzRPPzcF-la4GOo8k-N5V4vZ8G4kFqxzeQu-_v2UuzAdHlvqIOiTbORRVx5rvH7_L_M1Ni5Qmd4Fem9xQx6swr1lLiKPuPkkIgnx8hJpUTRALU7kW3fnK-eRH7uelUw8yBYi4vKJOMPJ6QfpkP9_P2TrPvKSu2nhF14OgzP8XOsTOJneC8o7JefL44XC9HPwR1GMEGYQok5lBntMLVnZeAdTSm35g7JDqUiW1Pc1AOW2U1nPQGhJhsGqBoxv8Angk2I6dznv3lm7IR1mg4I3x_F2nxpgKq7mCRU8J2aCgIen1Zvs_pyjwueVCiU05cgLz_kshN3z3ibbWT5ney5e4gkr4UUo_NarlVcMqBL6VL8ZyutiCVN3yRXg1gZ17Ad2lcVp_PkGJj-Vr2F)

| | Friend,

---
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.

---
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America._
_
---
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – _but there’s one thing you will** _NEVER_** hear me say_...
---
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**

---
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._

---
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. _
_
---
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.

---
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed._
_
---
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: _“I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_

---
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?__
_
---
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
---
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down._
_
---
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._ _
_
---
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well._
_
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=a6f122b2b0334e92bc555776f0ccc3c6&_e=zduh4fkXdSi4ig1skfK8y9MMnZCteIS4YkEIS-_ngFak9ilQHBgoj6Rz6OGIAEeuMHOotR0jGtpOymdtgdDdEWn7YDxxVnvGZfDQ1Quec3T-fPBNUlzRPPzcF-la4GOo8k-N5V4vZ8G4kFqxzeQu-_v2UuzAdHlvqIOiTbORRVx5rvH7_L_M1Ni5Qmd4Fem9xQx6swr1lLiKPuPkkIgnx8hJpUTRALU7kW3fnK-eRH7uelUw8yBYi4vKJOMPJ6QfpkP9_P2TrPvKSu2nhF14OgzP8XOsTOJneC8o7JefL44XC9HPwR1GMEGYQok5lBntMLVnZeAdTSm35g7JDqUiW6hQv52PsfC4k5Uv3Gp5eP7RW2ZUIkFurWhwDNzCJUQUdxNvvTtr8TzuyScklW1iG9B1l_EGFfDGJj3FkQodsRI0GERsOGy_d0pJGn0QoovTLNAVnH5juz7bYtXmHbta_dkXun4UTxRaYNh4gq7CdEmI7tJ7xUfPcco1Ew9fZRVH)
---
_Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
_
---
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors._
_
---
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – **_I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION_**._
_
---
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts._
_
---
We will win back the White House._
_
---
We will save America from tyranny._
_
---
And we will _MAKE_ _AMERICA_ _GREAT_ _AGAIN_! 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸 _
_
---
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)_
_
---
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country.__
_
---

I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed. But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake... ...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸 (If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Cook Political Report: NY-3 a top pickup opportunity for Democrats in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George
Santos.

The Cook Political Report released a preview of the 2024 Congressional
elections, listing NY-3 as one of the top pickup opportunities for
Democrats.

Here’s why: Our district voted for President Biden in 2020. And George
Santos BARELY won his seat in 2022. And we’ve now learned that he LIED his
way to victory.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19015?t=1001&akid=3500%2E346206%2E1Ej66A ]If Democrats retake this seat in 2024, we’ll take a MASSIVE step toward
flipping the House. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles
Booker -- to help me defeat Santos and flip the House?

I’ve defeated Republicans before. When I ran for the New York Senate, I
unseated a well-funded Republican Senator, flipped the seat, and flipped
the entire chamber, giving our party a “trifecta” in the New York House,
Senate, and Governorship.

When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue
and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s
gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19015?t=1002&akid=3500%2E346206%2E1Ej66A ]Democratic control of the House runs through New York -- and I need
your help to defeat George Santos. So please, split a donation between
Charles Booker and my campaign now if you can.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners can sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmo4ijra5p533l7o5jobjmvpjnpc1imml1c9e150_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6eo31c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdla9un8125rb650ngqehngmji7vf7vq9cve0228_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6eo31c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zae1fh3qo6m28krsf6jhvvg9e87gn21cnjc3qgqg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g6eo31c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

Kash Patel

name: Andy Kim
subject: Whether you voted for me or not, I work for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Every time I do one of my monthly town halls, I make sure to remind people of how I see my job: whether you voted for me or not, I work for you.

I'm not here to have a showdown with Washington Republicans, I'm here to fight for the working families of New Jersey's third Congressional district. I'm here to work to lower costs, and protect people with pre-existing conditions — things we can all agree on.

Our movement isn't supposed to be about partisan politics. It's supposed to focus on helping all Americans from all walks of life. It should be about coming together for the common good.

Will you help to strengthen our movement focused on people over partisanship today with a donation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-08-16-ira&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a7b254f9-393c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]

A year ago, the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law. I'm incredibly proud of the whole bill and the part I played in bringing this transformative legislation to fruition.

For the first time, we allowed Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices, we capped out-of-pocket prescription drug costs, and we capped the cost of insulin at $35 per month for seniors.

We made historic investments to boost clean energy production, helping to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 40% over the next decade while creating good-paying jobs right here in New Jersey and across America.

And we finally provided real tax reform to ensure ultra-wealthy corporations pay their fair share all while lowering the national deficit.

I don't consider these accomplishments "a win for Democrats" – they are wins for people in New Jersey and Americans across the country.

That's how governing is supposed to work.

Unfortunately, right now, extreme right-wing obstructionists are in control of the House, with leaders more interested in partisan talking points and scoring political points than actually governing for the American people.

It's going to take a strong movement to win against this wave of MAGA extremism, but together I know we can do it! Can you chip in now and help power our movement forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-08-16-ira&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a7b254f9-393c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73]

Together we can make sure the Inflation Reduction Act isn't the end but just the beginning of legislation that works for everyone!

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: Every time I do one of my monthly town halls, I make sure to remind people of how I see my job: whether you voted for me or not, I work for you. I'm not here to have a showdown with Washington Republicans, I'm here to fight for the working families of New Jersey's third Congressional district. I'm here to work to lower costs, and protect people with pre-existing conditions — things we can all agree on. Our movement isn't supposed to be about partisan politics. It's supposed to focus on helping all Americans from all walks of life. It should be about coming together for the common good. Will you help to strengthen our movement focused on people over partisanship today with a donation? [] A year ago, the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law. I'm incredibly proud of the whole bill and the part I played in bringing this transformative legislation to fruition. For the first time, we allowed Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices, we capped out-of-pocket prescription drug costs, and we capped the cost of insulin at $35 per month for seniors. We made historic investments to boost clean energy production, helping to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 40% over the next decade while creating good-paying jobs right here in New Jersey and across America. And we finally provided real tax reform to ensure ultra-wealthy corporations pay their fair share all while lowering the national deficit. I don't consider these accomplishments "a win for Democrats" – they are wins for people in New Jersey and Americans across the country. That's how governing is supposed to work. Unfortunately, right now, extreme right-wing obstructionists are in control of the House, with leaders more interested in partisan talking points and scoring political points than actually governing for the American people. It's going to take a strong movement to win against this wave of MAGA extremism, but together I know we can do it! Can you chip in now and help power our movement forward? [] Together we can make sure the Inflation Reduction Act isn't the end but just the beginning of legislation that works for everyone! More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

I wanted to reach out to you personally and ask for your support as we hit the halfway point of this critical fundraising quarter.

Our campaign is just getting off the ground in preparation for 2024, and now we’re facing the **toughest end-of-quarter deadline of the year.** We can only hit our goal with your support.

Each end-of-quarter deadline is a critical milestone for our campaign that can make or break our chances of staying competitive in this toss-up race.

**To fight back against Kevin McCarthy’s attacks, we need to raise $25,000 before our deadline.** This amount will help us make sure we can reach more voters, spread our message, and build up early campaign infrastructure that will prepare us to win.

Believe me when I tell you how important this is – this election has already begun. There is a limited amount of time left to make key early moves that will make a difference, so your help is of the utmost importance.

**[I'm reaching out today to ask for your support. No matter the amount, every contribution brings us closer to meeting our goal. clean_body: This election has already begun. | | = I wanted to reach out to you personally and ask for your support as we hit the halfway point of this critical fundraising quarter. Our campaign is just getting off the ground in preparation for 2024, and now we’re facing the toughest end-of-quarter deadline of the year. We can only hit our goal with your support. Each end-of-quarter deadline is a critical milestone for our campaign that can make or break our chances of staying competitive in this toss-up race. To fight back against Kevin McCarthy’s attacks, we need to raise $25,000 before our deadline. This amount will help us make sure we can reach more voters, spread our message, and build up early campaign infrastructure that will prepare us to win. Believe me when I tell you how important this is – this election has already begun. There is a limited amount of time left to make key early moves that will make a difference, so your help is of the utmost importance. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for everything, Marcy Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68172672/422181338/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQ3M2MzMi0zZDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5c4SwpNud9PmmdHrABmSkC2nuYrXjIsvt8582V6fWCk=&emci=3f48636f-913b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=05473c32-3d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) I won’t beat around the bush, team – reproductive freedom is a human right, and I’ll fight every day to protect that right as Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General.

When the Supreme Court overturned Roe, they opened the floodgates for anti-choice laws proliferating nationwide. Far-right politicians are doing everything in their power to enact total bans on abortion. Abortion in Pennsylvania is legal and we must fight to keep it that way.

Here’s the truth: Our next Attorney General will be on the front lines of this battle – and Pennsylvanians deserve a pro-choice champion in office that will defend their rights against extremist attacks—and win.

I know I can sound like a broken record sometimes, but the stakes in this election couldn’t be higher.

**[Protecting our fundamental rights has never been more important. As your Attorney General, I’ll fight to make sure abortion remains the law of the land in PA. While other candidates talk about being pro-choice, I have a record of taking on tough fights and delivering results.

During my time in the Pennsylvania House, I had a 100% voting record with Planned Parenthood, winning their endorsement in every one of my races.

As Auditor General, I lead the investigation into Real Alternatives, the organization running scam Crisis Pregnancy Centers across Pennsylvania. I uncovered the corruption and misleading tactics this organization was built on, and recommended the termination of their state contract. And just a few weeks ago, Governor Shapiro ended the Commonwealth’s contract with this anti-choice organization.

Team, I don’t just talk the talk, I walk the walk. I’ll do anything in my power as Attorney General to protect the right to choose and defend reproductive freedom in Pennsylvania.

**[I’m proud to protect the rights of all Pennsylvanians – but this battle won’t end anytime soon. Please, chip in to help our team win this race and protect a woman’s right to choose:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68172761/422181438/-412144306?refcode=email_081623_righttochoose_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTQ3M2MzMi0zZDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5c4SwpNud9PmmdHrABmSkC2nuYrXjIsvt8582V6fWCk=)**

name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: Don’t Let Them Intimidate You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
| | | [](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-172-328-520-8f64042667-dj16f6533a)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

_**Never before has there been an administration so radical, so derelict in its duty to our country and so politically weaponized.**_

Almost immediately the Biden Administration went to work turning our once prosperous nation upside down, creating record debt and inflation, dangerous streets, high energy prices, an open and chaotic border crisis, and uncertainty in almost every sector.

**Just last week, for the second time, the U.S. lost its AAA credit rating.**

Yet they don’t blame themselves and their failed policies. They don’t work to fix the situation. Instead, they spend their time attacking conservatives who don’t adhere to their bizarre ideology.

_Take note:_ The indictments of President Trump are meant to serve as a warning to all freedom loving Americans that the Biden Administration’s leftist woke agenda, supported by the Washington Swamp and their allies in the media, is not to be challenged.

It’s all about them gaining power and control over us by undermining our way of life, our institutions, and our ability to pursue the American dream. They want to demoralize us, to make us feel like criminals, like we’ve done something wrong so they can stay in power. This is how Socialism works.

They want us to feel undeserving of freedom, and so they constantly attack it, through law-fare, in the media, by censoring – by any means possible – hoping to eventually wear us down so much that we willingly surrender to their authority.

_**We are NOT going to let that happen. Every day I’ve been fighting back against their woke agenda and the left’s power play over our lives and our country.**_

Some of the actions I have taken include:
---
* Voting to create a Weaponization Committee to investigate and hold accountable those in power who seek to destroy our freedom.
* Cosponsoring legislation to expunge President Trump’s two sham impeachments.
* Advancing border security legislation that **ACTUALLY** secures the border and takes on the cartels and smugglers.
* Working to impeach President Biden and Secretary Mayorkas for not defending our borders and allowing our country to be invaded by millions of foreign nationals.
* Voting to defund the woke agenda – in our military and other institutions – along with taking on controversial Environment, Social and Governance rules (ESG).
* Protecting our manufacturing capability and technical prowess from being ripped off by China and other foreign adversaries.
* Passing an energy bill that reduces prices and makes America energy independent, again.
* Voting to stop the raid on our treasury and voting against debt limit deals that don’t actually limit debt.
* Introducing election reform legislation that requires transparent, American-made voting equipment.

---
We have more work to do. Every day we discover more about the Biden Family’s “business” and just how weaponized federal agencies have become. If we are going to turn things around, we must stay engaged. [Please join me](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-172-328-521-b7d5cfe65c-dj16f6533a) in continuing the effort to push back and cancel the failed Biden agenda.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Bill Posey
---
P.S. Don’t let them silence you. Don’t let them intimidate you. The next election will determine who controls our country – the Washington Swamp and its deep state allies, or the American people. Join us[ HERE](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-172-328-521-b7d5cfe65c-dj16f6533a).
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Never before has there been an administration so radical, so derelict in its duty to our country and so politically weaponized. Almost immediately the Biden Administration went to work turning our once prosperous nation upside down, creating record debt and inflation, dangerous streets, high energy prices, an open and chaotic border crisis, and uncertainty in almost every sector. Just last week, for the second time, the U.S. lost its AAA credit rating. Yet they don’t blame themselves and their failed policies. They don’t work to fix the situation. Instead, they spend their time attacking conservatives who don’t adhere to their bizarre ideology. Take note: The indictments of President Trump are meant to serve as a warning to all freedom loving Americans that the Biden Administration’s leftist woke agenda, supported by the Washington Swamp and their allies in the media, is not to be challenged. It’s all about them gaining power and control over us by undermining our way of life, our institutions, and our ability to pursue the American dream. They want to demoralize us, to make us feel like criminals, like we’ve done something wrong so they can stay in power. This is how Socialism works. They want us to feel undeserving of freedom, and so they constantly attack it, through law-fare, in the media, by censoring – by any means possible – hoping to eventually wear us down so much that we willingly surrender to their authority. We are NOT going to let that happen. Every day I’ve been fighting back against their woke agenda and the left’s power play over our lives and our country. Some of the actions I have taken include: Voting to create a Weaponization Committee to investigate and hold accountable those in power who seek to destroy our freedom. Cosponsoring legislation to expunge President Trump’s two sham impeachments. Advancing border security legislation that ACTUALLY secures the border and takes on the cartels and smugglers. Working to impeach President Biden and Secretary Mayorkas for not defending our borders and allowing our country to be invaded by millions of foreign nationals. Voting to defund the woke agenda – in our military and other institutions – along with taking on controversial Environment, Social and Governance rules (ESG). Protecting our manufacturing capability and technical prowess from being ripped off by China and other foreign adversaries. Passing an energy bill that reduces prices and makes America energy independent, again. Voting to stop the raid on our treasury and voting against debt limit deals that don’t actually limit debt. * Introducing election reform legislation that requires transparent, American-made voting equipment. We have more work to do. Every day we discover more about the Biden Family’s “business” and just how weaponized federal agencies have become. If we are going to turn things around, we must stay engaged. in continuing the effort to push back and cancel the failed Biden agenda. Sincerely, Bill Posey P.S. Don’t let them silence you. Don’t let them intimidate you. The next election will determine who controls our country – the Washington Swamp and its deep state allies, or the American people. Join us. | | | Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey P.O. Box 411486, Melbourne, FL 32941-1486 You are receiving this email because you have interacted with the Bill Posey campaign. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
Round 7 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid To Debate | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4fd4e695a5b5/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559940?e=d0a9afa930)

|

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 16, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Round 7 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid To Debate** **ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released the seventh ad in a ten-part video series highlighting why Donald Trump is afraid to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd.
The spot drops on the heels of [new polling](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=2c699678e8&e=d0a9afa930) out of New Hampshire which has Governor Chtis Christie in sole possession of second place. Round Seven takes Trump to task for his previous support of Communists and dictators across the globe. Previously, Trump has praised Xi Jinping, the Communist leader of China, as straight out of “[central casting](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=64c8ab527a&e=d0a9afa930),” and “brilliant.” He frequently gushes about Vladimir Putin, leading Governor Christie to label him as a “[puppet of Putin](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ecf09dd076&e=d0a9afa930).”
Chris Christie has made it clear that as president, he would [not stand with](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=828b736cbd&e=d0a9afa930) authoritarian and Communist regimes - he’ll [stand with our allies](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=238f6b3a84&e=d0a9afa930).
Trump is afraid to debate because he doesn’t want his praise of Xi and Putin to come to light.
**Round 7: Communists And Authoritarians**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1dc28b404c&e=d0a9afa930)
| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a03f02d332&e=d0a9afa930)

[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173742/422184994/-1591047870?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=&emci=822e8337-3114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa80f5d-3e3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173748/422184999/-2103933345?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=&emci=822e8337-3114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa80f5d-3e3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535).** **** As you may know, [I am the great-great-grandson of U.S. Representative Robert Smalls](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173754/422185009/1602602244?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=&emci=822e8337-3114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa80f5d-3e3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535), a legendary Civil War Hero who, in 1862, commandeered a Confederate ship taking his family and 15 other enslaved people to freedom. Now, [I plan to carry on his legacy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173762/422185019/-1085336281?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=&emci=822e8337-3114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa80f5d-3e3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) by serving in the same Congressional seat that he once held.
I'm passionate about the issues that Lowcountry South Carolinians care about most; creating jobs by partnering with labor unions and local small businesses, affordable quality health care, educational opportunities, women’s reproductive rights, pay equity for women, protecting Social Security and Medicare, effective climate change solutions, equality and justice for all, and defending our democracy. Above all, I am an optimist. And with supporters like you, I know we can elect a new wave of leaders to the U.S. House who prioritize progress over division and country over party. Once again, thank you for joining my campaign and for everything you do, \-- Michael [MEET MICHAEL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173767/422185049/491958687?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=&emci=822e8337-3114-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=3aa80f5d-3e3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68173772/422185054/-726475688?refcode=nondon_auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhODBmNWQtM2UzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FkUD57vs-tE5IZmEdEp0YiUHy4dFC6e6JUo0vCPrhj8=)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo4m63ulb6k9bhivvi417iu6jg4r3vqnu0apejio_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g61o76cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpd6f122o4lubqdahghvtmmf7latvm0ve9co0qn8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g61o76cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgvagfhf709tgn03sfe4qufn9aannp2ugjj7kv80_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9g61o76cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily

subject: AR15 RIFFLES (WITH ATTACHED SUPPRESSORS) FOR ME -- BUT NOT FOR THEE!!!
body:
Who did you think you may have to shoot using the FIVE semi automatic rifles and FIVE semi-authomatic pistols you kept at your facility? | | | | | Can't see images? [Browser View](https://mailchi.mp/f29cb31d3a9c/ar15-riffles-with-attached-suppressors-for-me-but-not-for-thee?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |
# PARTY OF THE CONSTITUTION
---

I have two sets of questions I would like answered related to the search warrant served in pursuit of investigating systemic election fraud, appearing to occur on a level that could change election outcomes.

(Question 1 of 2) I support the right of all Americans to exercise their unalienable 2nd Amendment rights. To those under investigation for many thousands of ballots worth of election fraud intended to change election outcomes:

* Inside the building you leased, where the State Police served a search warrant in the course of investigating election fraud operations, who did you think you may have to shoot using the five semi-automatic rifles (with suppressors already attached) and five semi-automatic pistols (one of them having a collapsible stock) you kept at your facility?

(Question 2 of 2) For those in the social and politically engineered mainstream media posing as 'news entities.'
Do you "find the hypocrisy to be rich" regarding the fact that the politically-left disposition of the people operating multiple facilities where search warrants were served in the course of investigating systemic election fraud had one of the primary facilities armed with five AR15 rifles (with suppressors already attached) and five semi-automatic pistols as if to protect their operations when the politicians they attempt to elect conspire to disarm American citizens exercising their unalienable-right to bear arms recognized in the 2nd Amendment? Let's be honest about what's going on with aspiring-tyrant, liberal-imposter Democrat Party leaders. These globalist-marxist-type infiltrators do not represent the vast majority of Democrats who are liberals, not marxists!
Aspiring tyrants using globalist-marxist strategies and funding have infiltrated the Democrat Party leadership. They attack and oppress true liberals opposing their tyrannical nature.
The goal is to engineer chaos in America while burning it to the ground so that they can rebuild America per their tyrannical worldview - hence the pretense used to set portions of our cities on fire increasingly. Meaning, there's nothing 'liberal' about these globalist-marxists, who should be ejected from the Democrat Party!
While the true Republican is a constitutionalist (per the National Party Platform), it is anti-tyranny liberals who lawfully fight in their Democrat Party to secure liberty for their children and grandchildren by ejecting marxists posing as 'liberals.'
The true-liberal-Democrat understands the lies of globalist-marxists, which deceptively claim 'to pursue equality.' The true liberal understands what world history proves. That the only version of 'equality' marxist tyrants ever produced was "equality of tyranny for all except for the ruling-elite living lives of privilege."
I ask those who are true-liberal Democrats, for the sake of the survival of your own children and grandchildren, will you please eject the aspiring-tyrant marxist-globalist leaders posing as 'liberals' from your party? Will you please return your party to liberalism? Because if you do not, the aspiring tyrants having infiltrated your party will deliver you to tyranny, not liberalism.
UNITE AROUND INDIVIDUAL LIBERTIES
Let's return politics in America to a healthy debate between constitutionalists and liberals.Debate and subsequent actions regarding how we all can protect the future of our children and grandchildren from aspiring tyrants deceiving their way into positions of authority under the pretense of 'good intentions.' Where they attempt to create violence-related, economic, health-related, and other forms of chaos used to pressure us into exchanging liberties for (perceived) security...
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND The Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=8b67098034&e=a2af77507c)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
says we need TO CLOSE THE BORDER NOW | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c17d2df6eff7/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12619922?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=f1e7ce150a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Democratic presidential candidate Robert Kennedy Jr. recently stated, **“We need to close the border now”. **
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=873aaa9eb7&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| Mr. Kennedy acknowledged the humanitarian aspect of the border crisis, realizing how illegal immigrants are exposed to _unimaginable violence_ at the hands of cartels to get here, and then too often become _indentured servants_ when they arrive.

He emphasized how the Biden Admin's open border policy is allowing Mexican cartels to control our immigration policy and profit from the chaos!

**This crisis affects every Texan AND American**. **It’s tragic that Tony Gonzales, who represents 800 miles of Texas’ southern border, isn't willing to admit reality, which RFK Jr. understands on such a deep level after only three days of seeing the crisis with his own eyes!**

It boggles the mind how a Democrat who is from another part of the country can see how monstrously **BARBARIC** the status quo is **EVEN AND ESPECIALLY FOR ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS** compared to our **RINO** Representative!

**Even though I’m a MAGA candidate who backs President Trump, I respect Mr. Kennedy. And I agree with Robert Kennedy Jr. 100%. The southern border should be closed ASAP!**

**Not only does Gonzales fail to see TRUTH, he CHOSE to be part of the problem when he rejected his Republican colleagues’ attempt to address reality arguing their attempt was _inhumane to illegal border crossers._**

The deplorable truth is, Rep. Gonzales has the support of the DC Establishment, Peter. [**I’m depending on EVERY single dollar from our grassroots movement to help me break the power that the DC Cartel has on the status quo in my fight to unseat Tony Gonzales!**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c95191e3cc&e=c982eb7ad4)

[**Can I count on you to chip in $10, $15 or $20 today in our mission to reclaim our nation from the DC Swamp?**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=911eedb1af&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| For America,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=288a64d12b&e=c982eb7ad4)
---

name: Jane Fonda
subject: what big oil doesn’t know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We are fighting back by electing climate champions at every level of government because we know our future is on the line.

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Big Oil corporations are spending millions of dollars against climate champions in crucial races across the country and on lobbyists to influence federal climate legislation.

**But what they don’t know is the strength of the climate movement.** We are fighting back by electing climate champions at every level of government because we know our future is on the line, we are taking to the street to demand action from our leaders, and sending a clear message that we won’t give up on fighting for our planet.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to help us reach our $5,000 mid-quarter fundraising goal and show your support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68174658/422187780/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230816-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyYWJhMDQ5LTNmM2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gRyCBdXD_s340zh1ClLAeh3fsGoaSTPmxVCf-KzUQd8=)

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to fighting for our planet, but we can’t do it alone. It takes all of us to demand climate action to protect vulnerable communities on the frontlines of the climate crisis, and to make our planet livable for future generations.

We have hope for the future, and we can defeat Big Oil and end the era of decades-long reign of fossil fuel greed and exploitation.

name: Team Evergreen Action
subject: Happy Anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
To the biggest climate bill in U.S. history
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13632%2E53494%2EGdgSoc)
---
| | Friend, The moment was a long time coming. A year ago today, President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law. That signing ushered in a new era of U.S. climate action, but the single moment was built on years and years of tireless, tenacious climate advocacy and policy work.
---
[The IRA Turned One: What's Next?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4994?t=4&akid=13632%2E53494%2EGdgSoc)
---
For over a decade, individuals and organizations across the movement fought for the sorts of meaningful investments in a better, safer future that became the IRA—and Evergreen was born out of that movement. Our people were deeply involved with the design and passage of the IRA, and your support was essential at many points along the way. Now, with your help, we continue working with a broad coalition to make sure nearly $400 billion in investments get spent in a way that drastically cuts climate pollution while combating historic harms for pollution-burdened communities. **Wondering how we encourage robust, equity-centered investments through the IRA? Check out the blog to find out:**
---
[Happy One-Year Anniversary, IRA](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4994?t=6&akid=13632%2E53494%2EGdgSoc)
---
And thank you for everything you've done and continue to do to help America make the most of this historic opportunity. Gratefully, Evergreen Action
---

name: Wisconsin Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: UPDATE: New lawsuit →
body:
A game-changing lawsuit filed last month in Wisconsin could overturn the GOP's rigged maps. With Wisconsin’s new liberal majority on the state Supreme Court, we have a chance to chip away at the GOP's hold. | | |
---
| | **UPDATE: A recently-filed Wisconsin lawsuit seeks to overturn the GOP's rigged maps and put _every seat_ up for re-election** A _game-changing_ lawsuit filed in Wisconsin could overturn the GOP's rigged maps. **This is monumental.** With Wisconsin’s new liberal majority on the state Supreme Court – a majority that supporters like you helped solidify earlier this year – **we have a real chance to chip away at the GOP's hold on this statehouse and even flip the WI legislature for the first time in decades.** We need to move fast to ensure that Democrats have the resources in place to win in states like Wisconsin and pave the way for victories nationwide. [Now is the time to mobilize. _132 seats_ could be up for grabs in Wisconsin next year – and hundreds more across the country.
