name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign to tell Georgia officials: "No pardons for Trump!"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don’t Let Georgia Republicans Pardon Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85480ceb-1142-4208-9b39-fe094b6bccd4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15ef5ca0-a268-4e7b-87a8-4200616ca529/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Within moments of Donald Trump's indictment, Georgia Republican officials [began a push](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04124575-581f-493d-b473-c57bc9ace380/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for him to be pardoned (because this is a state crime, pardons come from state officials, not the president). The good news is that Georgia, unlike most other states, doesn't allow the governor to hand out pardons like lollipops. Rather, pardons come from an official board, and they come with restrictions on scope and a waiting period. The bad news is that Georgia Republicans are pushing to change that to make it easier for Trump to get a pardon and avoid any punishment whatsoever. Don't let them get away with this. We need to raise hell NOW, to make it as hard as possible for them to do this. [**Add your name now, and tell Georgia officials: "No pardons for Trump!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T123335c4-cde5-41a4-bfb2-2e5526a21cb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all.

_Like improving access to quality education...
_
_Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border...
_
_Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts...
_
And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers.

I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend.

If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me.

clean_body: | | | | Intended Recipient Only: Please do not forward this message or otherwise share| Friend, Down here in Louisiana, we don’t always do what’s popular, trendy, or what everyone else wants us to do... But we always do what’s right. Which is why today, I would like to personally invite you to join my exclusive team of Sustaining Members – it will go a long way in helping me fight for Louisiana values in the Senate. | | | | | Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all. Like improving access to quality education... Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border... Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts... And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers. I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend. If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me. Thank you, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

name: Your America
subject: Reading the Bible with Fresh Eyes
body:
In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis

I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.
| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21661%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CVoUhxyxhcfPNZL8i2dkmQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21661%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CVoUhxyxhcfPNZL8i2dkmQ&sysid=1) | Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is still available online for free! In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. “The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education. |
## What students are saying
“Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life.” **\- Fred D.** “Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge.” **\- John C.**
---|---
Time is Running Out [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21661%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CVoUhxyxhcfPNZL8i2dkmQ&sysid=1)
[Don't wait--activate your free _The Genesis Story_ course now!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21662%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kxVauE0n1XG8XHefmoo3vA&sysid=1)
Then, Professor Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.
These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.
This course is perfect for personal study, viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/genesis](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21663%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6mkfY1216kSEnekH9UtcMg&sysid=1)**
Please use the secure link above to explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”
Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News

name: Sean Barry via ActionNetwork.org
subject: I had no other choice
body:
| | | Friend, When people ask me why I decided to run for Congress, I have to tell them the truth **Honestly, I ran out of options.** Let me explain. As the son of an Air Force officer, I have seen that the government can be used to guarantee a standard of living. That it is able to find and help people in mental health crises, who are spiraling from one misfortune to another. To keep people housed, fed, and productive. But for the average person here in Texas, it doesn’t do that. Many candidates promise legislative success, and that’s what we’ve seen from our representatives for years. While they may promise us shiny things, **our communities have yet to see any results.** My campaign seeks to improve the lives of my constituents regardless of electoral success. **I am not going to rely on legislation alone to improve your life. We’re running a service-based, community-focused campaign that is**** _for_****the people.** I received my degree in Mechanical Engineering from Texas A&M.; There, I learned how to identify problems, and their causes, and create solutions. I’m ready to use this knowledge and these tools to protect our communities and hold our politicians in Washington accountable I wanted to introduce myself to you today, and let you know about the concrete solutions that I plan to bring to Texas’ 29th Congressional District. If you want to learn more about myself, my campaign, and my plans - [**please feel free to check out my website!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOH8vS-H2wVKd-2YocowzUKsqJ2Uw2Dw7Hu4rQilhmmHhPjBa14JlvtykRTmyNFCOsJvrG7UVdn2EDz1h5FwP4UNq4JkYCuD44-72-9qlQVBDmh8OY_dCTQi-XCk2Z_TRDvpbb9aeWwbOzoHiPC-YOkAciFfIIHQ3LsGxjfrmrXx86X_liOi4z9NWAo8i2XKGMXZ2TomdwlsHsN2CDkeiA59s_yynF0DYeppurKrrrkh/3ys/Q9skkAW1SRqGvQSqQ2nzKQ/h0/XmKDAMA6Uzqd--78JMKNat6aViT2uoIJAbyCy-q_cfk) It’s time to stand up against career politicians who have no interest in helping anyone besides themselves, and actually deliver results for our communities. **Follow me on** ********[Twitter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhvKvF23nMWYkeCgP0UfX7pCEscdcAj-jlOwn6JC5vfV55SDJkhwGUHC1yFFE3pn5AjX_-4IVLaLzfsexvLHmK5Pz216YyUSc-BXkrvxDgDa7O365dxyivgrlSrh8vY2whHmGcUrHpZ6GI6oQGTVNTiBvac7wYE39bRk4fON0ntqCdMtwYGdYthNrktMMgRK0WJfmwBgNEHLxWohbK5a2Nmew8IGhrH5y0cvkTz5FT0DI/3ys/Q9skkAW1SRqGvQSqQ2nzKQ/h1/eMNGwRVun1aVMdqosk760CxOELP5o-y_4BVEs0PKZ8k) to** stay updated with everything we’re up to!****** Thank you for your time, Sean Barry Candidate for Congress, TX-29
* * *
Elect Sean Barry
9519 Swanpond Ct Houston, TX 77075
---

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zubp05fs1ccj94bn3f0clr48frlet53v1f57kjpo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i60or2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdjq8ttau2f82ucapnnb02a8cm0rue6mcap419o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i60or2cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zimd7pct67i81nvv0652747cfvnr4r5kq92gjv6g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i60or2cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---

name: Sean Barry via ActionNetwork.org
subject: I'm working for you
body:
| | | Friend, Leadership is severely lacking here in Houston. **Our people deserve better** \- We need new leaders, but even more than that we need to reach out to one another and fight against machine politics and career politicians. The right uses scare tactics to remain in office and convince their followers to turn against democracy and undermine our elections. Our leaders now sit idly by while our democracy is threatened time and time again. I have watched for years as our leadership has put their careers over the good of our community. It’s time for us to make a choice for 2024 - are we choosing Democracy? I’m running a service-oriented campaign whose purpose is to give back directly to the people of Texas’ 29th District. name: VoteVets
subject: It’s easy to forget how serious this is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek,
Yesterday it became clear that Trump would be indicted for his efforts to defraud the voters of Georgia and steal the election in 2020.
After all of these indictments, it’s getting hard to keep them all straight.
And with so many now, it’s easy to forget how serious this is.
We can’t let that happen. The reality here is if Trump is tried and found guilty, he will do serious time. But we don’t know when that might be.
And there’s a very real — very likely — chance that Trump ends up being the Republican presidential nominee. And a very real chance that he wins next November.
And if he wins again before these charges get their day in court... Well, let’s just hope that doesn’t happen.
That’s why we’re here.
We can’t control whether Trump does time at Leavenworth or not.
But we can control whether we do everything we can to make sure he is beaten — finally, and for good — at the ballot box.
VoteVets made sure Trump lost in 2020, and we’ll do it again in 2024. But we can’t do it without you. So please:
**[Make your first donation to VoteVets today. It might seem early, but we’re ringing the alarm. This is an all hands on deck moment, and we need you with us because we can’t afford to lose in 2024. The fate of our Democracy depends on it.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230815-1-16&t=1&akid=15625%2E3013755%2EhL55pW)**
| [DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230815-1-16&t=2&akid=15625%2E3013755%2EhL55pW)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

We’re in a position to win, but we need to keep building momentum, so I’m asking you to dig deep and contribute what you are able to help us increase our spending on television to get our message to more people across the First District. Even if you have already given to our campaign, can you chip in $50, $100, $250, $1000, or as much as you are able right now? | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | With gratitude, Kate | | = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Katie Porter
subject: More accountability at the Pentagon.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Lax Pentagon oversight + lack of accountability = unacceptable
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28291%2E3422442%2EwUOrn0)
Did you know that the Pentagon hasn't passed a single independent audit in _years?_
Despite this, Congress passed a record breaking $858 billion defense budget last year—which was _$45 billion more_ than what President Biden had requested. Yet, due to lax DOD oversight, we’re not able to scrutinize what each and every dollar is going toward.
This is wasteful, reckless, and unacceptable, Derek.
Every year, private defense contractors spend millions lobbying members of Congress. In fact, defense contractors spent $101 million on lobbying in the _first three quarters_ of 2022.
As an advocate for oversight and accountability, I’ve worked to ensure that taxpayer dollars are being spent responsibly—and not given as handouts to private defense contractors who make billions each year.
By eliminating some of this wasteful spending, we would be able to make crucial investments in infrastructure, clean energy, education, healthcare, and so much more.
Taxpayers deserve to know where and how their money is being spent. [**If you agree, can you pitch in today to send me to the U.S. Senate so I can continue demanding accountability from the Pentagon?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230816-1?refcode=EMAK16_1_DOD_20230816_V1_F&refcode2=28291_3422442_wUOrn0&akid=28291%2E3422442%2EwUOrn0)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230816-1?refcode=EMAK16_1_DOD_20230816_V1_F&refcode2=28291_3422442_wUOrn0&akid=28291%2E3422442%2EwUOrn0)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK16_1_DOD_20230816_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28291_3422442_wUOrn0&akid=28291%2E3422442%2EwUOrn0)**

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: We fell short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
So I have a favor to ask, if you’ll give me a moment of your time.

Peter, I’ll come right out and say it: We fell a bit short of our $20,000 **Fight Back Fund** goal last night. Look, I get it. Folks are still out on vacation, kids are heading back to school, and the last thing on many peoples’ minds is a gubernatorial election. **But the stakes in this race are sky-high, and time is of the essence, Peter.** In fact, we’re just a few weeks away from the first ballots of the race being cast. That’s why we need to close the gap and start investing in voter outreach and field programs _now._ We need to spread our message before folks head to the polls! So I have a quick favor to ask: **_[Will you rush a $10 donation right now to help close the $2,000 gap in our Fight Back Fund? If just 200 donors chip in, we’ll be back on track to executing our winning strategy and winning in clean_body: So I have a favor to ask, if you’ll give me a moment of your time. Peter, I’ll come right out and say it: We fell a bit short of our $20,000 Fight Back Fund goal last night. Look, I get it. Folks are still out on vacation, kids are heading back to school, and the last thing on many peoples’ minds is a gubernatorial election. But the stakes in this race are sky-high, and time is of the essence, Peter. In fact, we’re just a few weeks away from the first ballots of the race being cast. That’s why we need to close the gap and start investing in voter outreach and field programs now. We need to spread our message before folks head to the polls! So I have a quick favor to ask: = = = Thanks so much for your continued support. \- Shawn Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Ryan Walker, Heritage Action
subject: BREAKING: Heritage Action scores MAJOR legal victory against Weaponized Government
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Heritage Action has been locked in a legal battle against the FEC and the Campaign Legal Center (CLC), a deep-pocketed liberal organization. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5ac734477c2493fa912d401fdd352ff&_e=Ede6crRKOpdWE5a3uoO6fGnkSgONo5nSpZj1yO9SeqHlBsXSDuP06U9YpteD2h69nxQpT8Gh4Yre0d3iqHO0iH8pPVr8riDbv78xDDQy8PqS3aL3yyrE-dddynR6WEPqq-lVmVFC1aDFyywZjNC7fMwqo2jHQdbA0vswv5difSlehfmoMkLt7smewYYnrUZ2NmrKxuuRyrz7KDjaXfwTY3s6DLGGmkoDAS2HZW22Bhz6mDkyzDJ4lhnSE0I1LPnQ)
---
| | **BREAKING:** **HERITAGE ACTION SCORES****MAJOR LEGAL VICTORY****TO DEFEND CONSERVATIVES’ PRIVACY**
---
[**STAND WITH HERITAGE ACTION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5ac734477c2493fa912d401fdd352ff&_e=Ede6crRKOpdWE5a3uoO6fGnkSgONo5nSpZj1yO9SeqHlBsXSDuP06U9YpteD2h69nxQpT8Gh4Yre0d3iqHO0iPXPIMcf3ohK3MMAD03ubAZikx4C90krfZfwFEuRCzkGP_-um2Z9P6zD_cz2zUeaOsiSUzqWwHrtH1E7EDzDoSEMoSs5_fMvSx2T5u-F9nE1J6Lq8whDPw7tjIhvWue7GRMDfgOuKQcRD5wLZSqmZ4UZ4ypkFjQoNvjfvjmFTCXq)
---
| | Peter, it’s Ryan Walker, and I wanted to share an important update with you. Heritage Action has been locked in a legal battle against the FEC and the Campaign Legal Center (CLC), **a deep-pocketed liberal organization.** The CLC had a clear goal: **Force Heritage Action to disclose the name and addresses of our confidential grassroots supporters. ** This was an effort to dox conservatives. It served no other purposes than to target and harass individuals on the Right. What’s terrifying, is that **Democrat members of the Federal Election Commission weaponized their power to target conservatives** and help the CLC’s lawsuit. **They wanted to intimidate and silence the grassroots.****But we fought back.** Heritage Action doesn’t shy away from a fight,_especially_ when it comes to exposing the corruption and weaponization of the federal government. **We went on offense and used the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to expose the FEC for their abuse of power, and highlight their weaponization of the government against conservatives.** The FEC’s Democrat commissioners refused to allow their agency to disclose already dismissed matters, misled federal judges, and allowed Left-wing allies like CLC to wrongly stand in the FEC’s shoes and attack political opponents in court. Not only did we defeat the Left’s ridiculous lawsuit, but we exposed the political bias in government.**** Our victories in court are a win for the American people. **We believe in fighting on every front, in every battlefield we can!** Whether it is in the courtroom, Congress, or state legislatures, Heritage Action will continue fighting to bring integrity back to our government institutions and protect Americans’ rights.
Peter, as you can imagine, fights and lawsuits like these aren’t cheap, but they are worth every cent if it means protecting grassroots conservatives' privacy and free speech. **That’s why I humbly ask you to stand with Heritage Action by[adding your name to join our movement TODAY!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5ac734477c2493fa912d401fdd352ff&_e=Ede6crRKOpdWE5a3uoO6fGnkSgONo5nSpZj1yO9SeqHlBsXSDuP06U9YpteD2h69nxQpT8Gh4Yre0d3iqHO0iNgI9ZFn01KWlz5WS9xqbn1zyAN3-wyDJx8Bci_xkBEma-FucExbAc1da7RcI7UM_XJx3KYwfmmRch1TppWXkugId4QD8MTnHkIo7mRU5AobmkGOWOb8NEa6Ji2LF3-WU9lqvH0gs1K8ceQW697HID4RCWLaCgwmYYtCTh5cHPXP)** Your generous contribution will empower us to safeguard Americans' right to free speech, always. Thank you for your unwavering support,Ryan WalkerActing Executive DirectorHeritage Action
---
| | |
---
Here at Heritage Action, we saw the damage caused by the wokeness infecting American business and culture, so last year, we launched our ESG Hurts campaign to fight ESG wherever it rears its ugly head.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c5ac734477c2493fa912d401fdd352ff&_e=Ede6crRKOpdWE5a3uoO6fPy7trwf2R0zLWAG4JTuJ7Hn9k9Fiho3XzlXJB6I_k0nMFhIb5tr0KB8WnwOEt-leI8HuCtq6tzZE693pID1XanbDVSjoeFccT81genaN8GOxfS-Dnn3ZCJ3QatCFMoVzLabWhFvaSc2f8nSlTvzHcBkoiqVlrt52B6MNfkZkjBi)
---
**And we’ve had a handful of critical victories in that fight.** 🔔Helped pass anti-ESG legislation in numerous states.🔔 Supported a bipartisan congressional resolution to overturn Biden’s Pro-ESG rules.🔔Forced Biden to defend his ESG agenda with his FIRST-EVER VETO.🔔 And many more to come.
---
|
---
|
---

body:

Peter,

One week from today, I'll be in Milwaukee, WI getting ready to take the stage for the First Presidential Debate.

**I am looking forward to participating in my first political debate.** I want to give Americans the chance to hear the TRUTH directly from me.

To help build excitement from Team Vivek, I want YOU to be my special guest at the debate. I asked my team to hold two tickets for our top supporters. We'll pay for travel and accommodations for one lucky winner and their guest to Milwaukee.

To be in the running, **[chip in any amount before 11:59 pm on Thursday, August 17th.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8f9d0814e9e44fd92cfeabaf81f156d&_e=rRBlTB_PPmBPD6KWknN4jFZ_d-Jxq0wQd0j_JrOEA9mFJm6LL0XcDN-B3EBiQ_sqkMPPj7y4OHN662JPafEnBvbAFwgBKdQla6aGZwW1holNSLHHMgPEJ5sy6hjd9-CasuCBvifMMOS8r2kZcQdczOdSg0RvGto4wdR5GKuKz8OIl03p-_kcqVp7c9-P3gXeMtRF3UKVjdvPpSG36uNxX-2rzAihSLtH8qDFr-ThISG6rps-Ig42Kw2KahhTnYcAKO1IZhl4HFa8SkVxNys2P1u5XmYJVTRNA6hb2PTq1z7G9mPnZkYV7X5g3-dnAnPnGq31gUxnQf_zj9rC-9rZhmBTQbHI3h2qoey95YBofPcbT9eO2H7HKpgmZdxl64rjLQjnoKcTTG3lJaGSX3bbv2zRCz2rgb-lXHd_kVRw3j4%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e8f9d0814e9e44fd92cfeabaf81f156d&_e=rRBlTB_PPmBPD6KWknN4jFZ_d-Jxq0wQd0j_JrOEA9mFJm6LL0XcDN-B3EBiQ_sqkMPPj7y4OHN662JPafEnBvbAFwgBKdQla6aGZwW1holNSLHHMgPEJ5sy6hjd9-CasuCBvifMMOS8r2kZcQdczOdSg0RvGto4wdR5GKuKz8OIl03p-_kcqVp7c9-P3gXeMtRF3UKVjdvPpSG36uNxX-2rzAihSLtH8qDFr-ThISG6rps-Ig42Kw2KahhTnYcAKO1IZhl4HFa8SkVxNys2P2fioXMKvKRP_dKeFfQiCiAocluGCC1rE3QemDD4o0ev5fb399a9-11RuTcZYeiDl6wVSCj-eQ3QAFP3RqtrkH74SFRpXQ_OgFzGkxrgkXGKFdvL6lKvDy5UmeTGSjMnQ9ZUIvgtfUB0ZPwfAvEaSgE%3D)

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Three reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — here are 3 reasons why you should **[donate $3 toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35617?refcode=em20230816-3566&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=1&akid=3566%2E614464%2E8ef54p)** before our deadline TONIGHT:
1. **Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator running for re-election in 2024.** A new _Morning Consult_ poll found Hawley’s approvals _even lower_ than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — making our race here in Missouri Democrats’ best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat this cycle.

2. **GOP insiders + corporate elites are already dumping money into our race.** Just a few weeks ago, we learned that a handful of corporate mega-donors put more than $1 MILLION into a brand new Super PAC that will no doubt aim to attack Lucas Kunce + make Josh Hawley look strong.

3. **Lucas is building this campaign to replace Josh Hawley the right way,** without a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. He’s relying on everyday people like you to fuel this movement — and he needs your help right now to stay prepared for the fight ahead.

**[So Peter, can you rush a donation of $3 or more to our campaign today so we can take advantage of this opportunity to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and hit our mid-quarter goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35617?refcode=em20230816-3566&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=2&akid=3566%2E614464%2E8ef54p)**

Team Lucas Kunce

name: Perry Johnson
subject: Pollsters are corrupting debate process
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWWsQ4SDlN

I am the ONLY candidate with a comprehensive plan and a fresh
perspective to help put the nation back on track.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWWsQ4SDlN
Friend,

My name is Perry Johnson, I am the ONLY candidate with a
comprehensive plan and a fresh perspective to help put the nation
back on track. Unlike the traditional politicians, I am an
outsider committed to addressing the pressing issue affecting
every day hardworking Americans - the debt crisis. My innovative
"Two Cents Plan" offers a thoughtful and decisive solution that
no other candidate has even come close to matching.

Friend, the media and the D.C. establishment have been
against our movement from the very beginning, because they are
afraid! They are afraid of anyone who wants to take away their
power and budget!

I am a self-funded candidate who is not in this for the
money so this is not a donation ask. Pollsters are picking and
choosing candidates who they include and their bias is corrupting
the RNC debate process. SO I NEED YOUR HELP.

I simply ask that you tell any pollsters that contact
you, that you are supporting Perry Johnson for President to help
make sure I get on that debate stage.

If you want to learn more about my ideas and solutions,
be sure to check out this ad.

WATCH THE AD NOW >>>

Friend, with your support in the polls, we can ensure
that Conservatives nationwide get the chance to share their ideas
on the debate stage.

Thank you for your support, together we can keep this
country the greatest country in the world!

-Perry Johnson

Candidate for President

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Hey there,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a small donation between Seth Moulton and our campaign ahead of our midnight deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] . But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important — especially right now.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.
It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from serving on the House Intelligence Committee.
Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from accessing classified information.
Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about me on his primetime Fox News show.
Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.
And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.
It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage our work to defend democracy.
Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.
It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor.
Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.
Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thank you for your support,
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=r8LajL0OGczF4AT2p1WMJ34Q1CgZZ%2FVW9OCC8TS8B6sNYTKTMqVpIrovknYYHtgsBUHRK9caWuO3uUUWhpHO%2FucladtbX7KOiVW%2BpCEiQ3MwXn0s8Fv7ixUwd52QzN0XO6WhtV9P%2BCoUvgHg9INN8g%2B5AO%2BTQbJIKCXr3Ry7Q9s5utYjNT1o4A8OKc7rzBc3gtmc4l9MrzfdNbWFluYhB3oEaU%2FYYDNBYO%2BUIb7fURCHsYbfcTgL%2BN%2BWKMzShNAU0JUkXRTQY7a9FOEptjLLM4E8GmmcKFrv8bZAhj3dPaN9pxa3IBY2JTYZzeBYyPAXLSeQRze7Y7vVEnmDKJVv443xjgEZ2UmmE3%2BvW0NIYAjO6DbG7CphDJ5Y4lacmBwxlIbQwo9LU9dpxcangAuhjpulKMdJM38znY60ASy1yEk%3D .
Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors.
Seth Moulton for Congress
PO Box 2013
Salem, MA 01970
United States

Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve stood up to these bullies and called out their lies. It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight. They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken defender of democracy on the Senate floor. Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight — especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any one of his lackeys tear our campaign down. Friend, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will you pitch in a donation of $3 or more to Seth Moulton and our campaign before our midnight deadline? The attacks are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for everything they’re going to launch our way: [] Donate [] Thank you for your support, — Adam Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The Beauty of Genesis
body:
In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis

I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.
| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq5mhpq41fon1ntvmv7sskie0j73i6mmajkhgr78_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i64ob2cjh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeblr5reioeplrkl725aukr7s4lqn7jh3u595710_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i64ob2cjh2bs) | Dear Fellow American, I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is still available online for free! In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. "The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education. |
## What students are saying
“Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life.” **\- Fred D.** “Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge.” **\- John C.**
---|---
Time is Running Out [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn0s0mvslt3qh2ggku6m3l74cv4hrlkvmjelutjg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i64ob2cjh2bs)
[Don't wait--activate your free _The Genesis Story_ course now!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8ac2414huhtb769u5d9qod6i5q2660end480ucg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i64ob2cjh2bs)
Then, Professor Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.
These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.
This course is perfect for personal study, viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/genesis](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zti6aua1dp96pb0o0ogukr8q5ivnk52fqf9lbut8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9i64ob2cjh2bs)**
Please use the secure link above to explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."
Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: To no surprise, MAGA clowns are doubling-down in their schoolyard bravado. | Hey there, team — We wanted to make sure you saw Eric’s message yesterday — and the latest act in the MAGA circus. In the dead of night former President Trump was indicted,yet again! Kevin McCarthy and his other MAGA colleagues released their statements on Trump’s indictment for his 2020 election interference efforts in Georgia. To no surprise, MAGA clowns are doubling-down in their schoolyard bravado by claiming this is a political prosecution against Trump. The law is not a partisan process, friend. We’re up against a mid-quarter deadline at midnight, and Eric is sick of these playground shenanigans from MAGA fools — including Kevin McCarthy.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, friend. Team Swalwell \---------- Begin forwarded message --------- From: Eric Swalwell <info@email.ericswalwell.com> Date: Mon, Aug 14, 2023 at 2:24 PM PST Subject: Take it back to the playground, Kevin 🥱 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = There’s a time and a place for schoolyard bravado — but the House Floor ain’t it, friend. I’ve known guys like Kevin McCarthy my whole life. And I’m sure you have, too. They’re the first people to puff out their chests and talk a big game, but when it comes time to walk the talk, they’ve got... well, nothing. But as the highest ranking member of the House, resorting to violent threats isn’t just a bad look. It’s a direct reflection of our democracy on the national stage — and we as a nation are far beyond reactionary tactics designed to scare us into complacency. Right now, we’re gearing up for our big mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and I’m not going to stop speaking out against Kevin McCarthy until he leaves office as the shortest tenured Speaker in House history.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having my back, friend. — Eric | | | = = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 15th Congressional District. name: David Trone
subject: Ways to help Maui
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
https://www.redcross.org/local/hawaii/ways-to-donate.html [https://www.redcross.org/local/hawaii/ways-to-donate.html]
Peter, I’m sure you’ve been following the devastating news coming out of Hawaii regarding the deadly wildfires in Maui.
My heart breaks for everyone affected by the wildfires and I promise to do everything I can in my capacity as a representative in Congress to help communities rebuild and recover. But there’s still more we can do right now to support the people of Maui.
If you're able to swing it and you’re looking for a way to help, you can donate to the Hawaii Red Cross today. [https://www.redcross.org/local/hawaii/ways-to-donate.html]
Thanks for your time,
David Trone

Ted Cruz hasn’t done a damn thing for Texas, and Roland has a chance to beat him. We are less than halfway to our $20,000 goal. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to support Roland as he takes on corporate-backed Cruz in 2024? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE MORE [] Time and time again, Ted Cruz and his Republican allies have put their corporate donors over Texans. Roland has always put people over politics. Will you become a Founding Donor of Roland’s campaign for US Senate by contributing $5 or whatever you can today? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We appreciate your support Peter, Gutierrez HQ Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. While Ted Cruz has looked out for his corporate donors, Roland is focused on serving Texans. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help us defeat far-right Ted Cruz? [] CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas Roland Gutierrez For Texas PO BOX 15232 San Antonio, TX 78212 United States CONTRIBUTE [] Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. But if you'd no longer like to receive emails, you can click here to unsubscribe:

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... **(see graphic below)**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf1feca335c54a29811ab1f068aae24b&_e=QaFqeWYT7lZO4tfYYRFRaMnslU2zQ_frmkGfBO4vLwzTxrrJWFjwxkzug6Yb9djWQxuhSnxfAS0goVCt0uVyRi6DK3FbWwqC77sHaRKvQg00JWTqB9px68N1p3ZKPGkcf4mOoQfEpuFEOdtDyrNL3SytN9QlKPdt15H1ymdUopHI6tLd1CYXA4ZlXq833n8V36pgYQLEnusR5Kx8NQy_1kVb1WeoPvZDVEmj1ta0K_SnTwrLVwREiwJDsh3rtmX1AISMz7hPSGQbTpcPsdWW7uMkwwSaz0ngNKlKUBmjEaA0C97xiPwbdT5IC0iNeEtwupUERB52zn6V5mbgsK9tUckkxb6BapESDRbqyJUyaWH8jGd8M_VVPcPQB3xpe_ddi8L7x-yoiQA46GbUj_aq5w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: **[Will you donate $2 right now?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf1feca335c54a29811ab1f068aae24b&_e=QaFqeWYT7lZO4tfYYRFRaMnslU2zQ_frmkGfBO4vLwzTxrrJWFjwxkzug6Yb9djWQxuhSnxfAS0goVCt0uVyRi6DK3FbWwqC77sHaRKvQg00JWTqB9px68N1p3ZKPGkcf4mOoQfEpuFEOdtDyrNL3SytN9QlKPdt15H1ymdUopHI6tLd1CYXA4ZlXq833n8V36pgYQLEnusR5Kx8NQy_1kVb1WeoPvZDVEmj1ta0K_SnTwrLVwREiwJDsh3rtmX18JwEzolQMw812GM1GIseWnIUIFVqMJkQD0gyJnNHafqx9alzuzP0kJmjGpAvINGGSTq81Ghtj2iRvxnNVSu35zktn-RaZm6cDHRNEUxu5o4rK2qKmTFtGNwQydcXNFC6AImGRT2JdUh1s5SgzTsG_g%3D%3D)** The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – **who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race** – stays out of the race entirely.

The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised

[**HELP ME KEEP THIS A TWO-WAY RACE
CHIP IN $2 NOW**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cf1feca335c54a29811ab1f068aae24b&_e=QaFqeWYT7lZO4tfYYRFRaMnslU2zQ_frmkGfBO4vLwzTxrrJWFjwxkzug6Yb9djWQxuhSnxfAS0goVCt0uVyRi6DK3FbWwqC77sHaRKvQg00JWTqB9px68N1p3ZKPGkcf4mOoQfEpuFEOdtDyrNL3SytN9QlKPdt15H1ymdUopHI6tLd1CYXA4ZlXq833n8V36pgYQLEnusR5Kx8NQy_1kVb1WeoPvZDVEmj1ta0K_SnTwrLVwREiwJDsh3rtmX1_dedjDIL7IBhPKN2QP5R9ZkQQVN2dKnrmuUM4XGo3jDG-X0QIAIG5MI4Zbaf_FKk1jR8NTVTxsauYMe4zlek7diEYunU_r1NSpXyxLoXB0HyYcG0B9LP2F9py5DX5uw3-ApU0gqNmS4i42zJle8D8w%3D%3D)
We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat. However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... (see graphic below) Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race – stays out of the race entirely. The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. | | There’s still time for some of the 191,000 voters impacted by Brad Raffensperger’s voter purge to save their registrations, so the exact results of this purge are still unknown — and we’ll be sure to update you as soon as we can. But what we do know is that this community fought back and helped Georgia voters keep their registrations. Thanks to Fair Fight activists all around the country chipping in to our Prevent the Purge Fund, we were able to reach voters at risk of losing their registrations and help ensure they stay registered. Through texts and phone calls, we contacted **49,266** impacted voters. We’re so proud of the work we were able to accomplish with the support of this community. As you can tell, Georgia Republicans are scared of the power that voters hold. So Fair Fight will continue to be here — ensuring that voters can cast a ballot, have that ballot be counted, and make their voices heard. Thank you for for protecting democracy here in Georgia, Lila Z.
Deputy Organizing Director, Fair Fight
* * *
_P.S._ — As we get closer to the 2024 elections, we need to be ready for any other voter suppression attempts. name: Team WFP
subject: Abortion is on the ballot this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter — Last week, Ohio held what Republicans were counting on to be a sleepy, low-turnout special election. It was anything but. Voters turned out by the millions to loudly reject a Republican proposal to raise the threshold needed to enshrine abortion rights in the Ohio state constitution later this year. But this isn’t just happening in Ohio, Peter. **Ever since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ last year, a growing coalition of voters has responded in force — by turning out in red, blue, and purple states alike to defeat anti-abortion Republicans and stand up for abortion rights.**1 They thought overturning _Roe_ would be the end of the story for abortion rights. Together, we’re showing that this story is far from over. **[Let’s keep on showing anti-abortion Republicans who the real majority is in this country. Chip in $10 now to help mobilize voters and win crucial victories for abortion rights this fall in Ohio, Virginia, and across the country.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8K0dbBY9TeigKkzDJJFoW2oxPPnKrM7loI_3cGfkt0Op2s-SPM23h4V80GgGVBa79OYtaBzIliluZbDQjLxRPkG5dp3Ow8gYetZ_H9U9ZSdaIG_M5WaGaEHAgBLS32oT3hR_V00ombdNnOO5h2x6w70yA9OM5FQZp7wAq_DlBtaPT95hgsSfsby8RmUuXjTEUoLSTbwq4wf8WvvJJlgyDmrMZtWtIyfE_n-tSmGKuS4xX0cIAKmT6Vi18G2Ye1S9Hng4aN6xWY_LLyCcX_3DXxOjVM7N_fv6EoRvwIPotD7B7JQCRp8_gkmzvrDKAJNt7J28rREwjFROTdfg3mjQKDExLyrXtZjWBAntu-yNGd6UYdt6P2cMc1tA-euARkl0hzxCyDcliuOlxaT75ofd6Sys5-bw_fWuwxe260ke4b4/3ys/x-_xpgw0QxSQGlJm_X6kRg/h0/68_O6m55Tm878KwX1bSFua4ROSpi9a5echizBPX6pYA)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8K0dbBY9TeigKkzDJJFoW2oxPPnKrM7loI_3cGfkt0Ot0IBQrqsGrFalKoWUpnqWRP7esoZD2RqgZdcMjjc3CvDTR-RTyrXKZq1GX8SNyZNhh4vNenr8F3LIcDtLgOuXc-UH7D9T4FElUhuq1qYtjQTzSnVSwYpnI-Cy6Cl3en7aj0-bgpKjaUmSDdEIv6JNnMGNUgQyfFTUJlEBtCjtKQDEnMOssv5gBKgabMP-volKxuOHjH3DO577R4nKugrOTTokqY8Igk10OsQikt2lKtUBkj6DZlFPNms4NeguCZ2IIBay5NmfVyJMAykiUeNxXGFztK6iv3dFqvRxBmPek440w0v0X4Y4RJPmeJDdH9lecRI7vKTHgDlMoiiRbGjUJnGuykqlfBcB9SkcXsHPMYPBHyqBD_ZOGneAqzGR7oA/3ys/x-_xpgw0QxSQGlJm_X6kRg/h1/bZKO9WVNmgPL5q7FIpnwG3QwIK9UcTmA82uBuNq8sgQ)** Thanks to the defeat of Issue 1 in Ohio last week, voters have a real chance to make Ohio the fourth state in U.S. history to enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution this November. clean_body: | | | Peter — Last week, Ohio held what Republicans were counting on to be a sleepy, low-turnout special election. It was anything but. Voters turned out by the millions to loudly reject a Republican proposal to raise the threshold needed to enshrine abortion rights in the Ohio state constitution later this year. But this isn’t just happening in Ohio, Peter. Ever since the overturning of Roe v. Wade last year, a growing coalition of voters has responded in force — by turning out in red, blue, and purple states alike to defeat anti-abortion Republicans and stand up for abortion rights.1 They thought overturning Roe would be the end of the story for abortion rights. Together, we’re showing that this story is far from over. Thanks to the defeat of Issue 1 in Ohio last week, voters have a real chance to make Ohio the fourth state in U.S. history to enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution this November. In Virginia, elections this November will decide whether Republicans can gain a trifecta in state government and pass a statewide abortion ban. And across the country, Republican candidates are gearing up to try and win the House, Senate, and White House in 2024 — and falling over themselves to promise their extremist base that they will pass a national abortion ban if they do. Peter, the costs since the Supreme Court overturned Roe have been severe. At least 25 states have banned or restricted access to abortion over the past year.2 Doctors believe that maternal health and mortality has significantly worsened as a result.3 Over the past year, anti-abortion extremists got what they had worked decades for with the overturning of Roe and the bans passed by Republican state legislatures in its wake. They never cared about winning popular support for massively unpopular bans — because they thought they had the power to impose them on us. That’s why we need to keep on reminding them who really holds the power. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , PBS, August 9, 2023/p> 2\. , Center for Reproductive Rights 3\. , ABC News, June 21, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Our democracy isn’t for sale.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68181467/422211522/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_desk_of_andrei&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmMDZlMWItNGQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nlbyBTIIxLoqIqnsPou3nH17vdpkHlD710lL0sekS8M=) Team –

I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs – I hope you’ll let me explain why, but [**if you’re already with me, you can chip in now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68181468/422211523/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b1_ac_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmMDZlMWItNGQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nlbyBTIIxLoqIqnsPou3nH17vdpkHlD710lL0sekS8M=)

I believe our democracy shouldn’t be for sale, but my opponent, David Schweikert, doesn’t seem to agree. **Schweikert has taken over $1 million from corporate PACs during this career. And those companies seem to have gotten their money’s worth from him.**

He took over $500,000 from financial industry PACs and then voted to gut Wall Street reform, strip consumers of their right to sue when banks deceived them and dismantle the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

Schweikert also abused taxpayer and donor money for personal gain. Last year, he was fined $125,000 by the Federal Elections Commission for “knowing and willful” campaign finance violations. And then, he and his staff attempted to “conceal the true purpose of certain disbursements” by submitting false information to the federal government.

**David Schweikert makes it painfully clear: corporate PAC money corrupts.**

The people of Arizona’s 1st Congressional District deserve a representative who will take on powerful interests when they prey on everyday people, not someone doing the bidding of corporate donors.

I’m running for Congress to represent Arizonans, not corporations. That’s why I refuse to accept donations from their corporate PACs and why I’ll always be transparent with you. But I can’t do this alone – I need your help.

[**Can I count on you to donate $3, $30, or more to our campaign today? It’s going to take all of us stepping up and chipping in what we can afford to beat Schweikert and his corporate PAC allies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68181469/422211524/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b1_ac_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmMDZlMWItNGQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nlbyBTIIxLoqIqnsPou3nH17vdpkHlD710lL0sekS8M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68181470/422211525/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b1_ac_all&amount=3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmMDZlMWItNGQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nlbyBTIIxLoqIqnsPou3nH17vdpkHlD710lL0sekS8M=) | [$30 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68181471/422211526/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b1_ac_all&amount=30&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmMDZlMWItNGQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nlbyBTIIxLoqIqnsPou3nH17vdpkHlD710lL0sekS8M=)

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift
body:
In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2c1d62e07ebc4ecf92d582ad0051df07&_t=w6KpBbMv4Pqi2KsngSogAZ50_7U68kbRuGf4a2ek9ApzrrFbKKpEKD-nBzsz_pFQRNPQR0gSmjcSD5XWxrwVYrNPp2ziO7VgKxi0qN36xNs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2c1d62e07ebc4ecf92d582ad0051df07&_t=w6KpBbMv4Pqi2KsngSogAZ50_7U68kbRuGf4a2ek9ApzrrFbKKpEKD-nBzsz_pFQRNPQR0gSmjcSD5XWxrwVYrNPp2ziO7VgKxi0qN36xNs%3D)

| | |
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Fellow American, our message is working.

Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose.

That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment.

**This is our chance, Fellow American.** I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track.

Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. I've invested my own money in this race because I believe America is on the brink and we must do something TODAY to change course.

We don't have 20 years left. Some stand for incremental reform - I stand for revolution.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

BREAKING: A left-wing prosecutor has unlawfully indicted me

BREAKING: A left-wing prosecutor has unlawfully indicted me
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ad3510c654d4888aa533964a3e97d96&_e=clTNo9RZ7heI3JKkg5bxWJNdajPCv_RsE7zrHt6cmQ7cZR072f2voQZRqZR_6I7eVsSDi4Bn2DHjSNVT-AVUrwuwgp__h4V-fmnWVXm_WKsjbNVi2Y4yGcaMsGIdKHixz5CGpkVE-gARIpc2ryWaGDh-vWN0gbRQata6TQ4JzAaXKt5Y2Ti4BiJkQeMotJ3EjMM9rl0L8zN6G3W-c-9DGqx3utLIqs3Q0_JGCXzClEHa5yGuEy4RTjB2ScmtWImqUKbVY6L1Wi8aT2EX7PGPYzvGXLh_OAknCzawU3f2exTORVGg4ZoMyI5LDFufqy9lZ4ZYRRPtQuqlhxugpCZzXMUV2P80OFvFTnB5OKMgV4jvYj5mWIJOwtZ64pKRK9zNK27blCpJ-gaqZSa23iBunyZCsoId0PCHEyfMWonZkd2T94z4gysXpLgkxeQrGwdAOS4pXfACcSmymLtxZpMnUhWHI63NGrX8PmbPi6vJY0c%3D)

Friend,
Justice and the rule of law are officially DEAD in America.
A left-wing prosecutor - _with such extreme anti-Trump bias that EVEN CNN questioned her legitimacy _- has **INDICTED** me despite having committed NO CRIME.
This marks the **FOURTH ACT** of Election Interference on behalf of the Democrats in an attempt to keep the White House under Crooked Joe's control and **_JAIL_** his single greatest opponent of the 2024 election.
_**Let me remind you that just days before I announced my 2024 presidential campaign** , **Crooked Joe declared on national TV that serious efforts would be taken to stop me from being able to "take power" again.**_
We're watching those efforts unfold as Crooked Joe's henchmen follow their boss' orders by targeting me in baseless witch hunts in an attempt to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.
The left-wing prosecutor orchestrating this latest witch hunt for Crooked Joe was caught "intermix[ing] her political fortunes with this case."
_**Her bias was so terrible that she had to be REMOVED from one part of the case because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation.**_
But it's not just the prosecutor...
...The FOREPERSON of the GRAND JURY broke a veil of secrecy by going on a media tour with the Fake News, _GIGGLING_ on TV about the idea of serving me with a subpoena and unjustly robbing me of my liberty.
She said it would be "awesome" to have the power to swear me in, and teased possible indictments as if it were a movie trailer.
**Even the Fake News called her media circus show a "HORRIBLE IDEA" and a "prosecutor's nightmare."**
Our once free Republic where citizens were presumed innocent until proven guilty is gone.
In its place is a Marxist Third World dictatorship led by an incompetent yet crooked tyrant who tries to place your fate in the hands of vengeful and corrupt prosecutors.
_Communism has finally reached America 's shores._
But while these certainly are dark times for our country, I will NEVER give up on America.
The more I see these rogue prosecutors weaponize our legal system to criminalize dissent and imprison their political opponents, the _stronger_ my resolve to save our country.
Because I know that if these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not end with me... They'll come for YOU.
America is the greatest nation in history - and I WILL **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to these radical tyrants who seek to destroy it.
**Even after _4_ sham indictments and a threat of HUNDREDS OF YEARS IN PRISON, I will never abandon our mission, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you are doing poorly right now due to the very sinister people who are ripping our country to shreds, then just hit the back button and go about your day. I seriously mean it! _
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenter_url%%
