If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Ye3YuQWT8n2A-dXPmUXsRzTUeWYGEDuoLJ4SDwlMNR4AXlptLKgoFkO8o58TeMPkdxbp_yxoCDfItW9O_fE-3jMrOF0bmLMonO2ZeOcB2tDSYmen3-VcVbtCpnboEXY_T7KCNaCIRExCpG4lnfXqjpIEhBC2RCPHk6AiwRHlHefIyPUTOZgU5IbbOvrYXqe2wOHH2Q47c0JyP89HJHh0iZXeqWgy43lkL--lW7epRIawBQJzRGEQKtgZLqw3hNSdKK3_6HLSvQwz7SfO6Ny7KrhZrubY9EmlCNvrTfItj19HO9mBGeuFxvbZobrqBQoqG55BURqcKkOI7ZbDZpUlig/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h0/AH_eQd54PwE7xV6rAFezDKLDpOnVdNikeEdkWpHDtcI) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCFq6KlB5ukuUES0_RCBq_K3oYiDmPkIUv6_HJR3cFELJ-X50-8e0sgQdFyLVdhdybyMZBtU-Gju72Qc0icbdP-wcauz4yxEUQBp2jYLyCADHAJVHK5wklCBWNNnHHAnn6i_SVv3-RtORnW8dvM112hWsyDWDtL4rP627So9jMLGr97RqO4hBxLnqPf7iaPL00jRtJBJABQdxC_vHdwR6XLozPtvJwIk8ftCgwrnXOQ2DE8z0P2FRHbD-Yrd8jXtrUeVu_6Fyx4vydGRGpjBzZLllOln3YK2hOGKwoNz0V2V3gf1_jMTmXP_SZYGbXYgb9gpExdSm0LeGZavL9sdd89yUEHmRIDaWb_Z9BX-Clodo6MquNKklffwCUBkS8ISdASeYG8xtI9xV7pannkCHyX4ldG54Ol8q7JMODd3Sjow/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h1/NQtFEp_L9FxQoYibRtTupLWWinloDeK3S4R1vn29Ex8) Hi there, Peter. It’s Quentin James and Stefanie Brown James, co-founders of The Collective PAC. We’re reaching out today with an exciting announcement:

**We’re launching our Down-Ballot Candidate Fund!**

**The goal: raising $100,000 before September 21 to ensure that all of our endorsed candidates have the resources they need to compete in the November elections.**

We started our **Down-Ballot Candidate Fund** because our mission to build Black political power does not end with candidates at the top of the ticket. All of our candidates are putting in the work to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power.

[Focusing on local elections is KEY to addressing the underrepresentation of the Black community in elected offices. Can you become a Founding Member of our Down-Ballot Candidate Fund and contribute $10 to support all of our endorsed candidates? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCFq6KlB5ukuUES0_RCBq_K3oYiDmPkIUv6_HJR3cFELJ-X50-8e0sgQdFyLVdhdybyMZBtU-Gju72Qc0icbdP-wcauz4yxEUQBp2jYLyCADHAJVHK5wklCBWNNnHHAnn6i_SVv3-RtORnW8dvM112xA_hv1TmvrkRFaml4ECTacbvHAU8iAypOAueU4q20MzhcKdRlpCeYqLsRDAI3MpG7AnO1SvSKZaKa4MKfeVfwvmxPkiQIuElkU1sJtVjB6hwnMC6FGSbbgcuHHnyu1UNATLAe_2RIEO66ns-MjwTNwUOE9AuAdiQNUy8KvetPreZn8tO_BAMpJrtf6LSiSot_GDf1RCAGoFHC6X_4cBAc080V-k4qkqiG9IQ_uSAZgyek2otPGE_kp0COtCCIlmEli17fbV0iBOUUauusa_WGg/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h2/cPZk-Z3IMG8jF0nKoNexKSEN9g1QtHaiuE-B15BJoig) [ ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCFq6KlB5ukuUES0_RCBq_K3oYiDmPkIUv6_HJR3cFELJ-X50-8e0sgQdFyLVdhdybyMZBtU-Gju72Qc0icbdP-wcauz4yxEUQBp2jYLyCADHAJVHK5wklCBWNNnHHAnn6i_SVv3-RtORnW8dvM112Uvu8WDa2Pd8pi0cKPPBrNh_c-VigA3kskWvsVJchwPBHJGGly6cQnq25nj7yH4UXfnkKYefti4_iTw-WTdZ0NCHOC7cbDHvNizM2w_XmWfjGg2e9zjjpjBDG0ascPa56xvuyESczlnVVvOGjm89kV15x3K11Zlb8RDicHe68MPwUN_4UocoOW2o9OurqDm7l1gGCV-YtNVcmE-A_ZBUildsphjA7F6RQI0T4efa_Fvcyrha-CaK6mHOqbuR2q0SR35ov9ohWjL82WnYULelqIg/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h3/-AtH6yKbjmjXzzbUt_bCcB_b6o1xfPdmKN9zGako9pE) **Local offices make decisions that heavily affect our daily lives** , and when those positions are filled with politicians that don’t belong to the communities they’re representing, our government fails its people.

That’s why we’ve put local races at the forefront of our work this year, endorsing candidates all across the country. Now they’re entering the final stretch of their elections, and they need our help to get across the finish line.

[Become a Founding Member TODAY and make a difference in local races across the country by chipping in $10 >> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCFq6KlB5ukuUES0_RCBq_K3oYiDmPkIUv6_HJR3cFELJ-X50-8e0sgQdFyLVdhdybyMZBtU-Gju72Qc0icbdP-wcauz4yxEUQBp2jYLyCADHAJVHK5wklCBWNNnHHAnn6i_SVv3-RtORnW8dvM112KprQtAQigFaVFaOHKx8wGjcFMdenOQCi-W9BP2trqgqWR8lv5oxDmm63KFoWiG82Mlo_0FXdB4Mwe8-BTrF5Y6mXoTQV_4k2w_P66pjW89nYSZUpryZGf36WrffaLhds2q77PdMdqo1yEpydBj4vPYf90AF60fF4YVuXaYmJ4dybPB-Heh3Bb9I0te0OGnKSV4wb8PvvqFr8qyW4MvmWoqlpElEucqbbQViprSkMU_9jEyUKYCbf0jzGESls01gecW7C4Y2vIJQgo7MhI6vF9w/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h4/SLugu-7dNGtWGpxgHW8WeOSlQqea6PxYK7H9bU78m_k) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed.

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLj7EQECgYulEKSIDIQLY-Wg7T8wu1VeYPf-hcn8Dqp5uPN5MUOyiQ2zr4mTwPzdtPu0vCFsWD3S_m0TVccHfRp7-ezxp3FGotM1XINEcEaOVnqwxCnIY4OvVdkfuqVRKuoB_4uzEF_Y-nV3FI7CucSb4-cf1swS4_qikKZjafudT6jBaiDy5Uh1zEo4_5rfQv9KPrT9cyNGHOZlMMcc9HthTdI5xqZyiXoMtbTLV5dL8YVZ68MOHnL5wpLMrVEJUP_YqZ-QotXe_B5L7t-4V36ib5LVdMl5kdEzZH59az2HKCaKh2s4xppR_AbXrkLUHLlvT7HLy4nhvuSkIIwRFecp/3ys/Z4koWiWUQNujqQaevRw4uw/h11/ClP3D3Xqzx-lZ7fwEw-kA-f7kzn6Xc0zM5H8K0aCaeQ) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hi there, Peter. It’s Quentin James and Stefanie Brown James, co-founders of The Collective PAC. We’re reaching out today with an exciting announcement: We’re launching our Down-Ballot Candidate Fund! The goal: raising $100,000 before September 21 to ensure that all of our endorsed candidates have the resources they need to compete in the November elections. We started our Down-Ballot Candidate Fund because our mission to build Black political power does not end with candidates at the top of the ticket. All of our candidates are putting in the work to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power. Local offices make decisions that heavily affect our daily lives , and when those positions are filled with politicians that don’t belong to the communities they’re representing, our government fails its people. That’s why we’ve put local races at the forefront of our work this year, endorsing candidates all across the country. Now they’re entering the final stretch of their elections, and they need our help to get across the finish line. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Quentin & Stefanie The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lynn Peterson
subject: I’ll always stand strong and fight to protect our environment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68184065/422220393/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcwNWM1MS01MTNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-ltT2U3oO3qpIxUxx8P1_rsZKTwK6HsYkveld1UVgE=&emci=afe566d7-4d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f9705c51-513c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter, **A year ago today, the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law!** As a transportation engineer and long-time advocate for cleaner and energy-efficient infrastructure, I was excited to see this bill become a reality. **It represents America's largest-ever legislative effort to fight climate change — by making historic investments to upgrade energy grids, reduce carbon emissions, and expand our use of electric vehicles.** We're seeing these investments show up in communities across Oregon. I want to ensure that we take full advantage of clean energy tax credits and help _all_ Americans lower costs. Fossil fuel companies fought tooth and nail to keep this historic legislation from becoming law – and it almost worked. Thankfully, Oregonians had strong leaders willing to stand up for our planet. **The Inflation Reduction Act is a game-changer, and that's exactly why I'm running for Congress – to keep building this momentum.** You can count on me to stand firm against greedy polluters. I'm all in for ramping up clean energy and boosting our infrastructure policies. **Congress can and must do more.** Together we can build on the progress of the Inflation Reduction Act and lower costs while also preserving our planet for future generations. More soon, _Lynn_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... **(see graphic below)**

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f4e889896a1c49bf8462798e4c57cc64&_e=Yt4ET5ktRSArrBFK4pqLMdyGiAq3Kst3Cam9z9qnKu_v89as2tAZoXy3dypoQDu0LAwE8sLAlac0dRoBgNGm72RfeKHGgLNgVQpvHwYm7daSWS6LuSXZo0W3W9WwTyBiWUCQVQLUIHajoY-CdTDJbeuWAjE4xh-j4pk9EIWOdFa5MHxzt_gG6lQ8YGhJ9oq9FemE2D64lCnxNhIyykzJuGDYNh7YxJHurvrfChOia2xP6Zux0GlUQfDYRgEQ5Y4hPKbqhtiqjj58cD8sjrTJ_VDJv8lNBOUsAALsPSyUfObP6-nyGASB1_SuKhdNZqm7Qgov5oLAWNnKdv9xFmKdkEPI1TUaLWWYAJulDRBN1c22yJDVSkc371uIEvr7mbxUxiOoAPapMvdzCmQNXEjYHA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: **[Will you donate $2 right now?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f4e889896a1c49bf8462798e4c57cc64&_e=Yt4ET5ktRSArrBFK4pqLMdyGiAq3Kst3Cam9z9qnKu_v89as2tAZoXy3dypoQDu0LAwE8sLAlac0dRoBgNGm72RfeKHGgLNgVQpvHwYm7daSWS6LuSXZo0W3W9WwTyBiWUCQVQLUIHajoY-CdTDJbeuWAjE4xh-j4pk9EIWOdFa5MHxzt_gG6lQ8YGhJ9oq9FemE2D64lCnxNhIyykzJuGDYNh7YxJHurvrfChOia2xP6Zux0GlUQfDYRgEQ5Y4h6PbWP1VKTAjJ5g58GxCJ9jdCJW6vSIjrjJzI468INkt3D56cjUODzOEtvPYIhuvb-1fcMEKXjI-e9d_9a_CxXR_xxVC6pQDUm4fcDwoDfoDmw-zUuxnf4Ia4Ni7WIJHt81Eq2rb_rtfbnnX-0nqrUA%3D%3D)** The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – **who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race** – stays out of the race entirely.

The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised

[**HELP ME KEEP THIS A TWO-WAY RACE
CHIP IN $2 NOW**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f4e889896a1c49bf8462798e4c57cc64&_e=Yt4ET5ktRSArrBFK4pqLMdyGiAq3Kst3Cam9z9qnKu_v89as2tAZoXy3dypoQDu0LAwE8sLAlac0dRoBgNGm72RfeKHGgLNgVQpvHwYm7daSWS6LuSXZo0W3W9WwTyBiWUCQVQLUIHajoY-CdTDJbeuWAjE4xh-j4pk9EIWOdFa5MHxzt_gG6lQ8YGhJ9oq9FemE2D64lCnxNhIyykzJuGDYNh7YxJHurvrfChOia2xP6Zux0GlUQfDYRgEQ5Y4hTTRWqQTbNYV2z1Ya3wXskSbed7DlSRwZrqfKdaRo7Lc1VbXRO1PJaQ0aUqadHy-1BGrcHyIdG4dD1Lj6jI7qYGI1Zvbdj-4jrGcp863CLckkuVtaIDmJ_59BvfrD4QNtdlHmej4nZDIsTY3DwG3DYw%3D%3D)
We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race.

**Let me be abundantly clear:** that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans.

**[Please chip in $2](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f4e889896a1c49bf8462798e4c57cc64&_e=Yt4ET5ktRSArrBFK4pqLMdyGiAq3Kst3Cam9z9qnKu_v89as2tAZoXy3dypoQDu0LAwE8sLAlac0dRoBgNGm72RfeKHGgLNgVQpvHwYm7daSWS6LuSXZo0W3W9WwTyBiWUCQVQLUIHajoY-CdTDJbeuWAjE4xh-j4pk9EIWOdFa5MHxzt_gG6lQ8YGhJ9oq9FemE2D64lCnxNhIyykzJuGDYNh7YxJHurvrfChOia2xP6Zux0GlUQfDYRgEQ5Y4hhDrL-NmH7bleSVmFxQ0IsIa00HjLOd2InsRJAMLiMBnSiHJkrxyvsyJ3IAUhmNsQFbMATJLFJ3N2RfJKDPytZBzEoU8XZyHb8JsyCTqEgl3sX6QAHKlxNTd7wxf0auC3qUXVDhhjdmg3Vaj7qjuBUg%3D%3D) **right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat. However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... (see graphic below) Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race – stays out of the race entirely. The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race. Let me be abundantly clear: that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans. right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. I promise you it will be the best $2 you spend all year. Respectfully, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

Ever heard the saying, "good things come in small packages?"

Well, it's certainly true for the latest breakthrough in hearing tech: a device that packs an extraordinary amount of power into a truly tiny design.

Two years ago, our engineers unveiled the virtually invisible Horizon hearing aids and it quickly became a best-seller. Now, they're back with yet another innovation--Horizon AX--and experts are calling it**the biggest upgrade in sound and speech clarity the industry has ever seen.**
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FPLlpXPhL%2fkr075rjy6fkQ&sysid=1)
**The big upgrade:** Horizon AX has the world's first-ever dual processing system, meaning it has not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips. And with double the power comes double the clarity...
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664834%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K8cf2%2fKtpeqay5Il%2f0YjoA&sysid=1)
You might be a good candidate for the Horizon AX if you meet the following criteria:

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FPLlpXPhL%2fkr075rjy6fkQ&sysid=1) | • 50 years or older

name: Ron Wyden
subject: A year later, delivering for American families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185363/422225011/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjQ0ODg4My01NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ryh8MJM0YFVSX4juu3Xs-hRxp_U9vwP6Xt9Ir12GlM=&emci=5dd1620f-6838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c6448883-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **One year ago this week, after decades of hard work, the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law.** I remain extremely proud of this groundbreaking legislation and the role I played in securing key priorities for American families and workers. The Inflation Reduction Act was a once-in-a-generation investment in securing our nation's clean energy future and bringing down drug costs for seniors. In the months since its passage, we've seen countless headlines about the resurgence of domestic manufacturing, investment in clean technology, and creation of good-paying red, white, and blue jobs. **Simply put, the Inflation Reduction Act is delivering for American families and workers.** But this historic win didn't happen overnight or by accident. When climate efforts in the Senate stalled, I stuck with it. As Chairman of the Senate Finance Committee, I shed light on how the drug pricing system is broken from top to bottom. And every time a billionaire bragged about not paying their fair share, I proposed real solutions. **But I didn't win these fights alone. I've always said progress starts at the grassroots and works its way up. It's because of the strength and commitment of our grassroots movement – and your role in it – that these victories came to be.** You know as well as I do that while these victories are a huge step in the right direction, there's more work to be done. That's why I'm continuing the fight for progress on everything from reproductive rights, to data privacy, affordable housing, and so much more. We've seen what's possible with a Democratic majority in the Senate, and it's never been more important that we continue to build on that work. **That starts with protecting and expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate and making sure Republicans don't return to power.** [**So I'm asking, will you join me in the fight to expand our Senate majority with a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185364/422225012/-2044921950?refcode=2023-08-16-ira&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c6448883-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjQ0ODg4My01NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ryh8MJM0YFVSX4juu3Xs-hRxp_U9vwP6Xt9Ir12GlM=) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | One year ago this week, after decades of hard work, the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law. I remain extremely proud of this groundbreaking legislation and the role I played in securing key priorities for American families and workers. The Inflation Reduction Act was a once-in-a-generation investment in securing our nation's clean energy future and bringing down drug costs for seniors. In the months since its passage, we've seen countless headlines about the resurgence of domestic manufacturing, investment in clean technology, and creation of good-paying red, white, and blue jobs. Simply put, the Inflation Reduction Act is delivering for American families and workers. But this historic win didn't happen overnight or by accident. When climate efforts in the Senate stalled, I stuck with it. As Chairman of the Senate Finance Committee, I shed light on how the drug pricing system is broken from top to bottom. And every time a billionaire bragged about not paying their fair share, I proposed real solutions. But I didn't win these fights alone. I've always said progress starts at the grassroots and works its way up. It's because of the strength and commitment of our grassroots movement – and your role in it – that these victories came to be. You know as well as I do that while these victories are a huge step in the right direction, there's more work to be done. That's why I'm continuing the fight for progress on everything from reproductive rights, to data privacy, affordable housing, and so much more. We've seen what's possible with a Democratic majority in the Senate, and it's never been more important that we continue to build on that work. That starts with protecting and expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate and making sure Republicans don't return to power. = More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Sen. Ron Wyden
subject: I want to hear from you
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68185374/422225159/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDdmN2FmLTU0M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q8mf18ee-Cr1Za-mQ0jcKepqPD4N4IAcBnAQ7WfdL2E=&emci=87f9893e-513c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2e47f7af-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Today marks the one-year anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)–and its historic investments in climate action being signed into law. It included my Clean Energy for America Act – which for the first time, makes sure that the tax code rewards emissions reductions, and encourages the development of new clean energy technologies. This is permanent and one of the most consequential bills in my time in public service. This historic win for protecting our planet would never have happened without the power of people like you and organizations like OLCV. But there is more to be done on many issues to preserve and protect Oregon's environment, which is why I hope you will [join me](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68185375/422225160/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDdmN2FmLTU0M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q8mf18ee-Cr1Za-mQ0jcKepqPD4N4IAcBnAQ7WfdL2E=&emci=87f9893e-513c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2e47f7af-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) and OLCV members in discussing the environment during a virtual town hall on Tuesday, August 22nd at 2:00PM. We will have the chance to celebrate recent wins, get updates on climate investments from IRA, and hear the latest on efforts to protect our natural legacy and environment for future generations, including better protection of our clean air, water, and our public lands in Oregon. Even more, this town hall is about hearing from you on what environmental issue is critical to you. **WHAT:** OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden **WHEN:** Tuesday, August 22nd from 2:00 - 3:15 PM PT **WHERE:** Zoom – [**RSVP now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68185376/422225161/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDdmN2FmLTU0M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q8mf18ee-Cr1Za-mQ0jcKepqPD4N4IAcBnAQ7WfdL2E=&emci=87f9893e-513c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2e47f7af-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The updated River Democracy Act came about after directly hearing from Oregonians across our state about what was important to them at meetings like this one, so I’m looking forward to hearing from you next week and finding out what we can work on together next. [**RSVP today and submit your question, idea, or comment for me!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68185377/422225162/1199808482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDdmN2FmLTU0M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q8mf18ee-Cr1Za-mQ0jcKepqPD4N4IAcBnAQ7WfdL2E=&emci=87f9893e-513c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2e47f7af-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) I hope you’ll join me and let me hear from you! Yours,
Ron Wyden
US Senator of Oregon |

Teammates, One of my proudest accomplishments this year is creating a first-of-its-kind paid year of service for high school grads in Maryland. **And on Monday, we announced the launch of applications for our first service class. ([Applications are due September 1st. Go to Serving.MD.gov to apply.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185418/422225351/-522138729?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2YxZWZkMi01NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=noUEmRGugG5JR07h9nltJ7iwLa_irzciP23uiZckuy4=&emci=5f8e3479-973b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97f1efd2-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485))** This is a passion project for me because I am living proof of the power of service. My journey to the governor's office was paved by individuals who believed in me and pushed me. I'm committed to now paying that service forward. This generation of young people is facing unprecedented challenges – from gun violence to climate change to growing economic inequality. And while we are doing everything in our power to address these challenges from Annapolis, these policies cannot feed the souls of young people. But service can. Service gives you purpose. Service allows you to explore your talents. Service shows you the power of community and collective action rather than individualism. **Service will save us.** So, please, help spread the word to any Marylanders you know who are 18 to 21 years old. We have hundreds of opportunities available to earn a living wage and experience the power of service. [They just need to go to Serving.MD.gov to apply.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185419/422225352/-522138729?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2YxZWZkMi01NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=noUEmRGugG5JR07h9nltJ7iwLa_irzciP23uiZckuy4=&emci=5f8e3479-973b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97f1efd2-543c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
Elevate, Wes
P.S. My path to the governor's office was also paved by lots of people pitching in a little bit – and together, it all added up. [If you're proud of the work we're doing in Annapolis, I'm asking you to pitch in a little bit ($5, $10, $20) to keep it going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185420/422225353/-2109446099?refcode=EM_FL_WES_20230816_na_service_cand_mf_90da_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2YxZWZkMi01NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=noUEmRGugG5JR07h9nltJ7iwLa_irzciP23uiZckuy4=)

name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: We need President Biden to know we have his back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
In 6 days, Republicans are holding their first primary debate in Milwaukee. That’s no accident. In 2020, Biden only won Wisconsin by 0.63% — just over 20,000 votes.
It’s no secret why Republicans are choosing to have their very first debate in our state. Wisconsin will be critical in deciding who will win the presidency next year.
But that's not all. Next year Republicans are holding their national convention in Milwaukee too, and this is just the beginning of their aggressive campaign to win Wisconsin.
Republicans have made it crystal clear: Wisconsin will be the #1 battleground state.
[**So can you please rush a $5 contribution split between the Biden-Harris reelection campaign and The Long Run so we can continue to support President Biden in his fight to win Wisconsin?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230816-1-t2&t=1&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, your contribution will be split between Joe Biden and The Long Run instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.6LeeZQ&amount=5&refcode=em230816-1-t2&t=2&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)**
---
****
| **[OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.6LeeZQ&refcode=em230816-1-t2&t=3&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)**
---
****
President Biden visited Wisconsin yesterday to discuss his economic plan and priorities to strengthen our economy.
It’s clear — his plan is working. Wisconsin has seen over 100,000 new jobs, and companies have committed to invest over $4 billion in Wisconsin since President Biden took office. President Biden’s infrastructure plan allocated $2.9 billion to bettering Wisconsin — including access to clean drinking water and high-speed internet.
President Biden has made working families a priority, and we want him to know that we have his back as much as he has ours.
[**Will you please split a $5 contribution between the Biden campaign and The Long Run so we can help President Biden finish the job fighting for American families in the White House?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230816-1-t2&t=4&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)
We can’t risk having Trump, or any right-wing extremist, in office again. So please contribute today if you can.
\- The team at The Long Run
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230816-1-t2&t=5&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=4744_196590_d7dluS&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=9&akid=4744%2E196590%2Ed7dluS)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| Peter,

My name is Carly Choppin, and I am a new addition to Team Spanberger’s Fundraising Team. Here at Spanberger HQ, we are always crunching numbers, trying to do everything we can to fund Abigail’s efforts to deliver for Virginia. I am one of many who write to you to ask for help reaching our critical fundraising goals. **([_Speaking of which, can you donate $5 today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68185710/422226189/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230815-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ3MTc1MzctNTYzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GixwSEO9GmcLfs7piqfPJrI-YDgzUD83NO__tzpGP1o=))**

However, our number crunching is as much about money coming into our campaign as it is about how much money we spend. _What should our September goal be if we exceed our August goal? What if we don’t exceed our goal? How much can we spend to defend against attack ads this month?_ Halfway through the month is a significant turning point, an opportunity to check in and make sure our efforts are going to plan. _**We like to ensure Abigail always has the resources she needs to continue delivering for Virginians.**_

_**Today, we are on track to hit our August goal.**_ However, we have had a solid beginning of August; to meet our goal, we must have just as strong of a second half of August. clean_body: We like to ensure Abigail always has the resources she needs to continue delivering for Virginians. | = | Peter, My name is Carly Choppin, and I am a new addition to Team Spanberger’s Fundraising Team. Here at Spanberger HQ, we are always crunching numbers, trying to do everything we can to fund Abigail’s efforts to deliver for Virginia. I am one of many who write to you to ask for help reaching our critical fundraising goals. (=) However, our number crunching is as much about money coming into our campaign as it is about how much money we spend. What should our September goal be if we exceed our August goal? What if we don’t exceed our goal? How much can we spend to defend against attack ads this month? Halfway through the month is a significant turning point, an opportunity to check in and make sure our efforts are going to plan. We like to ensure Abigail always has the resources she needs to continue delivering for Virginians. Today, we are on track to hit our August goal. However, we have had a solid beginning of August; to meet our goal, we must have just as strong of a second half of August. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We are grateful to have such engaged supporters, Spanberger HQ * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Fellow American, As a loyal supporter of my campaign, I wanted to take the time today to reach out to you personally.
In just a few short years, Florida has gone from a swing state to a Republican stronghold, leading the nation in effective, principled governance based on fiscal and constitutional conservatism.
We’ve taken back our schools, driven ideological extremists out of our government, fought to secure our borders, and given Florida’s brave emergency personnel the support they need to keep Americans safe.
It is because of people like you that any of this was possible and for that, you have my sincere gratitude and respect.
However, out-of-state Democrats are terrified that Republicans’ successes in Florida will go national, which is why they intend to spend millions attacking the Florida delegation.

clean_body: | | | | Intended Recipient Only: Please do not forward this message or otherwise share Fellow American, As a loyal supporter of my campaign, I wanted to take the time today to reach out to you personally. In just a few short years, Florida has gone from a swing state to a Republican stronghold, leading the nation in effective, principled governance based on fiscal and constitutional conservatism. We’ve taken back our schools, driven ideological extremists out of our government, fought to secure our borders, and given Florida’s brave emergency personnel the support they need to keep Americans safe. It is because of people like you that any of this was possible and for that, you have my sincere gratitude and respect. However, out-of-state Democrats are terrified that Republicans’ successes in Florida will go national, which is why they intend to spend millions attacking the Florida delegation. As a sustaining member, you receive exclusive access to policy updates and events from my campaign, as well as an invitation to our monthly strategy call. | | | | | Thank you and welcome to the team, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 == \-

name: Marc Elias (via DLCC.org)
subject: Republicans have written the rules in their favor for far too long
body:

| Peter,

We wanted to take a moment to explain why your contribution today would mean so much to our campaign to elect Laura:
* **The election in November 2024 may seem far away,** but we need to hit the ground running early to build the foundation for a winning campaign.
* **Laura’s Republican deep-pocketed opponent Anthony D’Esposito** already has over $600,000 in his campaign war chest. We have to be prepared for the tough race ahead of us to flip this seat.
* **Our race is in the national spotlight** with political experts at Cook Political Report and Roll Call calling our race a ‘TOSS-UP.’ Your investment will help us build stronger momentum.

We rely on generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you.

clean_body: The election in November 2024 may seem far away, but we need to hit the ground running early to build the foundation for a winning campaign. | = | Peter, We wanted to take a moment to explain why your contribution today would mean so much to our campaign to elect Laura: The election in November 2024 may seem far away, but we need to hit the ground running early to build the foundation for a winning campaign. Laura’s Republican deep-pocketed opponent Anthony D’Esposito already has over $600,000 in his campaign war chest. We have to be prepared for the tough race ahead of us to flip this seat. Our race is in the national spotlight with political experts at Cook Political Report and Roll Call calling our race a ‘TOSS-UP.’ Your investment will help us build stronger momentum. We rely on generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you. name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Youth voters are the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Students are getting ready to head back to school.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68187723/422232990/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230816youth_N_KK_90DO_4_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzA2YTZiLTU4M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XLsCPH774DrW3zz473i50wiubOhDg8pZrEbsj7XDaBM=)
| Fellow activist,

As Pennsylvania youth are getting ready to return to school, it’s crucial we keep their civic engagement in mind. According to The Civics Center, low voter registration rates among 18-year-olds are found in the most populous areas of the Commonwealth. According to their findings, the overall voter registration rate for 18-year-olds in the collar counties of Philadelphia and the city itself is 17%. Additionally, school districts in Pittsburgh showed a 15% registration rate.

We cannot afford to sleep on the youth vote. According to _PoliticsPA_ , in the 2022 Pennsylvania elections, nearly 1 in 3 voters between the ages of 18-29 turned out to cast a ballot. However, we cannot take those numbers for granted, especially as we gear up for the General Election on November 7th.

It’s no secret: Low youth participation is **disastrous** for our democracy and young people alike. That’s why we center the youth (17-35) in our work and will be out on the ground conducting voter registration and civic education in several high schools, college campuses and universities all across Pennsylvania. Our staff speaks directly to students, listens to what they have to say, and ensures they have the information they need to make their voices heard to vote their values at the ballot box.

[**Centering and empowering young constituents is one of the New Pennsylvania Project’s top priorities. Will you chip in $25 right now to help us register young voters and ensure they have what they need to participate in our democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68187725/422232992/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230816youth_N_KK_90DO_4_NG_A_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzA2YTZiLTU4M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XLsCPH774DrW3zz473i50wiubOhDg8pZrEbsj7XDaBM=) Kansas is facing a new abortion battle. So it’s more important than ever that we have battle-tested leaders who are committed to standing up for our reproductive freedoms in office.

The KS GOP is once again out of step with working Kansans on this and other freedoms that are critical to our way of life. We’re up against 3 opponents who are held hostage by the Brownback agenda.

**Sharice will never back down against their attacks on our rights and freedom. Click the link below to support her in this tough race.**

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Do you support a 45¢ per gallon gas tax increase?
body:
Gretchen Whitmer’s hand-picked candidate for Congress does. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8%26ss_email_id%3D64dd06ce7537d078f278501d%26ss_campaign_name%3DDo%2Byou%2Bsupport%2Ba%2B45%25C2%25A2%2Bper%2Bgallon%2Bgas%2Btax%2Bincrease%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-08-16T17%253A27%253A55Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=ZhUq7FnkelOsZFYpbU27Ga4dcKs%3D)
---
| Gas prices are skyrocketing here in Michigan, reaching more than $4 per gallon in some areas according to AAA.
---
|
---
Michiganders are struggling to make ends meet and the high cost of gas, groceries, and every day needs continues to be a problem for each of us.In the Trump Administration, America was the #1 producer of oil in the world, and gas prices were at their lowest in years. The last three years, we’ve set all-time records for **highest gas prices in history**.
---
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fgasprices&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=hE0TidZpb_3UqYHqs4OQwIXJj6Q%3D)
---
| | | If my opponent had his way, we’d be paying even more! In fact, **he supports raising the state’s gas tax 45¢ per gallon** \- nearly $10 more - every time you fill up, exclaiming, [“I’m proud to support that plan.”](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mlive.com%2Fnews%2F2019%2F03%2Frepublican-lawmakers-wary-of-proposed-45-cent-gas-tax-hike-to-fix-roads.html&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=GzYQcJZS9StWLM1q2P0SPy8mPD4%3D) Michiganders are already paying too much at the pump, they don’t need even more taxes and even higher gas prices.
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fgasprices&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=hE0TidZpb_3UqYHqs4OQwIXJj6Q%3D)
---
I’m running for Congress to fight against career politicians who put their political agenda ahead of everyday families who are just trying to make ends meet.**I’m running against Gretchen Whitmer’s hand-picked candidate for Congress** , in fact, he was her chief lobbyist, pushing her agenda through in Lansing.But with the support of Whitmer, Senator Debbie Stabenow, and Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin - **he is going to have millions of special interest money behind him.** I’m relying on everyday taxpayers like you. People who love our country, work hard, and are trying to raise their kids in a safe community. The people the elites talk past when they pass laws that make it harder to make ends meet.Please [consider a small donation](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fgasprices&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=hE0TidZpb_3UqYHqs4OQwIXJj6Q%3D) to our campaign. Every dollar helps.
---
|
---
**Fun Fact:** The winner of this race will be Gretchen Whitmer’s congressman!
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fgasprices&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=hE0TidZpb_3UqYHqs4OQwIXJj6Q%3D)
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fbarrettbrigade%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=38HOF35Yb4ahW7qkT_Q4X60Q9ZY%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsquarespace&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=vc_bj2wtsoS4x3MQyW7nVuhynR0%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftomformichigan&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=Cik4T0Fr3lh_GjND_pwByYZCDg4%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64dd06ce7537d078f278501d&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64dcb2ac2af87064cc0ed7c8&l=en-US&s=OW1ylvkct1yd9dlMGhK6xLbDuAY%3D) | | [ ](mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com)

subject: SPOILER ALERT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat
[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=c44d00b365174b6482f040ee62cf934a&_t=PxWoLhBt8I1u0b2PfAg4Nf0R_VzS_OU_Mrl2fGfVWje3DUtHm2ps6BsQCswQhmKYGw8Oh_bCWmj3JzWmUz9icYR0rKytk3ZWP4I1Hr-Yr7U%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=c44d00b365174b6482f040ee62cf934a&_t=PxWoLhBt8I1u0b2PfAg4Nf0R_VzS_OU_Mrl2fGfVWje3DUtHm2ps6BsQCswQhmKYGw8Oh_bCWmj3JzWmUz9icYR0rKytk3ZWP4I1Hr-Yr7U%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c44d00b365174b6482f040ee62cf934a&_e=Vf8ClNRqetBNyKw15lYGWOdh6n9aXcn4d4CK0FDMrpOp3nfPZIZXPcSivB39wB7zvX5no7YI_7RLGcaemzj6Yn2QLqaMQqB_SCMOpBOZdwn79I3lwYsX94s-kxOgILix4lhuXmXfwE96SGUoYl0jfqzuSF4yedRUbjtLH-luUNvTH2hExLB3B2DDRS_ndx9f4RdgYArLg_UXXQ3h9bGCDx6ixfola9ItxMJ_q-THOZqFkcIurk3lqdb2lFSvgqCRG5hXvGFm4zzddhclw5PUBIEpPzvlQOlhxGX7g3lNMO1TIpbzbWdQ5ZlYaR4Crs5UGSuUcwQBd0cbC3rkPmfiL4PExtPh3vkWc4CmYK2k0PtZ6wMuJCkWN6AmAbc9Vbrbpi5qc8vtBD6kIfvLXTCc0Q%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reading the Bible with Fresh Eyes
body:
In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis

I'd like to invite you to join me in Hillsdale College's newest free course studying the greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century, C.S. Lewis.
| | |
---
| | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=153fc80b1eb048bcb05f9dc842c5fee2&_e=f4NvairE4X-XiWIc7FbthOxKECBjTGLmCLrDNSlB1bJiHRIAL_yprrQNMtLi26MXUhdqRdWo8dHzhTYaMrBIr6sMi06RZ7tmoh6QZkizjFnbUyOCG8m19LdVKhBOplra8EwngRm61G0Do9EZR-LGHg2LCrKDHPKxWX627oWJTLm5NmRR7Ek_iDoksFME_watwvCQ7vhB1UHcBC1x-5np1iwz1KGZtgHz485UjoAVvW_OynVSrKrEOkB1JI_USZ8g7xFGLJYvrFGbqH3FQWK74l5ZnAxY1JLI_ePtqk1xbAPE-CtfG3l88y_cjisfE5G97XcAG5igXfA48G7i5b9QDKK7V0cH-lK7d-nEXNYuqW_ZyFwOn4G8fwqm4jm0iVdL67r_kKpMSXJFbChhP0RqMEY-nFbhFNpevDBq9BC3evI%3D) [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=153fc80b1eb048bcb05f9dc842c5fee2&_e=f4NvairE4X-XiWIc7FbthOxKECBjTGLmCLrDNSlB1bJiHRIAL_yprrQNMtLi26MXUhdqRdWo8dHzhTYaMrBIr6sMi06RZ7tmoh6QZkizjFnbUyOCG8m19LdVKhBOplra8EwngRm61G0Do9EZR-LGHg2LCrKDHPKxWX627oWJTLm5NmRR7Ek_iDoksFME_watwvCQ7vhB1UHcBC1x-5np1iwz1KGZtgHz485UjoAVvW_OynVSrKrEOkB1JI_USZ8gXXaRe8_gdk2Stapa00JDxr9-Si6nXi3yImLT8-1FDkJLHDOGAaxec1KE_3m0_ZRgY-YfkXO0voGsl9Q3pyVkkNjB_Xxil_S5M2bfpIcBMy4zgM8l6NwVdJb-H0ombRpQkcKEsGsKaCuCqQIgSiJNLK_Xg1oAISBqgOiSP-SZVok%3D) | Dear Fellow American, I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is still available online for free! In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. "The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education. |
## What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life." **\- Fred D.** "Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge." **\- John C.**
---|---
Time is Running Out [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=153fc80b1eb048bcb05f9dc842c5fee2&_e=f4NvairE4X-XiWIc7FbthOxKECBjTGLmCLrDNSlB1bJiHRIAL_yprrQNMtLi26MXUhdqRdWo8dHzhTYaMrBIr6sMi06RZ7tmoh6QZkizjFnbUyOCG8m19LdVKhBOplra8EwngRm61G0Do9EZR-LGHg2LCrKDHPKxWX627oWJTLm5NmRR7Ek_iDoksFME_watwvCQ7vhB1UHcBC1x-5np1iwz1KGZtgHz485UjoAVvW_OynVSrKrEOkB1JI_USZ8gFFqumnI_f8qX18r4NgKT2UYwrn25Ta48MniW8_Zc4kIw3blTMxg2TtCFC28b5n8nGMvkgig7IOYcN5h4o6elNxBxJ2-yfRIReTtq5pzHpsR0cXD-ebBeDyKiyizBT2tmaL2zrvd8Wuov_45Q8tax3fp_ufOdbtcjDKBh2uSsgr4%3D)
[Don't wait--activate your free _The Genesis Story_ course now!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=153fc80b1eb048bcb05f9dc842c5fee2&_e=f4NvairE4X-XiWIc7FbthOxKECBjTGLmCLrDNSlB1bJiHRIAL_yprrQNMtLi26MXUhdqRdWo8dHzhTYaMrBIr6sMi06RZ7tmoh6QZkizjFnbUyOCG8m19LdVKhBOplra8EwngRm61G0Do9EZR-LGHg2LCrKDHPKxWX627oWJTLm5NmRR7Ek_iDoksFME_watwvCQ7vhB1UHcBC1x-5np1iwz1KGZtgHz485UjoAVvW_OynVSrKrEOkB1JI_USZ8gZjc-Ekc3S5KSkec7fWgAVoSnnQHQ5n3Fq0R1n9IXPLGnVEjun-CnNUGgGVs9m986AU6XFx_7ng3hWpvgwgYA9NiEEf7Fjbapv1rkx3jRyUE1ioeUPEl12Z5nOlGF2RM-cRir5a7Yy_h-b7VNOQHdpTEKwuYK-oEw31lqpxun2RM%3D)
Then, Professor Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.
These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.
This course is perfect for personal study, viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/genesis](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=153fc80b1eb048bcb05f9dc842c5fee2&_e=f4NvairE4X-XiWIc7FbthOxKECBjTGLmCLrDNSlB1bJiHRIAL_yprrQNMtLi26MXUhdqRdWo8dHzhTYaMrBIr6sMi06RZ7tmoh6QZkizjFnbUyOCG8m19LdVKhBOplra8EwngRm61G0Do9EZR-LGHg2LCrKDHPKxWX627oWJTLm5NmRR7Ek_iDoksFME_watwvCQ7vhB1UHcBC1x-5np1iwz1KGZtgHz485UjoAVvW_OynVSrKrEOkB1JI_USZ8gHym9dApbiOcsq65FRWw6eqNXMClW1xNJUZYsXXQX-5rdM3gx9_MgK2H3hBzBw4qo8Na4SeJz-utA65ajkeEZVMXuttDOe_A1_EFEc31iaRC1COIk-EMH95hiEvK4O5_SrW_SOl7UqU5TqkS2X3K5doMwXSiwcWN0iDrJYEPe4hQ%3D)**
Please use the secure link above to explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."
Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl2dujmjtldq3gu78vq0epitckvjdbhbkb5pdin8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3njono5bn1v1ievsunoqr3e0u160pd2mam8q47o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2fud31c27lcfa5pdtgb7arjm1v8eb2lr8pfe8ko_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkgovj911tribon5ga1jhgouhm6vamoiniuef9oo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2mo3bnjalg6h2f2sr20e5j5blnsk3424fbpoqso_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Dr. Shawn Wilson for Governor
subject: Join Women For Wilson!
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
Peter,
This is Dr. Shawn Wilson, and I would be honored if you would accompany me in this transformational journey for the future of Louisiana.
I am asking our powerful female leaders to join Women For Wilson and be part of a growing coalition of women who share our vision for a more prosperous, inclusive, and equitable Louisiana.
JOIN WOMEN FOR WILSON [http://wilsonforla.com/women]
We will send a Women For Wilson shirt to the first 100 people who sign up!
http://wilsonforla.com/women [http://wilsonforla.com/women]
We need powerful and passionate supporters like you to join our campaign. An endorsement will help us address the pressing challenges faced by women in our state by advancing gender equality , creating economic opportunity, ensuring access to quality healthcare and education , and much more. Together, we can champion policy that uplifts and empowers women from all walks of life, all across Louisiana.
http://wilsonforla.com/women [http://wilsonforla.com/women]
Some of my priorities include collaborating with stakeholders to reverse the trend of Louisiana's troubling maternal mortality rates, supporting families from a child’s birth through early childhood in order to support the development of young brains, supporting paid family medical leave, protecting common sense reproductive healthcare, and more.
My candidacy has already been endorsed by impactful women like Baton Rouge Mayor President Sharon Weston Broome, New Orleans City Council Vice President Helena Moreno, and former U.S. Senator Mary Landrieu. I would be immensely grateful to add your name to my list of supporters.
Will you add your name to a growing coalition of Women For Wilson? [http://wilsonforla.com/women]
I am dedicated to creating a landscape where every woman can thrive. With your support, we can build a future that reflects the needs and aspirations of all women in our state.
Thank you in advance for your support,
Shawn Wilson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
LEARN MORE [WILSONFORLA.COM]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: When Justice Clarence Thomas graduated college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
The student debt crisis illustrates just how out of touch the Supreme Court is with life in America today.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188672/422236052/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Friend, The student debt crisis illustrates just how out of touch the Supreme Court is with life in America today. In the early 1970s, when Justice Clarence Thomas and Thomas Alito graduated college, [the average student debt loan was about $1,000](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188674/422236054/1443892140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080). Today, it’s over $37,338. Adjusted for inflation, that’s a staggering 317% increase.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188676/422236056/-453465321?contactdata=H21rVfbmxZx6Aa6o9xorwVgYEpAFqxMgZoJQqcoBTp85DIY2AcfeKMRcI0gH4+YENHyEQDc/Jpyif5cNJo94B8GC779lDUOXfMf/s0TR5Q/X7V1pWc3dH44a+Rtm9fJhbVMJlf57gKXo6r6qMV245A==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188678/422236058/-1753297191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)So what does SCOTUS do in the midst of the greatest affordability crisis in recent memory? Crushes the hopes of 45 million college graduates by overstepping Congress and rejecting President Biden’s plan to forgive their student debt. **[Sign if you agree: Term limits will restore credibility to the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188680/422236060/-453465321?contactdata=H21rVfbmxZx6Aa6o9xorwVgYEpAFqxMgZoJQqcoBTp85DIY2AcfeKMRcI0gH4+YENHyEQDc/Jpyif5cNJo94B8GC779lDUOXfMf/s0TR5Q/X7V1pWc3dH44a+Rtm9fJhbVMJlf57gKXo6r6qMV245A==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)**
The American people are paying a huge cost for having lifetime appointments on the nation’s highest court. To get SCOTUS back on track, **I introduced** **the Supreme Court Term Limits and Regular Appointments Act, which would create an 18-year term limit for justices.** **[Sign the petition: Demand 18-year term limits for Supreme Court justices.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68188682/422236062/-453465321?contactdata=H21rVfbmxZx6Aa6o9xorwVgYEpAFqxMgZoJQqcoBTp85DIY2AcfeKMRcI0gH4+YENHyEQDc/Jpyif5cNJo94B8GC779lDUOXfMf/s0TR5Q/X7V1pWc3dH44a+Rtm9fJhbVMJlf57gKXo6r6qMV245A==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY1ZGI3OTUtNWIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KHFeUfZUZgZuS4wCYLc-wdYZzbxOPmR2OU-jAuxAPdY=&emci=e30caa2b-523c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b65db795-5b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)**
** ** Our Founders established the Supreme Court to be an impartial, nonpartisan branch of the federal government. Yet today’s Court is anything but: it’s deeply politicized and dangerously incompatible with America’s highest ideals. That’s why it’s imperative that we set term limits for Supreme Court justices—18 years and you’re out! In solidarity,Ro

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbj8nightr4i4398jts97uorabs5jhf9hl3s1qd8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf0350th61uq6vpoq9pqkmp28856rar64tht9ik0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztmrube42rnld5ocb4g55blnk5duenl9vinisi18_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9h68ob6c5h2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: One year ago today…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
We beat Liz Cheney
| | _**ONE YEAR AGO...**_ **WE BEAT LIZ CHENEY**
---
Friend,
Today, we mark the one-year anniversary of a monumental victory—the day we _**FIRED LIZ CHENEY**_ and reclaimed Wyoming's only voice in Congress.
Can you believe it? One year ago today, Wyoming sent a message to Washington DC that if WE put you in power, you WILL be accountable to us, you WILL answer to us, and you WILL do what is in OUR best interest. And if you don’t? **We will fire you.**
| [ ](https://email.updates.hageman4wyoming.com/c/eJw8kU-vlTAQxT_NsIPAFAosWKh4Y_I0Ll58iSvS2z9QQ_9Yijy-vemV66Kb35yZOafDjF-1OgdoPwLiosUGiEA-AOLv4_V1--Kbl5f8_svlb9--16mGnwAxnl7-F14zCmmYXhNtx0wMJS_7mmRyqGiPWHakbbNlaETHSYt9TRqlVN-gVLKTd9HTu-JUiEwPWCIpu4pWbYNNVVDOWH-vyobWXU3bBupy94JFuRULm6Vhtj5OZ7SdC-5Mtg5LjH57OLsB3jbJ9yCLQ9sgRVIA3q6-XLmQX72JqrzKT8lC_kfz6MIJ5LZHMxkp9G6AjFc-muDm9sAlkNF6NqW3qKvCmfFMzxbIeCVppoWFoGW89k7Vvy3VtKhpeULr2XOCs1HaCGQUzrIoASkzbn8QLAusAWlIsUIyTsYY9qSZ7KoFkJHTo_uxhbef7w_4uCkZ3-nn2_y1y8Ig_KHXVW-0hbqcU6b0LX8DAAD__6Hjp24)

---
In the past year, I have made it my duty to defend Wyoming's values and confront the corrupt establishment that seeks to undermine our freedoms.
I have fought to protect American jobs, secure the border, lower energy costs, defend small businesses, and tear down the suffocating regulations that strangle our prosperity.
_**The fight is far from over.**_ _**The Uniparty is out to destroy us and will not stop until they have ultimate power over our country and every individual in it.**_
What is happening today is a war on the Constitution—a war on Conservatives and the values our Country was built upon. We must stop the CORRUPT Democrats before it is too late, and I need your help.
We need, now more than ever, for Conservatives to step up. [**Your support is what got us here and is what will fuel us into the future.**](https://email.updates.hageman4wyoming.com/c/eJw8kc-uljAQxZ9m2EFgWgrfgoWKxORqXNzEuCOlLVBD_9xSRN7e9JPropvfnJk5p8ON3_R8ddB8BMRVyx0QgXwAxLfz9XX_4uuXl3z65fIf377TVMNPgBgvr_4L7xmFMlxviTZ9JrtSlA9KMtVV7IFYtqRpsrVr2YOyZmrJzFoxUTIJJWeFrK55PT9amukOSyRlW7GqqbGuCiY4f0xVWTPaUtbUQMvDSx7VXqx8UYZbel7OaLsUwpls69YY_f50NgAOuxJHUMWpbVAyKQCHuy-fXcjv3kTnvMovxUP-W4vowgVkOKIZjZL6MED6Ox9LcHdHEApIbz0f01vnuyK48VwvFkh_J6nHlYegVbz3jtW_LdW4zuP6Dq3n7xOcjcpGIL10lkcFyLhxx5NgWSAFZCHFCsk46WM4kma0m5ZA-qO159Iz-fPtCZ83Jf0f9nlYvrZZ6KQ_9bbpnTVAyyVlSt_yNwAA__9_Uaak)
| [ **PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT >>>** ](https://email.updates.hageman4wyoming.com/c/eJw8kc-PnyAQxf8avGlgQNCDh7bWNNk2TXeTXg0rqDTyo4h1_e8bvnV74PKZNzPvMdKGzcxXh8RHBLAatSMARD8ggN_ny8v-JdRPT-XrL1_-_Pad5Rp8QgDpCvq_8J5RaSvNlqnoC9XhCbeMFrojvAXADRWiWDtgohWtFI0WzavApJ1By4Zp3HJWU8oK0wEGihvCiaihJhWfpGxfCa45axgXNWL4CEomvVerXLSVjp2Xt8Yt1eRtsXVrSmF_OBsQDLuejqir07ioVVYgGO6-cvaxvHsznUtSXlrG8o-Zko8XosOR7Gi1ModFtL_z8Qx3f8RJI9q7IMf81vmuTNIGaRaHaH8nqcdVxmh0uveO5N8WMq7zuL5DF-T7BO-SdgnRXnknk0bApfXHgwCugCHgMceK2TjtUzyyZnSbUdnRj7f6fH5W1_CAj5vS_o1_HpavTRE7FU6zbWbnAjG85Ez5W_4GAAD__xAkpbs)
---
_**Let’s return America to the greatness She deserves.**_
Thank you for reliving this historic day with me. Wyoming is a state of warriors, pioneers, ranchers, and trailblazers, and together, we will forge a future that is unbreakable.
_Thank you, God Bless Wyoming, and God Bless this Nation._
_Harriet Hageman_

clean_body: We beat Liz Cheney | | ONE YEAR AGO... WE BEAT LIZ CHENEY Friend, Today, we mark the one-year anniversary of a monumental victory—the day we FIRED LIZ CHENEY and reclaimed Wyoming's only voice in Congress. Can you believe it? One year ago today, Wyoming sent a message to Washington DC that if WE put you in power, you WILL be accountable to us, you WILL answer to us, and you WILL do what is in OUR best interest. And if you don’t? We will fire you. | | - In the past year, I have made it my duty to defend Wyoming's values and confront the corrupt establishment that seeks to undermine our freedoms. I have fought to protect American jobs, secure the border, lower energy costs, defend small businesses, and tear down the suffocating regulations that strangle our prosperity. The fight is far from over. The Uniparty is out to destroy us and will not stop until they have ultimate power over our country and every individual in it. What is happening today is a war on the Constitution—a war on Conservatives and the values our Country was built upon. We must stop the CORRUPT Democrats before it is too late, and I need your help. We need, now more than ever, for Conservatives to step up. | Let’s return America to the greatness She deserves. Thank you for reliving this historic day with me. Wyoming is a state of warriors, pioneers, ranchers, and trailblazers, and together, we will forge a future that is unbreakable. Thank you, God Bless Wyoming, and God Bless this Nation. Harriet Hageman | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING

Peter: In just a few moments, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in anything you can before tonight’s mid-quarter deadline.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230816_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=949%2E35263%2EPjcHIo)** But first, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why the GOP is dead-set on flipping my Senate seat in Wisconsin. Some of the most competitive races in recent elections have taken place right here in Wisconsin — including both the 2016 and 2020 presidential elections, where Donald Trump and Joe Biden each won by less than a single point. Republicans want a clean sweep of Wisconsin next year — defeating me and winning our state’s 10 electoral votes for the GOP presidential nominee. **_There’s no better indication that the Republican Party is prioritizing Wisconsin than them hosting their first presidential debate right here in Milwaukee next week._** With all eyes on Wisconsin at the top of the ticket, there’s no doubt Senate Republicans will be targeting me and my seat to regain control of the Senate majority. Republicans only need to flip _two seats_ to take back control of the Senate, so they’ll use any opportunity they can to swoop in and pick up a seat. **Peter, I am determined and optimistic we can retake the majority in 2024 – but doing so won’t be easy.**

name: GA Dems
subject: The GA Secretary of State is canceling nearly 200,000 voter registrations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This move comes right as groups across Georgia are suing the state government for diluting the Black vote

| Ahead of the 2024 presidential election, GA Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is moving to remove _**nearly TWO HUNDRED THOUSAND voters from the voter rolls.**_

This move comes right as groups across Georgia are suing the state government for diluting the Black vote, just as the GOP did in Alabama and Louisiana.

Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia challenged the rights of nearly 100,000 voters.

[_**Peter, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. The Democratic Party of Georgia has had the top voter protection team in the country, and we need your help to fund our team again in the 2024 cycle. name: Joe Kent
subject: Watch the Premier of “Get Local with Joe!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter
I have just launched "Get Local with Joe," a video series where I talk to people in the community about local issues. I recently sat down with Mike Rotschy in Amboy to discuss the timber industry, forest fires, and the REINS Act.
You can watch the premiere episode on any of these formats:
Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=310854487971095](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/7RXSQcjhgEppDpziPcWygA/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ)
Twitter: [https://twitter.com/joekent16jan19/status/1691495182296920089](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/VRblUN5mJBrZES763qZ3wYcw/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ)
Youtube: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VT51VqVVmLE](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/sbg6XNAFXNsitPmYm0p892WQ/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ)
Rumble: [https://rumble.com/v380orr](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/oFPq8QJBNiLzOd0aY20hrA/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ)
My opponent Marie Perez voted to allow bloated federal agencies to crush the timber industry with red tape. Marie talks a lot about fixing local issues, but the biggest killer of our timber businesses is the over-regulation by unelected federal bureaucrats.
I hope you enjoy the first episode and find it informative, there are many more to come.
And please help me win this race and flip this seat red by contributing at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/6zYc1892jij4v00HK1kLMM3A/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ).
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
Washington State Republican Party Endorsed Candidate for Washington's 3rd District
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/892GQGRy8H6OD1ZN7sHD892kTQ)

We are already working around the clock to reach every voter ahead of November 7th. **The ONLY way we can defeat Tate Reeves is with a strong team of dedicated grassroots supporters on our side.**

In this election, we have an opportunity to change lives. Brandon is prepared to expand Medicaid, reduce the grocery tax and car tag fees, eliminate corruption in state government, and much more, in order to create a Mississippi that works for _everyone_.

clean_body: | | Today marks one year since the Inflation Reduction Act was signed into law. This landmark legislation makes historic progress on issues like clean energy, health care, prescription drug prices, and deficit reduction. And to no one’s surprise, Michelle Steel fell in line with her MAGA colleagues and voted against the Inflation Reduction Act. Time and time again, Steel puts her extreme agenda ahead of what’s right for our community. She’s not working for us. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Here’s exactly what Michelle Steel voted against: 🌎 The most significant investment in climate action and clean energy in our nation’s history – including 5,200 high-wage California jobs (and counting) 💊 Allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices and a $35/month cap on insulin for seniors 💰 A corporate minimum tax to ensure that large corporations are paying their fair share The Inflation Reduction Act is already making a real difference in our communities. I’m ready to build on this progress and lower costs for working families. But I can’t do this without your help. = | = Thanks for everything, Kim | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S.
