body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ff03117ea094145998ee4ed22906bac&_e=qePX1RK82qM5LgbU32gf0TY9jCtb-PXX_zRHBxpuZdAGskR_c1dIUJukZ14zgNbHIEAvwMeUP_Ed-8yFioRD3pTS9bEpMQZj_1f871bcd42bXc53Isy_mjC8tPTDeeEKrJkUcg8CB-tbYCPQl3RRkZl5cAEs0mJfXMGLjuyaOm06elfQMc12cyuzmlqrblHoZJjW9walawWkBNaa7F1snt5HpOuw7qxnuTNCTRYkD9Szj8doPAB1TxzPJFQOPykUYhUmryUGD6ZMqf-tndkkQg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ff03117ea094145998ee4ed22906bac&_e=qePX1RK82qM5LgbU32gf0TY9jCtb-PXX_zRHBxpuZdAGskR_c1dIUJukZ14zgNbHIEAvwMeUP_Ed-8yFioRD3pTS9bEpMQZj_1f871bcd42bXc53Isy_mjC8tPTDeeEK7ilsb0yvkgQA7S8kT48jxJGwbJZl3gSZsM4L30ekHBnmGZOwOyvqtn30B4zWmwfC3omYjDDoAOdW0H8YZG7ZGV3eW_jLMcnCWksUB-GnsRokTsgI4ESWBrchd1uZf_Cm7DutA-MbMAvRzV-dSF8oig%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ff03117ea094145998ee4ed22906bac&_e=qePX1RK82qM5LgbU32gf0TY9jCtb-PXX_zRHBxpuZdAGskR_c1dIUJukZ14zgNbHIEAvwMeUP_Ed-8yFioRD3pTS9bEpMQZj_1f871bcd42bXc53Isy_mjC8tPTDeeEKbv4yCKHa4pLx9gfM7s49AVoahwDAV9k7hPmuf7MkaNAhJKTMqhRL98xMk4FRNnKAgi-num9TJd1iD9_PAosc_5_FZ7AtjrSwvEkYtMJ7eFJxstYB3gg841xCnuQB3k-L7w8JBD7tGyMNv_W4LuqZXA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. | | Friend,

---
This is no doubt a dark time for America.

---
But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission._
_
---
And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it’s those freedom-loving patriots like _YOU_ who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA.
---
_But how could we ever give up on America?_

---
She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, _anything_ is possible.

---
So, whenever I’m asked, “Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?” _
_
---
My answer is simple... __
__
---
Even after __FOUR__ unlawful **INDICTMENTS** against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: _between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country.__
_
---
Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny.

---
Not on my watch, Friend. I will _**NEVER**_****_**SURRENDER**_ our country to the Left’s tyranny!

---
_If you’re struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word._

---
But if you can contribute, then God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever.

---

clean_body: Because I will always fight for YOU. | | | | | Friend, This is no doubt a dark time for America. But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission. And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it’s those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA. But how could we ever give up on America? She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, anything is possible. So, whenever I’m asked, “Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?” My answer is simple... Even after FOUR unlawful INDICTMENTS against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country. Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny. Not on my watch, Friend. I will NEVER**SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny! If you’re struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word. But if you can contribute, then God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: The Nevadan via Courier Newsroom
subject: We're coming to Nevada at a crucial time
body:
The Nevadan is Courier’s first bilingual newsroom.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1402%2E120351%2EDIyvH9)
Peter —
As the 2024 presidential election approaches, Nevada is set to be a key battleground state — and the home to our next newsroom.
**Today we’re launching,_The Nevadan,_ our first completely bilingual newsroom!**
[**Our Nevada reporters have their work cut out for them (more on this in a minute), so we’ve set a goal of raising $7,000 today to ensure that they have the resources they need to hit the ground running. Will you chip in $5 now to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230816?refcode=em20230816&amount=5&refcode2=1402_120351_DIyvH9&akid=1402%2E120351%2EDIyvH9)
During last year’s midterm elections, Nevadans found themselves exposed to dangerous and harmful disinformation, with rampant, false claims of election tampering and voter fraud. Latino voters in particular were targets of these misinformation campaigns. We can expect to see this same kind of election misinformation and voter intimidation next year.
Nevada Democrat Jacky Rosen is considered one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection this cycle. And we know this race will be close. _In 2022, Democratic Senator Catherine Cortez Masto only won her race by 7,900 votes. Similarly in 2020, President Biden only won Nevada by just 33,500 votes._
_The Nevadan_ will be there every step of the way, debunking bad information and sharing essential local news stories with readers in communities across the Battle Born state.

clean_body: The Nevadan is Courier’s first bilingual newsroom. Peter — As the 2024 presidential election approaches, Nevada is set to be a key battleground state — and the home to our next newsroom. Today we’re launching,The Nevadan, our first completely bilingual newsroom! During last year’s midterm elections, Nevadans found themselves exposed to dangerous and harmful disinformation, with rampant, false claims of election tampering and voter fraud. Latino voters in particular were targets of these misinformation campaigns. We can expect to see this same kind of election misinformation and voter intimidation next year. Nevada Democrat Jacky Rosen is considered one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection this cycle. And we know this race will be close. In 2022, Democratic Senator Catherine Cortez Masto only won her race by 7,900 votes. Similarly in 2020, President Biden only won Nevada by just 33,500 votes. The Nevadan will be there every step of the way, debunking bad information and sharing essential local news stories with readers in communities across the Battle Born state. Thank you! Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the National Archives and
Records Administration (NARA) for records of the Archives’ role in
President Trump’s White House records controversy; whether it
offered Trump a secure storage location other than the National
Archives; and if the Archives consulted with the Office of the
Director of National Intelligence regarding the classification or
declassification procedures of any of the alleged classified documents
found at Trump’s Florida residence.

body:
We're making it easier than ever to speak up. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68197710/422249448/689100400?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJiY2NlOTgtNjYzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lwzFQfErRrFTSW-RIoQMcDwLjIU0Ku6dwXjnVSP7EuE=)

**Stop Antisemitism: No matter how small, report it all**
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68197711/422249461/306369650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJiY2NlOTgtNjYzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lwzFQfErRrFTSW-RIoQMcDwLjIU0Ku6dwXjnVSP7EuE=&emci=1217a042-a13b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4bbcce98-663c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6977246)
---
| | Dear Peter, A recent survey by the American Jewish Committee found that 84 percent of antisemitic incidents go unreported. In response, Suffolk County developed and rolled out an important initiative that allows government and police to work together to document, track, and respond to antisemitism and all acts of hate in our region. [Please click here to learn more and watch the announcement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68197712/422249477/-421907845?ref=watch_permalink&v=310302158119978&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJiY2NlOTgtNjYzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lwzFQfErRrFTSW-RIoQMcDwLjIU0Ku6dwXjnVSP7EuE=&emci=1217a042-a13b-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4bbcce98-663c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6977246) It is incumbent upon government to track acts of hate and more effectively protect vulnerable populations. As North Hempstead Supervisor, I will work with residents, community leaders, and law enforcement to bring about similar programs and combat all forms of hate in our Town. Regards,Jon Kaiman
---
| |
---

| |
**Dear Friend** ,

When we launched this campaign just over a week ago, I said I was proud to have represented Huntington throughout my career as a State Senator, County Legislator, and more. You should also know that Huntington is a very important town to win in our campaign for Congress. For both of these reasons I’m thrilled to announce major endorsements from key Huntington elected officials today:

I’ve worked with each of these fine public servants to improve life on Long Island, and I’m honored to earn their endorsements for Congress. Their support shows that I have the experience, the character, and the commitment to both strengthen our communities and bring the values we hold dear to Washington D.C..

[I hope you’ll agree by sending a donation at whatever level you can afford. We’re going to need it.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=5a3235e1aa&e=a6aa651d40)

Stay tuned, there’s lots more to come.

Best,
Jim

[P.S. Even a small donation before the October filing will show our campaign has what it takes to win. Thank you!](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=285f117b6a&e=a6aa651d40)

clean_body: What a yellow-bellied coward. | | | | | Trump is more than a loser, folks. He's a COWARD! The way I grew up and the way I was raised, when a man has something to say to another man, you look him straight in the eyes and say it to his face. Trump keeps talking trash about me. We’re exactly ONE WEEK out from the first debate and I’ll be on stage but he won’t even say if he’s coming yet. I'll be on the stage and I'll be telling the truth no matter what — but we need your support! We’ll see if he shows up next week, but you can count on me to be there and WIN. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Lower costs and historic investments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team, today marks an important anniversary.

It has been one year since President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), legislation my Democratic colleagues and I passed to lower prescription drug costs for seniors on Medicare and tackle the climate crisis—without increasing taxes for the middle class.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68198230/422251402/13284604?refcode=em23_230816_IRA_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230816_IRA_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&refcode2=dbdedccc-673c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmRlZGNjYy02NzNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDyETtpvn9y9sSdxZzl0BFMrw5cs6KWUrPkrnuD5f70=)
---

For me, this legislation is personal. Growing up, I watched as my grandmother worked well past the age of retirement just to pay for the high cost of prescription drugs not fully covered by Medicare. I vowed to do something about it, and I did. As a millennial, the climate crisis is also personal. I ran for Congress to stop climate change from worsening. Last term, Democrats made progress on these issues, but our work remains unfinished. That’s why I’m running to return to the House of Representatives—to continue making progress.

The Inflation Reduction Act was a huge step in the right direction for our country—even though its passage was fought by Republicans like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene, and opposed by Mike Lawler when he was then a candidate for Congress. Congressman Mike Lawler, a former oil and gas lobbyist, would make the climate crisis worse and have seniors like my grandma pay more for their prescription drugs, not less.

As Mike Lawler turns a blind eye to the struggles everyday folks in the lower Hudson Valley are facing, I’m making a promise to you: When I return to Congress, I’m going to pick up where I left off and continue to fight to pass legislation like the IRA to lower prescription costs for everyone and protect our environment.

[**But I can’t win without your continued support, team. So, I’m coming to you with an important request: Chip in $5 or more to help me flip NY-17, take back the Democratic House majority, and continue fighting for people—not big corporations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68198231/422251403/13284604?refcode=em23_230816_IRA_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230816_IRA_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mondaire-jones&refcode2=dbdedccc-673c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmRlZGNjYy02NzNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDyETtpvn9y9sSdxZzl0BFMrw5cs6KWUrPkrnuD5f70=)

Our election workers ensure that our elections are free, fair, and accessible to all. Yet nationally, they are now facing unprecedented threats and harassment, driven by false claims surrounding the 2020 presidential election. These threats are forcing many election workers to quit, jeopardizing the very essence of our democratic process.
We have a chance to make a difference. U.S. Senators Amy Klobuchar and Dick Durbin have introduced the Election Worker Protection Act, a vital piece of legislation aimed at enhancing the safety of election officials.
[**But we need your help. By signing the petition to protect election workers, you will send a powerful message that we stand united against threats and intimidation. We stand up for democracy, fairness, and the individuals who make it all possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68198536/422252514/724503591?source=2023ElectionWorkers_SS&referrer=group-steve-simon-for-secretary-of-state&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fss_upsell23%3Frefcode%3Dss_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D15&refcode=ss_em_pet_30DO_230816&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk5ODgzYTYtNjgzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iUlsDOsY6Hnjvy63jJFUwwU-VRmEPwEucmwd0kPPvS0=&emci=f8667fa0-683c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=299883a6-683c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=23608046)

| A new poll was _just_ released.

**Here’s what we know from reading it: Republicans like Ayotte have every reason to be afraid of Cinde becoming their opponent. She’s the only candidate in the race who is recently battle-tested and has a strong record as Executive Councilor.**

But this poll also shows that we have to spread the word about why Cinde is the best candidate to take back the corner office. With a majority of voters still undecided, we need to get to work sharing Cinde’s record.

clean_body: | A new poll was just released. Here’s what we know from reading it: Republicans like Ayotte have every reason to be afraid of Cinde becoming their opponent. She’s the only candidate in the race who is recently battle-tested and has a strong record as Executive Councilor. But this poll also shows that we have to spread the word about why Cinde is the best candidate to take back the corner office. With a majority of voters still undecided, we need to get to work sharing Cinde’s record. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = The Union Leader reported that Cinde “is the only candidate who recently won a tough primary” and The Boston Globe noted, “some Republicans have said Warmington would be the tougher Democratic candidate to beat in the general election.” With over a year until the general election kicks off, it’s up to us to make sure voters learn about how Cinde stands up for women’s reproductive freedom and fights everyday to make this state a place where people can afford to live and thrive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Warmington * | = | = Click here to from Cinde Warmington's email list. Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington. William Christie, Treasurer. PO Box 2133, Concord, NH 03302

How much do you know about how Lynn Fitch has spent her time as Mississippi’s AG?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68198610/422252930/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230816PQ_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU3NTk2YzEtNjgzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9nr4NENwvd5_fJxJARg4zBy_1SEuzNxnSPP43BFYG74=) Peter, it’s pop quiz time! Let’s see if you can guess where our current Attorney General Lynn Fitch has used her office’s resources.

Which of these issues has Lynn Fitch been focused on? Is it: A. Tackling Mississippi’s historic levels of corruption and demanding accountability for the millions of taxpayer dollars that were given away to celebrities and political insiders

B. Enforcing Mississippi’s already lax campaign finance laws to ensure free and fair elections

C. Addressing our state’s healthcare crisis by investigating laws that infringe on access to care and fighting for lower prescription drug prices

D. Attacking Target for selling Pride merchandise, calling the store’s products “satanic”
_If you answered D, you’re right!_

Fitch’s priorities are so far out-of-touch with what Mississippians need, and her continued attacks on reproductive rights across the nation have harmed us all. No matter your zip code, we need you standing with us as we spread the word about Greta’s campaign in these final weeks.

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter -- before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today.
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter.
**I'll be honest with you, Peter:** Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
**Every day in the Senate, I'm fighting for _you_. But I'm facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. [Will you chip in $5 or more now -- split between my campaign and Bob Casey's -- so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230816-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230816-1&refcode2=458_552475_7lnr8u&akid=458%2E552475%2E7lnr8u)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230816-1?refcode=em20230816-1&refcode2=458_552475_7lnr8u&akid=458%2E552475%2E7lnr8u)**
Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control -- and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year's Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**That's why I simply cannot win this race -- and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority -- without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:**
[**Will you please split $5 between my campaign and Bob Casey's to help us power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230816-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230816-1&refcode2=458_552475_7lnr8u&akid=458%2E552475%2E7lnr8u)
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=458%2E552475%2E7lnr8u)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=458%2E552475%2E7lnr8u)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

subject: The Mississippi Leadership Academy - Year Two
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=5703353baa&u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=39cfa1cb74)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is committed to training and equipping future leaders for our state.
**The Mississippi Leadership Academy is a five-part program designed to equip college students, high school seniors and young professionals with the skills and knowledge necessary to be effective change-agents in our state.**
---
|
---
| **Applications are now open for the 2023/24 program. Do you know anyone that might apply?**
---
| [Apply Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=aff84ca42f&e=5703353baa "Apply Here!")
---
| Courses are taken one Saturday each month, over a six month period, and include:
* The challenges our state faces
* The morality of the free market
* American exceptionalism and the ideas behind the Founding
* The basics of the law making process
* Media management
* How to defend liberty on campus.

Last year, speakers included the Attorney General, Lynn Fitch, State Auditor, Shad White, Lord Daniel Hannan, the author, Matt Ridley, as well as a number of leading academics.

Upon graduation, students will have made connections with student peers, as well as our states’ preeminent thought leaders, and will graduate better prepared to defend American principles, enter the workforce, and lead.

Spots fill up quickly, so please apply right away!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9a226b8d17&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Target's Earnings Report = 📉📉📉
body:
Go woke, go broke!!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a146b8a169264db49be0f83cce869f39&_e=jIS2mcG5zfb6gbuj1q3n0uI1uI7PjKjHSdDeiWkyHBeSLwoPI4df0WmBvOJAIzdy0dGWQeii0yDXO17dyNUOaGzyCJ1BRSMKc-kJ5vmtXd7-6fUaBqhquXdKVXx7ez4d_LpUPYZaLga3IOMSIUdMmqX34fBih5z8Ogr_MU1-0Gqtfxj93v7w3JoobspsTJs5wj1WJF8v4c3de45Haioqn_tqroRQSOgix5FU9EUUBv1QjBEv_u3xINphZYVlpN61MtXw46UJP72Wxi-jAtgF1hbch-L8QEEZ34y_ZzLcb_s4qbKz6ySViRia3eRPfD8NxCLoufVwKCt9vDgOWeuhgQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Target's quarterly earnings report came out, and the results were unsurprising—sales and revenue were both down. In fact, a year ago, sales were UP almost 3%, and now they DOWN 5.4%. This is what happens when we as consumers say enough is enough— _STOP SHOVING WOKE GARBAGE DOWN OUR THROATS!! _

Will corporate America take a lesson away from this? They better, because we’re done tolerating their woke agenda, and now we have a string of victories they can’t ignore. **Go woke, go broke!**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a146b8a169264db49be0f83cce869f39&_e=jIS2mcG5zfb6gbuj1q3n0uI1uI7PjKjHSdDeiWkyHBeSLwoPI4df0WmBvOJAIzdy0dGWQeii0yDXO17dyNUOaGzyCJ1BRSMKc-kJ5vmtXd7-6fUaBqhquXdKVXx7ez4d_LpUPYZaLga3IOMSIUdMmqX34fBih5z8Ogr_MU1-0GquY2GzExY3H4O274cfbHdt3lQpiuD1zJqeCWph9wVG1D8e2h4YkjgNQ3iZaralV2N4GMGWqaAV14e6wwA8amEQrhP8xtXU7E7xjbmlm4opMz6HZUqYXprYAV4I8JFNnosD33wo5uVskxOadD4aZMMfhp4paVHpPTc6y4aAZa88Xg%3D%3D)
---
This is why we do what we do—to show that when we band together, reject what the world celebrates and _**stand up for something RIGHT**_ , we can make a big difference. My prayer is that other companies look at Target as a warning against wokeness.
---

---
[**SUPPORT HOLD THE LINE**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a146b8a169264db49be0f83cce869f39&_e=jIS2mcG5zfb6gbuj1q3n0uI1uI7PjKjHSdDeiWkyHBeSLwoPI4df0WmBvOJAIzdy0dGWQeii0yDXO17dyNUOaGzyCJ1BRSMKc-kJ5vmtXd7-6fUaBqhquXdKVXx7ez4d_LpUPYZaLga3IOMSIUdMmqX34fBih5z8Ogr_MU1-0GrDDKyarlv7Tp-lt0oYuqI5RO_u2TX7gqT8_hcAxGYmgEsICj-iP0wfMjBkG208woldKZWs0QhBTivFYxKOd7nBWow9WMdKDidcCjQ4gMKBW0Idd3c27QWcAnG-xz4ZKHiD6YOy_GeMr-CDMN-8KBtoh4pEocpHgPAzEQ0H8cyY2Q%3D%3D)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68199313/422255238/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjBkMWRjOS02YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRk8KQXGExby9RSGZ4keK-QAMR724rZ6_hWs92D9-AI=)
Peter,

We’re sure you heard the news from earlier this week that former President Donald Trump was indicted for the _fourth_ time.

This time, he was indicted on felony charges stemming from his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results, specifically in election interference in Georgia.

We thought this was a good time to remind our supporters about the extreme Republicans in Congress who stood with Trump every step of the way -- **including our opponent Rep. Mike Garcia.**
* After ballots were counted in the 2020 election, Garcia voted against certifying the results at Trump’s request.
* Garcia voted _against_ a bipartisan, independent investigation into what happened on January 6th.
* When Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home was searched by the FBI for classified documents leading to his last indictment, Garcia likened the Biden administration to the _Nazi regime._

As proceedings on these indictments continue, remember that Garcia fed into the former president’s conspiracy theories and aided his attempts to overturn the results. He’s a Trump acolyte through and through, and our CA-27 community deserves better.

That’s why George is running to replace him:

**[This toss up race is critical to winning the House majority. If you are ready to unseat one of Trump’s top allies in Congress, and retake the House, chip in $3 to support our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68199314/422255239/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjBkMWRjOS02YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRk8KQXGExby9RSGZ4keK-QAMR724rZ6_hWs92D9-AI=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, We’re sure you heard the news from earlier this week that former President Donald Trump was indicted for the fourth time. This time, he was indicted on felony charges stemming from his efforts to overturn the 2020 election results, specifically in election interference in Georgia. We thought this was a good time to remind our supporters about the extreme Republicans in Congress who stood with Trump every step of the way -- including our opponent Rep. Mike Garcia. After ballots were counted in the 2020 election, Garcia voted against certifying the results at Trump’s request. Garcia voted against a bipartisan, independent investigation into what happened on January 6th. When Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home was searched by the FBI for classified documents leading to his last indictment, Garcia likened the Biden administration to the Nazi regime. As proceedings on these indictments continue, remember that Garcia fed into the former president’s conspiracy theories and aided his attempts to overturn the results. He’s a Trump acolyte through and through, and our CA-27 community deserves better. That’s why George is running to replace him: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George Whitesides HQ | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
I confided in Elizabeth when I was struggling to see how I could make a difference. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68205868/422278793/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ16A_TAN_S_20230816_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDljMjA4NS04ZDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=irHFWqN7wIFP6LR6WPISXWw9XnsM2Ftp9Fy_AKvcWog=&emci=de9c2085-8d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e09c2085-8d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

Katie Porter here. You may know me as the woman who brings props (like a whiteboard!) to Congressional hearings to help hold the powerful accountable. But when I first got to Washington in 2019, my mentor and former law professor — Senator Elizabeth Warren — called me to ask how things were going, and I shared that I was struggling to see how I could make a difference and live up to the promise I had made to voters to shake up Washington. About a month later, Elizabeth called again. But this time, I had a couple of Congressional hearings under my belt, and I had found ways to hold the CEO of Equifax and the CEO of Wells Fargo accountable. I had asked the tough questions and got real answers for the American people. The Wells Fargo CEO even resigned shortly after the hearing. **Elizabeth said to me, “you found your voice. Don’t ever stop using it.”** [**Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can continue using my voice to stand up for working people, stop corruption, and continue working with Elizabeth to make our government work for working people. Can you support this fight by making a contribution that will be split between our two campaigns?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68205869/422278794/-158906450?refcode=EMZ16A_TAN_S_20230816_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDljMjA4NS04ZDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=irHFWqN7wIFP6LR6WPISXWw9XnsM2Ftp9Fy_AKvcWog=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
My race is highly competitive. Polling consistently has us a few points ahead, but one of my opponents raised more than double what we did last quarter.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e4c58cdd3f44d68e66f52e2e8e6ade&_e=JWYL65-KkfAjQHYvwIemzghK7KyRuUAQG2KXdeV9rwluMOIdi7VTjg3qFnWcc4Y1t_yIN8T9kspA3B8VBfILkZvygg32TAuOS6QQWUjI8UiWBlXfKcq1KHrPPyVPcPWXhUHHWEQ6YVlVY5iU_KBGWrrCRyL87KaA-HkWpeVoTnYPpicmnbJqRCyY7pDjMTah0QHhjI7KOA2e7lzlTcP7UDmak2IE3FYhAfkp4QybsNQfB-mZuFd_DOGenZoxABCVZmhbY1XfrFD5Jk8sXs6sTXJ8Urj6okqul6GgsbP6SJmPuyczSuuR_WzhmYRsU7v3KRaYk1O-4GbBdbEFIK_OYs3yos6_fDQE63yoZxprEogeHHEPYaADoLAnNepdEuVPpoLq-i3-7yOSiXpKZf-jgA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e4c58cdd3f44d68e66f52e2e8e6ade&_e=JWYL65-KkfAjQHYvwIemzghK7KyRuUAQG2KXdeV9rwluMOIdi7VTjg3qFnWcc4Y1t_yIN8T9kspA3B8VBfILkZvygg32TAuOS6QQWUjI8UiWBlXfKcq1KHrPPyVPcPWXhUHHWEQ6YVlVY5iU_KBGWrrCRyL87KaA-HkWpeVoTnYPpicmnbJqRCyY7pDjMTah0QHhjI7KOA2e7lzlTcP7UDmak2IE3FYhAfkp4QybsNQfB-mZuFd_DOGenZoxABCVODXxRoal5ydvvTqXqgIMXf6PNzMtNgFzyIBPcJKRE9_s41m-LhlT9O3J5ScMSO3uvE_nZQ35hnuKUJj2DkhB9pdBfY49ZIzOcJn78vaD582BCyv2k-__CVArEv_ijoJ__sj_xWMGoA5fJS89POr8fQ%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e4c58cdd3f44d68e66f52e2e8e6ade&_e=JWYL65-KkfAjQHYvwIemzghK7KyRuUAQG2KXdeV9rwluMOIdi7VTjg3qFnWcc4Y1t_yIN8T9kspA3B8VBfILkZvygg32TAuOS6QQWUjI8UiWBlXfKcq1KHrPPyVPcPWXhUHHWEQ6YVlVY5iU_KBGWrrCRyL87KaA-HkWpeVoTnYPpicmnbJqRCyY7pDjMTah0QHhjI7KOA2e7lzlTcP7UDmak2IE3FYhAfkp4QybsNQfB-mZuFd_DOGenZoxABCVGCELBgig2Q-5iAEWPAvEEqwKcDERwuYk_qbp_SWMglqEItWKubjyodNfnYdDfN5CbePKnAE6PderLuLYA2IsVO1kd0WgdT7bb_NYh1RKei2IjJc_gc0AunEWd049iSFJ7cPovDW1SFTlyFN8j6dxOA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Fellow American, our message is working.

Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose.

That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment.

**This is our chance, Fellow American.** I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track.

Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. I've invested my own money in this race because I believe America is on the brink and we must do something TODAY to change course.

We don't have 20 years left. Some stand for incremental reform - I stand for revolution.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: In the latest national polling, we've had the biggest bump. | | Fellow American, our message is working. Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose. That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment. This is our chance, Fellow American. I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track. Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. I've invested my own money in this race because I believe America is on the brink and we must do something TODAY to change course. We don't have 20 years left. Some stand for incremental reform - I stand for revolution. | It's time for The Great Uprising to defeat The Great Reset. This isn't just an R vs. D question in 2023. It's a 1776 moment. Together, we'll win back the White House next November. Andy has a winning message — a message of hope, about how we can work together across party lines, and build off the progress we've made for our Commonwealth during Andy's first four years in office. But now, we need your help to ensure Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth hear that message. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your support, Team Beshear = | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee479adaeec74f5bb7ba8727da59efa6&_e=HxKyGHsQ7xs31Z-wWKM0nASvuuecT6mjm6VCDE_UKT6dtGfosSfd6_0PTZMqvaQghEyr77jcfwVXqFrjdGqouv_o_rphVoBXOPTEwZW1Yd3Zc9-LOIFS0Brm2KkQvJ4_U0ZFAjEPMZgIqUYayM-FdJbSyrl8jyi-CKWetXwAZNRvk7ASGVsC-SknDFPZiyg6lxs_RsCSZDI6zrgNmsV0wQ2PGdZw882cTkykpXEqgP1QCqoEimwypw8DKCAP5ZJKQYbMX3bC2EuIdJHqVemkEOaqgPXslk3zxV4mLWTBf6TwwnxMGdARMenU4qtlIMnu9SMZI2Fqi64lZJNH7ZFG7aSvK1g-KRg7xtbKHPTea6Q7N_Igwfj96o9fKAiA4sEeGp8HIN_QnYk3cpWEzxJrrX1TTCgFpUPgxX8RTvWEdEF4NmuNcpAU4SYueICvPhBCoRuNv01KiS2IpQ31MeMrAwQGblXlbI4ihUdsowEzgmg%3D)
Ever heard the saying, "good things come in small packages?"

Well, it's certainly true for the latest breakthrough in hearing tech: a device that packs an extraordinary amount of power into a truly tiny design.

Two years ago, our engineers unveiled the virtually invisible Horizon hearing aids and it quickly became a best-seller. Now, they're back with yet another innovation--Horizon AX--and experts are calling it**the biggest upgrade in sound and speech clarity the industry has ever seen.**
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee479adaeec74f5bb7ba8727da59efa6&_e=HxKyGHsQ7xs31Z-wWKM0nASvuuecT6mjm6VCDE_UKT6dtGfosSfd6_0PTZMqvaQghEyr77jcfwVXqFrjdGqouv_o_rphVoBXOPTEwZW1Yd3Zc9-LOIFS0Brm2KkQvJ4_U0ZFAjEPMZgIqUYayM-FdJbSyrl8jyi-CKWetXwAZNRvk7ASGVsC-SknDFPZiyg6lxs_RsCSZDI6zrgNmsV0wQ2PGdZw882cTkykpXEqgP1QCqoEimwypw8DKCAP5ZJKQYbMX3bC2EuIdJHqVemkEOaqgPXslk3zxV4mLWTBf6TwwnxMGdARMenU4qtlIMnu9SMZI2Fqi64lZJNH7ZFG7Tnu3dhPfvFk0Yde8rprrffi4gSl4ZKh4nVxMwjxOWHLGwswRz558w7nxlHHlz1dkKS0nbkrdY-XwU1-MUFKIpKHebWabsph-VIySwTheb65jgBuFmXy6koGuxOEYLtl-F85zBMIQH4nIYFQrxUS1DU%3D)
**The big upgrade:** Horizon AX has the world's first-ever dual processing system, meaning it has not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips. And with double the power comes double the clarity...
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee479adaeec74f5bb7ba8727da59efa6&_e=HxKyGHsQ7xs31Z-wWKM0nASvuuecT6mjm6VCDE_UKT6dtGfosSfd6_0PTZMqvaQghEyr77jcfwVXqFrjdGqouv_o_rphVoBXOPTEwZW1Yd3Zc9-LOIFS0Brm2KkQvJ4_U0ZFAjEPMZgIqUYayM-FdJbSyrl8jyi-CKWetXwAZNRvk7ASGVsC-SknDFPZiyg6lxs_RsCSZDI6zrgNmsV0wQ2PGdZw882cTkykpXEqgP1QCqoEimwypw8DKCAP5ZJKQYbMX3bC2EuIdJHqVemkEOaqgPXslk3zxV4mLWTBf6TwwnxMGdARMenU4qtlIMnu9SMZI2Fqi64lZJNH7ZFG7UcPkrPe75R5x_NPctA2idpUltluqg-VC3srJhb813d5o58NseJ5DlVuvYgRxSpRsRAcvDsLV0raSMeIUTO5GZ1fQaVHkQjfKdpsTw1S5WnnIDIsECpEyG2izGSsBmfRSJBmswMh4TINl3ra6TZE0ro%3D)
You might be a good candidate for the Horizon AX if you meet the following criteria:

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee479adaeec74f5bb7ba8727da59efa6&_e=HxKyGHsQ7xs31Z-wWKM0nASvuuecT6mjm6VCDE_UKT6dtGfosSfd6_0PTZMqvaQghEyr77jcfwVXqFrjdGqouv_o_rphVoBXOPTEwZW1Yd3Zc9-LOIFS0Brm2KkQvJ4_U0ZFAjEPMZgIqUYayM-FdJbSyrl8jyi-CKWetXwAZNRvk7ASGVsC-SknDFPZiyg6lxs_RsCSZDI6zrgNmsV0wQ2PGdZw882cTkykpXEqgP1QCqoEimwypw8DKCAP5ZJKQYbMX3bC2EuIdJHqVemkEOaqgPXslk3zxV4mLWTBf6TwwnxMGdARMenU4qtlIMnu9SMZI2Fqi64lZJNH7ZFG7cMADazDoiVWV5GLa8haeknWoOPeamyOanO16KjAZovwLWOaQgeeS7A_4otaGMUOmgMG1Uf4Edfb5-BoIn1QBbu2ZRxW5MlvL03Kdh3rliuQeX5HITapbfRWz-HU8zL6BjLzHNnElawxjb8Sir_zbnA%3D) | • 50 years or older

Well, it's certainly true for the latest breakthrough in hearing tech: a device that packs an extraordinary amount of power into a truly tiny design. Two years ago, our engineers unveiled the virtually invisible Horizon hearing aids and it quickly became a best-seller. Now, they're back with yet another innovation--Horizon AX--and experts are calling itthe biggest upgrade in sound and speech clarity the industry has ever seen. The big upgrade: Horizon AX has the world's first-ever dual processing system, meaning it has not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips. And with double the power comes double the clarity... You might be a good candidate for the Horizon AX if you meet the following criteria: | | • 50 years or older • Having trouble hearing • Live in the U.S. ---|--- Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Letitia James
subject: Abortion rights are on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Last week, reproductive freedom was once again on the ballot.
| | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68200638/422260072/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1165-fr-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzYjMyZC03MDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px9DOMwB-2TUdUorwbBwMd-j30YcTf1AwwMZnuIxcLo=)
---
**Peter, last week, reproductive freedom was once again on the ballot.**
By a margin of 57% to 43%, Ohio voters rejected a measure that would have made it harder to add amendments to the state constitution – such as an amendment that would enshrine abortion rights.
**That means that Ohio's pending abortion amendment will only need to pass by a 50% plus one margin when it's on the ballot this November.**
Peter, while this is a cause for celebration, it also serves as a grim reminder of the current state of our reproductive freedom. Without the protection of Roe v. Wade, the reproductive rights of millions will continue to be on the ballot, year after year.
That's why we _need_ strong fighters for reproductive rights in every level of government – from local offices all the way up to Washington, D.C. And, Peter, I vow to be that person for New York.
I have been working hard to ensure that New York remains a safe haven for _all_ seeking an abortion. I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund.
**And I'm not done fighting yet.[So I have to ask you, with the reproductive rights of millions on the line, will you support my fight for progress and equality by making a donation to my campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68200639/422260073/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1165-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzYjMyZC03MDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Px9DOMwB-2TUdUorwbBwMd-j30YcTf1AwwMZnuIxcLo=)**

clean_body: Last week, reproductive freedom was once again on the ballot. | | | | = Peter, last week, reproductive freedom was once again on the ballot. By a margin of 57% to 43%, Ohio voters rejected a measure that would have made it harder to add amendments to the state constitution – such as an amendment that would enshrine abortion rights. That means that Ohio's pending abortion amendment will only need to pass by a 50% plus one margin when it's on the ballot this November. Peter, while this is a cause for celebration, it also serves as a grim reminder of the current state of our reproductive freedom. Without the protection of Roe v. Wade, the reproductive rights of millions will continue to be on the ballot, year after year. That's why we need strong fighters for reproductive rights in every level of government – from local offices all the way up to Washington, D.C. And, Peter, I vow to be that person for New York. I have been working hard to ensure that New York remains a safe haven for all seeking an abortion. I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund. And I'm not done fighting yet.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| | | Fellow American, I know you get a lot of emails, but **DO NOT DELETE THIS.**

**We’ve EXTENDED our mid-month deadline to[tomorrow at midnight](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a3d59c027f02452c991d12350980b335&_e=F2NXFdEwadI-acRVNXCRfAagulKVtGWWYPasF9yBxsZd-CgQSBvRuA99-1O2fgUCjWlPd3Yz-MYKs2SF1MJeZhtdhVD36D4znTZup1wUwnYmOPvNtxbuWuRTVYKRfPNan7xHoSFkJ0emBHdL2f0xOMQn8NsM4HnPUUG4wxJkyh-9LABFtm93iJedhhVZF3s6YfeWb6XT_DLZDYWfd-EqmcKEZ-vx1zXrHdmjaI-MUgmUHSnWpLEq4lwsBWXwX46lsIHCPv6FM1XwQyZUn4imOs81IkTxvdVkPbfVoYS76DB44goSjlktUvN4qsP958rVS9WJoi4iGN0Qconiq1X8OVnUS_cxRupRSTFbg82MfkI31RLBScISQyB3jgG6uY6ApvDYUNC6bW-Vz36P4SngCP8xIcVDhoQYbkygNxJ6vb4%3D), and we need to build all the momentum we possibly can in the coming hours.**

As of midnight last night, we were **129 donors short of where we needed to be for our mid-month benchmark. **

With this deadline extension, we can make up for lost time - but we must act quickly.

**[Please, pitch in before TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT so we can meet our EXTENDED mid-month deadline and WIN in Missouri!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a3d59c027f02452c991d12350980b335&_e=F2NXFdEwadI-acRVNXCRfAagulKVtGWWYPasF9yBxsZd-CgQSBvRuA99-1O2fgUCjWlPd3Yz-MYKs2SF1MJeZhtdhVD36D4znTZup1wUwnYmOPvNtxbuWuRTVYKRfPNan7xHoSFkJ0emBHdL2f0xOMQn8NsM4HnPUUG4wxJkyh-9LABFtm93iJedhhVZF3s6YfeWb6XT_DLZDYWfd-EqmcKEZ-vx1zXrHdmjaI-MUgmUHSnWpLEq4lwsBWXwX46lsIHCPv6FM1XwQyZUn4imOqRCGI43E5k-DDrvPsb4jpwRzEa1HWLOLP8VyUHjtI8g0wXdbjko61tQWhf82O9xA3d9indZYds8SycPF9PyeWb0sIrXJ_7m5BfPKyd4phgAFAPZnJrEjH9oPE2jqptdhNfJTzlCFBT8P0VB4999KjE%3D)**

It’s no secret why Marjorie Taylor Greene is helping Kevin McCarthy to try and defeat me. She knows that my seat is critical for Democrats to take back the House, but if we lose... Kevin McCarthy keeps the Speaker’s gavel and she gets another two years on the House Oversight and Homeland Security committees.
**That’s why I’m now the top target of the extreme MAGA wing of the Republican Party.**
I won’t sugar coat it: I’m very concerned about what these MAGA extremists could do to our democracy if we don’t win back the House. If they somehow manage to win a trifecta of control over our government, there’s no telling how much damage they would do. We absolutely cannot let that happen.
**[So can you please rush in a donation right now to help me fight back against the millions of dollars Marjorie Taylor Greene could fund in attack ads?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68201194/422262046/1156059191?&refcode=E3766-20230816-MTG2-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk5NzNiNjctNzQzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pFr-YcrTaK9ufHXjXt_ECuZrePvCpPHTfztI2GnTAwQ=)**

Josh

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Wear sunscreen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s not too corny: contact your Congress Member today.
#
Skin cancer is the most common form of cancer in the United States. 1 in 5 Americans will get it in their lifetime.
Yet, our sunscreen technology is far behind the rest of the world. **The last time the FDA approved a new UV filter to block sun damage was in 1996.** Since then, the EU has approved 30 new UV filters.
The FDA regulates sunscreen as a drug, rather than a cosmetic. That should be a good thing, because we want to ensure consumer safety, but these regulations are not actually working as intended. A Sloan-Kettering study found that **half of U.S. sunscreens provide _less_ protection than their European counterparts.**1
[We deserve stronger protection against skin cancer. Today, we’re asking you to email your Member of Congress and ask them to strengthen the FDA’s regulatory process and fund public research into sunscreen filters.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/em-sunscreen/?source=em20230816-4823-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4823%2E2526796%2ExC7j7r)
**[Email Your Rep Now →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/em-sunscreen/?source=em20230816-4823-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&t=2&akid=4823%2E2526796%2ExC7j7r)**
In addition to providing better protection, many European and Asian sunscreens are also easier to apply and don’t leave a white cast. That’s because foreign sunscreen makers have access to active ingredients that the FDA hasn’t yet approved. This isn’t just a cosmetic issue. When sunscreens are easy to use, people will use them more — and that equals better sun protection.
We know there are a lot of important issues out there you can spend your time organizing around. But as the United Farm Workers said, **sun protection is a working-class issue.** We just need your help to make it a priority in Washington.
[It’s not too corny: ask your Representative to improve FDA regulation and fund public research into sunscreen filters → ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/em-sunscreen/?source=em20230816-4823-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4823%2E2526796%2ExC7j7r)
**[Send an Email](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/em-sunscreen/?source=em20230816-4823-P_ORG_EXP_ORG&t=4&akid=4823%2E2526796%2ExC7j7r)**
Thank you for being part of our movement.

clean_body: It’s not too corny: contact your Congress Member today. Skin cancer is the most common form of cancer in the United States. 1 in 5 Americans will get it in their lifetime. Yet, our sunscreen technology is far behind the rest of the world. The last time the FDA approved a new UV filter to block sun damage was in 1996. Since then, the EU has approved 30 new UV filters. The FDA regulates sunscreen as a drug, rather than a cosmetic. That should be a good thing, because we want to ensure consumer safety, but these regulations are not actually working as intended. A Sloan-Kettering study found that half of U.S. sunscreens provide less protection than their European counterparts.1 In addition to providing better protection, many European and Asian sunscreens are also easier to apply and don’t leave a white cast. That’s because foreign sunscreen makers have access to active ingredients that the FDA hasn’t yet approved. This isn’t just a cosmetic issue. When sunscreens are easy to use, people will use them more — and that equals better sun protection. We know there are a lot of important issues out there you can spend your time organizing around. But as the United Farm Workers said, sun protection is a working-class issue. We just need your help to make it a priority in Washington. Thank you for being part of our movement. In solidarity, Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Our Pro-Life Fight Has Just Begun
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Are you with us | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12619041?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=66fbb55acc&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Our anticipation over a victory with the initial Heartbeat Act turned into heartbreak when it failed to advance to Final Reading in the spring. But, Republicans didn’t give up on our Pro-life values. _We demonstrated perseverance and achieved a true WIN_ when the **Let Them Grow Act** and Heartbeat Act were combined and passed This single subject bill **NOW** prohibits health care providers from performing gender transition surgeries and restricts access to gender-affirming medical treatment to anyone under the age of 19 – **AND also bans most abortions after 12 weeks!**

Just last week, Lancaster County District Court Judge dismissed a legal challenge brought by Planned Parenthood against this bill, alleging that the Let Them Grow Act violated the state’s single-subject rule. Gratefully, Judge Maret ruled that all parts of the bill relate to health care!

_Even with these incredible achievements_ , **we know that life begins at conception**. It is our moral duty to continue onward in the mission of protecting and cherishing the blessing of life. **[Nebraskans, are you proud to be Pro-Life?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=04bac88efd&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2ae6dd4d7f&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [ANSWER NOW »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=16794ef7a7&e=25844e23a8 "ANSWER NOW »")
---
| Peter, it’s essential that we make our voices heard for the sanctity of life. Afterall, we have the shared triumph of knowing that such efforts literally save precious lives!

We must move forward in spreading the message of love, compassion, and the respect for life.

Let’s shape a future where being Pro-Life is embraced with pride as part of our heritage as Americans for generations to come!
---
| Respectfully,

Todd Watson - Political Director
Republican Party of Nebraska
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Last year, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I won’t forget the obstruction and hurdles Republicans threw our way when we passed this bill, and you shouldn’t either. |
#
Team — One year ago today, President Biden signed the historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ into law. This landmark achievement delivers on so many progressive promises: 💊 Lower prescription drug prices and capping out-of-pocket expenses
🌎 40% reduction of greenhouse gas emissions by 2030
💼 A minimum corporate tax rate of 15%
👷 The largest investment in clean energy jobs in history
💰 Measures that will cut inflation and tackle rising costs And one year later? We’ve seen real, tangible progress made: ☀️ The largest solar project in Minnesota broke ground in Becker, paving the way for thousands of homes powered by solar energy
📈 More manufacturing and green energy jobs in Minnesota
💲 Money back in the pockets of hard-working families through rebates on high-efficiency homeware and electric vehicles Folks, I’m incredibly proud of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ — it represents everything good legislation should do: delivering relief and results for hard-working families, while making a tangible difference for the future of our country. But we can’t forget — not a single Republican member of Congress voted for this legislation. Not one! And while _many_ of my GOP colleagues are touting the positive impacts for their states, they’re glossing over the fact that they _opposed_ this legislation. I won’t forget the obstruction and hurdles Republicans threw our way when we passed this bill, and you shouldn’t either. **[It’s abundantly clear: if we want to keep making progress for a cleaner, growing economy, we need to protect our Democratic Senate majority. name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, this is a longer email, but I hope you will take the time to read it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Together, we’ll continue investing in America. | | |
---
Peter,
One year ago, I signed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ into law -- one of the most significant laws in recent history. This pivotal piece of legislation will continue to help grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out by:
* **Lowering costs for working families** by including crucial provisions that lower consumer electricity bills, cap insulin costs at $35 a month and cap out-of-pocket drug costs at $2,000 for seniors on Medicare. It also allows Medicare to meaningfully negotiate drug prices, with the number of drugs covered steadily increasing.

* **Spurring job creation and economic opportunity.** Thanks to this legislation, American manufacturing is back -- in fact, manufacturing construction doubled in the last year thanks to investments in clean energy. We’re securing good-paying jobs in our own communities so that hardworking families across the country have the opportunities they deserve to get ahead.

* **Taking our most aggressive action ever in confronting the climate crisis** and strengthening our country’s energy security by putting America on a path to reduce emissions. The law also offers working families thousands of dollars in savings by providing rebates for more efficient appliances and weatherizing homes, and tax credits for heat pumps and rooftop solar which can help get us to 80% clean energy by 2030.

* **The law makes the wealthy pay their fair share** by cracking down on tax evasion, and requiring large corporations to pay at least a 15% minimum tax, raising nearly $300 billion over a decade to invest back into our communities.

My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. This bill is giving folks across the country exactly that: _a little more breathing room._ With this law, the American people won, and special interests lost. The _Inflation Reduction Act_ offered proof that the soul of America is vibrant, the future of America is bright, and the promise of America is real. **Peter, I’ve never had more hope in the promise of America. But our work will not be completed until we make the promise of this country real for everybody -- no matter their race, their identity, their ethnicity, or their faith.** [That’s why Kamala and I are running for reelection -- and why I’m asking for your support today. clean_body: Together, we’ll continue investing in America. | | | Peter, One year ago, I signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law -- one of the most significant laws in recent history. This pivotal piece of legislation will continue to help grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out by: Lowering costs for working families by including crucial provisions that lower consumer electricity bills, cap insulin costs at $35 a month and cap out-of-pocket drug costs at $2,000 for seniors on Medicare. It also allows Medicare to meaningfully negotiate drug prices, with the number of drugs covered steadily increasing. Spurring job creation and economic opportunity. Thanks to this legislation, American manufacturing is back -- in fact, manufacturing construction doubled in the last year thanks to investments in clean energy. We’re securing good-paying jobs in our own communities so that hardworking families across the country have the opportunities they deserve to get ahead. Taking our most aggressive action ever in confronting the climate crisis and strengthening our country’s energy security by putting America on a path to reduce emissions. The law also offers working families thousands of dollars in savings by providing rebates for more efficient appliances and weatherizing homes, and tax credits for heat pumps and rooftop solar which can help get us to 80% clean energy by 2030. The law makes the wealthy pay their fair share by cracking down on tax evasion, and requiring large corporations to pay at least a 15% minimum tax, raising nearly $300 billion over a decade to invest back into our communities. My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. This bill is giving folks across the country exactly that: a little more breathing room. With this law, the American people won, and special interests lost. The Inflation Reduction Act offered proof that the soul of America is vibrant, the future of America is bright, and the promise of America is real. Peter, I’ve never had more hope in the promise of America. But our work will not be completed until we make the promise of this country real for everybody -- no matter their race, their identity, their ethnicity, or their faith. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for being a part of this grassroots team, Joe Joe Biden

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51535?t=6&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51535?t=7&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51535?t=8&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51535?t=9&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51535?t=10&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9927%2E878179%2E89guBk)
---

subject: You & me in Milwaukee.

body:
I’d like you to be in the audience during the first Presidential Debate. Chip in any amount for a chance to be there.
