Fellow American,

One week from today, I'll be in Milwaukee, WI getting ready to take the stage for the First Presidential Debate.

**I am looking forward to participating in my first political debate.** I want to give Americans the chance to hear the TRUTH directly from me.

To help build excitement from Team Vivek, I want YOU to be my special guest at the debate. I asked my team to hold two tickets for our top supporters. We'll pay for travel and accommodations for one lucky winner and their guest to Milwaukee.

To be in the running, **[chip in any amount before 11:59 pm on Thursday, August 17th.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0cacb31c7bd44b9e97c47acf33b86408&_e=UMGz4RqjwfpBio1wtkNlJq7lZpOQm-n4IpTF_P_EwkZZO5ulkMhEWHufz3u84Bqy2HzBGUuweWD_ouwPA4x1A0ocbXDZQ2pphnbMiRmL-UmQ7i4nQeTTAM_BF8m-QvhzUxhPVjFbeFYsPOd_AQR5IHEGfWd5I1fQCzf0zLGnEjo_T8y8eFBXU8qEN-vQGuHVUYTme8c7YV-VidffKt9HQJGItfbEgaWG40EuFnAH90LfyNWu0BrjRYeqBk_KVF0lUT4wObd_ydesGwXptyT-uAjKHRiqdLIeCelIQCKBYgxQpaZrg4SPINQvYh6Hbq6GxAOapUOWatSg_bjT4vS5Nby4OlM8aEO4gdKjJ5E7Yb3KttwyW-GP7kLen4eESTtKntVXxT9iu8ELHpQL58MNf8waUFmU11fXY3QkDAw4vISpnzWTMrJqCKZyGY74X2eu)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0cacb31c7bd44b9e97c47acf33b86408&_e=UMGz4RqjwfpBio1wtkNlJq7lZpOQm-n4IpTF_P_EwkZZO5ulkMhEWHufz3u84Bqy2HzBGUuweWD_ouwPA4x1A0ocbXDZQ2pphnbMiRmL-UmQ7i4nQeTTAM_BF8m-QvhzUxhPVjFbeFYsPOd_AQR5IHEGfWd5I1fQCzf0zLGnEjo_T8y8eFBXU8qEN-vQGuHVUYTme8c7YV-VidffKt9HQJGItfbEgaWG40EuFnAH90LfyNWu0BrjRYeqBk_KVF0lUT4wObd_ydesGwXptyT-uHci6w4jg72VCUFyw5Fp-NPC0-lYPI8to09vB3QxTJvu3QlZrpsl8RMZpZDjYDrD5UduN6-_HgLxCY1Vp19FDoU29OM3Ad6vQEQSZKp7c4oN-YeXomotPeOys0ouwK21xQTakEge8TuVRhakTc01KXOC3TWSMCk8jQO4BuI7Acw3)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I’d like you to be in the audience during the first Presidential Debate. Chip in any amount for a chance to be there. | | Fellow American, One week from today, I'll be in Milwaukee, WI getting ready to take the stage for the First Presidential Debate. I am looking forward to participating in my first political debate. I want to give Americans the chance to hear the TRUTH directly from me. To help build excitement from Team Vivek, I want YOU to be my special guest at the debate. I asked my team to hold two tickets for our top supporters. We'll pay for travel and accommodations for one lucky winner and their guest to Milwaukee. To be in the running, I hope you're our lucky winner, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. Entering to win is easy. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: Nirali, Deputy Finance Director
subject: Keeping it real (and short)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey I’m Lateefah’s finance director, and I’m quickly firing off this email to give **you** a critical campaign update.
**TLDR; Right now, we’re not where we need to be.** I hate emails where I have to be the bearer of bad news, but I need to keep it real with you because you are one of our top supporters — **we simply aren’t on pace to raise what we need in August.**
Before our mid-month deadline **tonight** , I’m asking you, personally, if you’ll consider giving your first contribution of $5 or more. I have a personal link handy for you to use:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230816?refcode=em-topsupporter-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230816&?amount=5&refcode=em20230816)**
We’re only hours away from our deadline, so this is urgent. The next few hours set the tone for the rest of the month and the entire end of the summer. Please, help us close our fundraising gap. I’ll be eternally grateful if you chip in whatever makes sense, tonight.
Thank you for supporting our movement for change,
Nirali
Deputy Finance Director
Lateefah for Congress
P.S. **I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t serious, so here’s the link again for you to contribute. Thank you****.**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230816?refcode=em-topsupporter-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230816&?amount=5&refcode=em20230816)**

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJX4h8lCrA-GL73Or4HQzx3ON8pRBNjuOOAELkvirBz7wymWZQiAPdap-JnGz177f49YnQ_OD5wsEw3MYZhr6IXcYoqtdLSm6pf4yCfKg60Rv9l132H0FbnAiRM4wKe5DA1uW9OngTj9EEEfGzBCcxPg%3D%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJyXAb6vdYRycIK1cGsjM40ggBkDhtj5-kRzCuG2fo-bcRTgquLDGzBtJm4Ysg0YuwHv3jRWMUYS-f8UUtCGodr68wTfWK1oAssAeeUNb7EhykFp2KMrmMh7zAUgN9tsoFilFKb9gHz0G6x_H1pKakSw%3D%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJTq-_q_qpL5Ze64NyZx8ur0vTkiTHJaOsIg-B3SO7ccq5nDuuJQbSscTAvgs1u_usjfUMB5aTKYNaXj2gtV3_-FgcjuO1FmGfCWX6-KrfTP8ydcQMFjEJwIprC7zz07hwJgR9XVYuPt6Q2sXyrrL2fw%3D%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJQ69u8sCry2swNnMkqYsiMWq9DuJcxFztu3mh4lAFpmVlkuFWnQeIfbtHutpZIaMbeUoBTmvC6mIMBGjZVkS1iJVUHrfLlhZhERaQkV3vZKPtW2LNDcw-3rLoeaDh6jzPaB-5vzClsdva_8XauxCgKA%3D%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJTnEP8aiZGtOojWyrqGNEe8h2y_P5JJpS0daPECNkrVJXvSumnJwtDZ6yBpLrgHswM0qSyar-4lJejIHOlCQEpNlqTLNlNpgmn1Pnm0q6afdpNkfbQ-lZvg5MXHjei975cZb54qOuHsdpCvU2ISgdNQ%3D%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87c9d481ee81437283f363ee32b4a4f6&_e=-u7wCBOz45_mwbt0WaFUciAS6cbECjxVptvudvANkvVN9D1HOZtBjea4G97ypLHkbctdEAEQoac1zpUyFx9t10kFHkebUOtCXlBTD87AK__92pIjOBKe2VfXM97PGzOMz0XZTJG90yOnjLub3TfIIDYrC6aEyDRIoPp7kRH2XbdGU4W9Dbt7vz2nOlChQVqJn2ffl5K4Z3onYOIxMykP_OCaLJuewmYC4X3otGwy5HmsOVTCz_pmPCpLdbev0-hF_Y9vF5ZfxbX_k2rRIS9KrQnf3I26GU9Pyy9yzEaYiSTZdoC6lN97K1nEWuekH_jqDnr13T5gul3xzg-5NP4fQQ%3D%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: This time last year…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek – do you remember this time last year? I sure do. This time last year, we were in the heat of campaign season (_literally!_), talking with voters in every corner of Pennsylvania about the issues that matter most to them. **Everything – from the right to vote to the right to choose – was on the line. But we came together as a broad coalition and sent a clear message: in Pennsylvania, real freedom will always prevail.** And now, our hard work is paying off. We just passed the biggest increase in Basic Education Funding in Pennsylvania history, we’re opening up the doors of opportunity for our workers, and giving universal free breakfast to every public school student. Looking back, our victory was far from certain – but it’s because of this grassroots team that we’re now able to make our vision for Pennsylvania a reality. But we can’t let far-right extremists stand in our way and undo all of the progress we’ve made together. name: TN House Democrats
subject: Thank you, Murfreesboro!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/IMG_8394.JPEG]
The overwhelming response from Rutherford County and surrounding areas during last night’s "Our Kids Deserve Better" bus tour was inspiring. Murfreesboro has been our largest stop yet! It's increasingly clear that the majority of Tennesseans are firmly in favor of sensible gun safety laws in our state. We are fully committed to continuing our legislative efforts to protect Tennessee children.
Our journey across Tennessee ahead of next week’s special session continues. Tonight, we are in Chattanooga. Achieving meaningful progress in addressing the pervasive issue of gun violence that affects all of our communities requires a sustained, united endeavor. Our determination remains unshaken, and we urge you to share the same unwavering resolve.
We must break this GOP supermajority to make progress. To do so, we must flip ten seats. This is no easy task, but we are committed to the work.
Can you chip in $100, $50, or even $25 dollars today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourkidsdeservebetter] to join us and help amplify our message of promoting gun safety throughout every corner of Tennessee?

Murfreesboro has been our largest stop yet! It's increasingly clear that the majority of Tennesseans are firmly in favor of sensible gun safety laws in our state. We are fully committed to continuing our legislative efforts to protect Tennessee children. Our journey across Tennessee ahead of next week’s special session continues. Tonight, we are in Chattanooga. Achieving meaningful progress in addressing the pervasive issue of gun violence that affects all of our communities requires a sustained, united endeavor. Our determination remains unshaken, and we urge you to share the same unwavering resolve. We must break this GOP supermajority to make progress. To do so, we must flip ten seats. | | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let the two newborn orca calves die of starvation before they’re even given names!** [**Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _**TWO baby orcas**_ were just born into the same Southern Resident killer whale pod as the beloved, deceased matriarch Marina. Given that _**69%**_ of orca pregnancies end in **miscarriage** , we’re thrilled to welcome these newborn calves into the world! Sadly, there is a part of us that is extremely worried, Friend. You see, the mortality rate for newborn orcas is as _**high as 50%**_ — so they must survive **at least a year after birth** before even receiving names. Vulnerable and weak, surviving their very first year isn’t going to be easy for these two little creatures. Especially not with corporate overfishing and bycatch **depleting Chinook salmon populations** , leaving orcas _starving and malnourished. _ These endangered orcas are clinging to survival, and the birth of these two new babies is a hopeful sign of recovery. But if the helpless calves are going to have a chance at life, we MUST replenish the Chinook salmon populations immediately. [**The two newborn orcas are counting on us to be their voice to stand up to greedy fishing corporations. Will you speak up now?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932298?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If the two newborn orcas had been born at a different time, maybe their future would look a bit brighter. The Pacific Northwest waters were once abundantly flowing with food supply for orcas — before industrial overfishing contributed to a _**loss of 159 salmon populations.**_ _**That’s almost HALF of the historic salmon runs!**_
Unfortunately for these baby whales, the Southern Resident orca population is at its _LOWEST_ point since the 1970’s. The threats to orcas have gotten so severe that scientists predict these beloved marine animals could be completely _**EXTINCT**_ within the **next few decades.**
With the odds stacked against them, these helpless newborn orcas are going to need all of the support that they can get. But unless the National Marine Fisheries Services (NMFS) holds the industrial fishing industry accountable for _**DECIMATING orcas’ critical food source**_ , the lives of these baby orcas could soon be cut short before they’ve even fully begun. [**Please, , we can’t let the two newborn orcas starve to death. Add your name to tell NMFS to STOP corporate overfishing and bycatch and protect endangered orcas >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932300?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 4
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** I learned to swim at the U.S. Embassy swimming pool in Niamey, Niger, in 1976. Little did I know, that would lead to a career as a U.S. Navy diver. It wasn’t pool parties, picnics or watching movies at the Recreation Center that prompted my 25-year career as a special operations officer. It was the Marines from the Security Guard Detachment that stood watch at the embassy all day, every day. Now, Joe Biden has abandoned his sixth U.S. Embassy in less than three years. Those small plots of land were a sanctuary for those who sought refuge, a beacon of hope in the darkest moments. Now more than ever, we need strong leadership in Washington, D.C. It’s time to stop surrendering. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | August 16, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 4 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) I learned to swim at the U.S. Embassy swimming pool in Niamey, Niger, in 1976. Little did I know, that would lead to a career as a U.S. Navy diver. It wasn’t pool parties, picnics or watching movies at the Recreation Center that prompted my 25-year career as a special operations officer. It was the Marines from the Security Guard Detachment that stood watch at the embassy all day, every day. Now, Joe Biden has abandoned his sixth U.S. Embassy in less than three years. Those small plots of land were a sanctuary for those who sought refuge, a beacon of hope in the darkest moments. Now more than ever, we need strong leadership in Washington, D.C. It’s time to stop surrendering. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | In Case You Missed It CAPT Hung Cao’s USN (RET) discussed Biden’s feckless leadership in his latest op-ed published by Fox News. In less than three years, Biden has surrendered six U.S. embassies and left a leadership void in the world. Check out what he had to say . Hung Cao joined the O’Connor Tonight show to discuss his race for United States Senate, the importance of taking back the majority in the Senate, and the threat of foreign adversaries to our country under Biden’s feckless leadership. | | | Store If you haven't picked up your Hung Cao gear yet, check out our online store! | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #TeamCao! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading. name: Darrell Day
subject: Darrell Day for CD32
body:
Peter,

Thank you for offering to help on the campaign, and welcome to the team!

Tell me a little bit about yourself. What has attracted you to the campaign, and what issues are important to you?

You might know that I ran for this seat two years ago, but started too late. This time, we started running early (we’ve already been endorsed by FIFTY GOP Precinct Chairs) and have built a strong campaign team. Peter, I’m looking forward to working with you to win back this seat for the GOP!!

Darrell Day
Candidate, U.S. Congress

clean_body: Let's retire this out-of-touch windbag! | Peter, do you have a moment for a conversation? Ohio's Far-left Senator, Democrat Sherrod Brown, has promoted policies that harm everyday Ohioans and make life harder for ordinary Americans. Can we finally get a Senator who will fight for the needs of every Ohioan rather than a politician who only fights for the far left? Senator Brown votes with Joe Biden 98% of the time, and when asked about our ongoing crisis at the southern border, he's said on the record, "I only hear about that from people on the far-right." Hundreds of thousands of Americans have died due to overdoses associated with lethal narcotics that came through the southern border -- we must RETIRE Sherrod Brown! | This is why your support is so desperately needed. Sherrod Brown has the FULL support of Hollywood and powerful Far-left special interest groups, and they'll be spending unprecedented sums of money for him. Senator Brown has a ton of gall to think that putting on a hard hat and posing for a photoshoot will make people forget how he has made their life MORE MISERABLE by voting with Joe Biden almost 100% of the time. Americans are yearning for a change in Washington D.C., and Sherrod Brown has been a part of the problem for TOO long. Thank you, and God Bless, Senate Battleground Alerts PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: We Don't Want Woke Math.
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-awhujt-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning! It's Wednesday. Retirees face a[ _$17,400 cut_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-y/) if Social Security isn't saved.**
**Trump Indicted Again** Former President **[Trump and 18 of his allies and supporters](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-j/)** were indicted late Monday by a Georgia grand jury. Meanwhile, the Georgia court is **[trying to explain](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-t/)** why a copy of the indictment was posted Monday before the jury's job was finished. **Woke Math** **[The term"social justice" appears over 200 times in the new math standards.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-i/) **The authors of the standards also assert that the goal of the curriculum is to make mathematics more "equitable." _This is worse than common core._ **She's a Disaster** A day after Biden drew sharp criticism for declining to comment on the rising death toll in Hawaii, his spokeswoman**[Karine Jean-Pierre fumbled her response to the crisis.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-d/)** **Hunter's Lawyer Wants Out** One of Hunter**[Biden's attorneys filed a motion to withdraw](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-h/) **from the younger Biden's case after his failed plea deal and diversion agreement. Now we learn that everyone involved was **[trying to rush Hunter's case!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-k/)**

**Young People Aren't Happy with Biden** A new poll shows that **[young people are disappointed](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-u/)** in Biden and his presidency. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-p/)!**
* Elon is **[taunting Zuck](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-x/)**!
* This is **[brilliant](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Yuck](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-c/).**
* **[_Never s_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-q/)[top](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-a/) learning.**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awhujt-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: 🆕 Women's Group
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob [fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob]
Identity politics is for the birds.
I'm running for Congress to represent all of us.
Identity politics can be limiting and divisive. As a candidate for Congress, I aim to represent and serve all individuals, transcending the boundaries of my identity.
JOIN WOMEN FOR DR. BOB [fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob]
fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob [fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob]
,
Please join the group [fb.com/groups/womenfordrbob] for free, but if you're able and haven't recently contributed, these programs require funds. A contribution from you today [drbob.me/aboutbob] will fuel our goal to ignite a women-led movement to not just support me as an outspoken advocate for women's rights, but establish a platform so women of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula can make a big impact on these issues in rural America, where far too often, politicians are on the wrong side.
I will not be on the wrong side of human rights.
We need fighters in rural America, and I've proudly been on the front lines of women's healthcare for nearly 40 years. Your donation will go directly toward advocacy and awareness regarding:
*
Reproductive
Healthcare
*
Equal
pay
*
Employment
opportunities
*
Maternity
care
*
Bodily
autonomy
*
Education
*
Sexual
assault
prevention
*
Domestic
violence
awareness
If you've saved your payment with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend, I have cared for and learned from a diverse range of patients throughout my career as a physician. Their unique differences did not affect the quality of care I provided. I will bring the same approach to serving my constituents.
We must see beyond our own identity.
Politics should be like healing medicine. Operate from compassion and empathy, look beyond ourselves, and help everyone, whether you've lived in their shoes or not. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I will fight for reproductive rights because I know what it's like to be in a patient's room with a pregnant woman in the most vulnerable situation of their life, uncertain if she can survive the birth of a viable, healthy infant.
But, my ultimate goal is to unite all people in Northern Michigan and the UP, even if we don't see eye to eye. I will utilize the skills and wisdom I have gained to support you, your friends, and your families to the best of my abilities.
We are all neighbors. We all belong here. Join Women for Dr. Bob on Facebook today [https://www.facebook.com/groups/womenfordrbob] or contribute to our effort [http://drbob.me/aboutbob] to have all voices heard in Congress.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

Our new **Madam Mayors** program — a first-of-its-kind initiative aiming to champion and support woman mayors — gets an exciting new addition today _as we endorse pro-choice champion**Lisa Brown** for mayor of Spokane, WA!_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68202822/422267900/-1667455293?sourceid=1051733&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ0OGI4Yi03YzNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YiqlEgci0I-PSkZjPBteWNg_0wL6Fxtt_9cUkvI7Wog=&emci=a5448b8b-7c3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ac448b8b-7c3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Lisa Brown is one of our 15 endorsed mayors so far this cycle, and she is _exactly_ the leader we need in Eastern Washington — a relatively conservative region of an otherwise blue state. Winning this race will be no easy feat, but Lisa is the woman for the job: She has a proven track record in public service (she was Washington State's first-ever Democratic woman Senate majority leader!) and a career-long commitment to reproductive rights, job creation, and environmentalism.

This race is especially important because of Spokane's proximity to Idaho — one of the most extreme anti-abortion states in the country, and the first to explicitly restrict out-of-state travel for abortions. For this part of the country, pro-choice leadership has _never_ been more critical. **The battle for reproductive freedom is playing out on a local level every single day — and our mayors stand at the frontlines. name: Breaking News TX
subject: Ted Cruz on Trump indictments “I’m pissed”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

body:
| | Peter,

Today marks 3 months since the launch of our campaign, and I’m still blown away by the generosity of people just like you. When I first considered running for Congress, I knew I’d have people standing with me from the start, but your response has been truly humbling.

In the first 6 weeks of our campaign, we raised over $360k, crushing our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! Now, we’re halfway through the next quarter, and we cannot afford to lose any momentum.

I decided to run for Congress knowing I could have a greater impact on my community by repairing systemic issues — **_not in the OR, but through public policy._** As a community leader in Dallas, and as a policy advisor in Washington, D.C., I learned firsthand that real change is possible when we have leaders bold enough to take courageous action — and as a Veteran, trauma surgeon, and gun safety advocate, that’s exactly what I’ll do in Congress.

[But I need YOUR help to get me there. I’m running for re-election, so you know what that means — the map is back!

| Hi Peter,

I’m running for re-election, so you know what that means — _**the map is back!**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68203151/422269102/1712461634?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230816-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVmMjc5Mi03ZTNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iMIoLUgAYCfdnEs4dDfkABT4HFi_rLM_Vq-o-kSsgRw=)
When Republicans look at this map, they see an opportunity to take back the Senate. **The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me, and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024.**

[_**We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Peter, can you split a donation between Susan Wild’s and my campaign to keep PA blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68203152/422269103/1712461634?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230816-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVmMjc5Mi03ZTNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iMIoLUgAYCfdnEs4dDfkABT4HFi_rLM_Vq-o-kSsgRw=)

Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs.

That’s what we can achieve if we earn the votes of Pennsylvanians in every county from Erie to Bucks.

[_**Let’s show the GOP that Pennsylvania is ready for the major fight ahead. Can you split a donation of any amount between Susan Wild’s and my campaign to keep me in the Senate and protect our majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68203153/422269104/1712461634?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230816-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVmMjc5Mi03ZTNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iMIoLUgAYCfdnEs4dDfkABT4HFi_rLM_Vq-o-kSsgRw=)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: they're trying to fight me on twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I'm catching some flak for something I said in a podcast yesterday.
#

Peter -
I'm catching some flak for something I said on a podcast yesterday.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230816-2-nb&t=1&akid=952%2E734936%2EW5NYQU)
I called Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville a shithead over his blockade of military promotions.
And I meant it.
There are now three empty seats on the Joint Chiefs of Staff, alongside over 300 senior promotions. That's Tuberville's fault.
He's hamstrung our military over a Pentagon policy that helps service members travel for reproductive health care and abortions.
If you ask me, that's pretty important to call out.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230816-2-nb&t=2&akid=952%2E734936%2EW5NYQU)
I served in the Marine Corps. I fought in Iraq. If they think some weak tweets are going to scare me off they've got another thing coming.
I'm ready to abolish the filibuster to pass abortion rights. We can get this done. But we won't get the chance if we lose control of the Senate.
That's a big reason I'm running to take Kyrsten Sinema's seat. And that's why I need your help.
[**Can you support my campaign by making your first $3 donation? We can win in Arizona, but we need a TON of donations to get there. And if you chip in, we'll be one step closer to our goal.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230816-2-nb&t=3&akid=952%2E734936%2EW5NYQU)

name: Team Emilia
subject: The power of a grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
While we still have another day before our mid-month deadline, we wanted to take a moment to recognize some of our first grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68203309/422269724/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b2_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZjNDI4YS03ZjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZ_UsI7EdShgmQpTlR8KJndg0LLbll0ymQQrMUmTF6o=)
Peter,

It’s been less than 48 hours since we reached out about [**our $4,500 goal,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68203310/422269725/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.16_b2_te_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZjNDI4YS03ZjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZ_UsI7EdShgmQpTlR8KJndg0LLbll0ymQQrMUmTF6o=) and we’re truly blown away. **Grassroots supporters from across Northeast Ohio and the entire country have been chipping in what they can, when they can** – _and the money is starting to add up._

While we still have another day before our mid-month deadline, we wanted to take a moment to recognize some of our first grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate: **Joseph from Stark County chipped in $3.** _We’re so grateful to have you on our team, Joseph!_

**Kevin from Akron contributed $35.** _Your support means the world, Kevin!_

**Barbara from Cuyahoga Falls gave $25.** _We can’t thank you enough, Barbara!_ Grassroots donors like Joseph, Kevin, and Barbara are at the heart of this campaign. We truly are a people-powered movement – and we would not be here without your support.

**But Peter, we still have $1,550 to raise before tomorrow night, so we need your help to finish strong.**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Not the email we hoped to send you today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This isn’t the email we planned to send today, but after reviewing our
August fundraising numbers so far, it’s the message we need to send you
today.

We fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal by $4,525. Our fundraising
has been on a slow but steady decline since January 2021, so we can’t
afford to miss a single goal that we set.

Imagine Congress without AOC, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, or Jamaal Bowman
championing progressive causes. We recruited each of these transformative
leaders to run for Congress.

We will never scare you into donating like the DCCC. You shouldn’t kiss
all hope goodbye and the sky is not falling.

But we will politely ask: [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137072?refcode=em20230816-30404&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k ]Will you make
your first
contribution of $3 right now to help us make up for this
shortfall?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137072?refcode=em20230816-30404&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k ]→ Yes, I will contribute $3 right now to support Justice
Democrats’ work!

As a grassroots-funded organization, every single contribution we receive
adds up to make a difference.

Thank you for fighting for a better future with us. We know that together,
there is so much more we can achieve.

-Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230816-30404-footer&t=1005&refcode2=30404_1203867_sXlO7k&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=30404%2E1203867%2EsXlO7k

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Even during the summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
We’re reaching out to ask if you'll step up in a big way by **[making your first-ever $5 donation to John Fetterman today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230816-1?refcode=em20230816-1-8508&refcode2=8508_434096_yQoy0n&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)**
**We've seen a little bit of a slowdown in our fundraising.** Here's a behind-the-scenes look at our numbers from ActBlue:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230816-1?refcode=em20230816-1-8508&refcode2=8508_434096_yQoy0n&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)
It can be notoriously difficult to raise money over the summer. Why? Because a lot of folks go on vacation or are generally less plugged in with political news. We get it — most folks want to take advantage of the warmer weather.
_But the truth is that seeing a dip in our fundraising like this — even during the summer — can set us back._
We're leaning on folks like you to make your first contribution to fill the gap in our summer budget.
John is up for this fight, but he needs each of us in his corner. **[Would you be willing to contribute $5 to John Fetterman today? It’ll help us immensely and we’ll be able to get ahead of the summer slump!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230816-1?refcode=em20230816-1-8508&refcode2=8508_434096_yQoy0n&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230816-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230816-8508&refcode2=8508_434096_yQoy0n&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)**
Thank you for being such an important part of Team Fetterman. 💙
– Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230816-8508-footer&t=1&refcode2=8508_434096_yQoy0n&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8508%2E434096%2EyQoy0n)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.

Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. # **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[ **take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception and **[take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1)**

**The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore**. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. **It doesn 't stop there.** Amidst all the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order 14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's sinister attempt to **[end privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial move](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1)**[.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1)

**Imagine a world** where every aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded, scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital Dollar, **[as outlined in the Executive Order](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1),** is portrayed under a sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds via our phones that are ironically under constant full surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence of your privacy. **It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
**
**Your personal choices will no longer be yours to make.** The consequences are profound. The government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very essence of **[your personal freedom is at stake.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1)** **[Act now with urgency](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjj-PozAQxT-N6UAwBhsKitwhrjgp_VWnWf8hs7JjxzabzbdfEUVbbPve-8380EdH9jEz-YsBXEhnBsD4iQHc_t192t_93z_151nWN3H2w1HCbwZQHtF8L19HGuOR3JHKpdIzCrRGV2buxAQAnE9QXeZRjLoF2SrVK9vhgPoNUBor7Ci1tryiGVrg7dgJgBaGoekkKjspK6UZe8CJ9e3zUYPdHVMKwTcq-MrNl1JifhqtDFYXG3TObIRXZbbg9LFisGraqKCrdXAOU52LQZfrmOgD1eNA-boX_z-HPSnD-HLyJpHClVIuDMTReaNp94wviyr6lSn0EWm7_iDGuhNVmnW8k3OUhWR9uz3tVfBfAQAA__8aQnk1)** to embark on a journey toward financial liberation where you not only Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

clean_body: We’re one week away from the least anticipated event of the year: the first GOP presidential debate | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friend, Buckle your seatbelts, grab your popcorn, or take shelter. Do whatever you need to do to prepare yourself for the least anticipated event of the year: the first GOP presidential debate. The countdown is officially on. One week from today, the entire country will see the Republican party and its chaos on full display. Especially with extremism as the main sponsor on this year's debate stage, viewers are sure to see just how embarrassing, yet alive, MAGA is. Now, we understand you may not tune in (catch the next one 😉). But no worries — it's honestly not for everyone, friend. Whether we see Trump routinely steal the mic to complain about the “liberal witch hunt” against him, or cover our ears while Ron DeSantis brags about how “Florida is where woke goes to die,” we can guarantee the first GOP debate will continue to self-destruct the Republican party. | = Regardless of the outcome of the first GOP presidential debate next week, we need to be prepared for whichever MAGA clown they send to the presidential ticket in 2024. Eric is fighting in Congress everyday to expose their corruption and hold these extremists accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = — Team Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. body:
Bad news, Peter. We needed 82 more supporters to step up yesterday before our membership deadline expired – **and we still fell short of goal. **
---
But I just spoke with our finance team, and **we’re officially extending our deadline** – by one more day – to give you the chance to activate your Emerge Community Membership now.
So please, donate any amount today to activate your membership and help Emerge empower Democratic women to run for office, flip seats blue, and fight for our rights across the country.
**Here’s the best link to give: ****[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68203859/422271517/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3M2U1ZGYwLTgwM2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ka37602chl8bBOffQzRyGBlkcYffznktSsBnjuDY6YQ=)**
Thank you for staying in this fight,

Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **A’shanti (personal)**
Date: Tue, Aug 15, 2023
Subject: I'm reaching out while there's still time
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68203860/422271518/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3M2U1ZGYwLTgwM2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ka37602chl8bBOffQzRyGBlkcYffznktSsBnjuDY6YQ=)
---
Peter, I just got an update on our goal, and we still need** 120 more supporters** to activate their Emerge Community Membership by midnight tonight!
We're asking folks to activate their memberships because we're at the forefront of getting trailblazing women of the New American Majority on the ballot. **When you donate to Emerge, you'll help:**
| | | | Fuel Emerge's for-women-by-women programs to shatter glass ceilings in politics.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Ensure that ALL of our communities have a voice in the rooms where decisions are made.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Protect our fundamental rights from far-right attacks in every corner of our country.
|
---|---|---|---
I’m personally reaching out to you because I know you’re as committed as we are to breaking glass ceilings in politics and empowering Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level. **But it’s going to take a collective, community effort!**
**There are only a few hours left, so please don’t wait. Use this link to donate any amount and activate your Emerge Community Membership before our midnight deadline: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68203861/422271519/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3M2U1ZGYwLTgwM2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ka37602chl8bBOffQzRyGBlkcYffznktSsBnjuDY6YQ=)
Transforming politics takes community effort, and we can’t do this work without you. Thank you.
A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: They’ve hit the panic button.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/theyve-hit-the-panic-button?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=4fcbacd301&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

They’ve hit the panic button.

On June 31, my campaign for Congress reported raising $232,000 during the 2nd quarter of 2023, far exceeding expectations. It was especially a wake-up call for my opponent, Democrat Jim Costa, who thought last year was a fluke. If you recall, in September 2022, national polls showed that I was tied with Democrat Jim Costa in the race for the 21st Congressional District.

_**Costa is hitting the panic button, but that’s not the only reason.**_

My campaign's message resonates with voters – and my background as a former FBI agent, Navy Nuclear Submarine operator, and small business owner is a life experience my opponent simply can't touch.

Everywhere I go on the campaign trail, I hear from folks like you who are fed up with the direction of our country. They are looking for solutions to out-of-control violent crime, unchecked government indoctrination in our schools, and foreign governments (think China) tampering and hacking into our critical infrastructure networks and purchasing local farmland.

Democrat Jim Costa and his “woke” policies helped to create many of these problems and made others much worse. It is time to show him the exit door.

I need to double what we raised in the previous quarter. I want to knock the socks off our opponents. I want the Washington D.C. political pundits’ jaws to drop when we report our fundraising totals at the end of September.

But to do it, I must have your help. [Will you give $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to my campaign?](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=d3b2ec7438&e=1722d05e10)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=f556c0d7ca&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Our country is at a crucial crossroads. We have a unique opportunity to end the career of a four-decade liberal politician. **_Will you help me retire Jim Costa?_**

Thank you for your help. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._
---

With only a five-seat margin, Kevin McCarthy and his allies are ready to outspend us to flip frontline seats like Marcy Kaptur's. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Together, Kaptur for Congress | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help Marcy by giving any amount today? = Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. | Hi there,

When I ran for Congress in 2022, my mission was to be an unwavering advocate for West Michiganders. In my first term in Congress, I’ve been advocating every day for the issues that my constituents tell me matter most.

Here’s a list of just a couple of issues I’ve worked on during my time in Congress: **🟠** Ending the gun violence epidemic
**🌎** Combating climate change
**🌊 **Protecting our Great Lakes
**🏥 **Defending reproductive rights
**🏳️🌈 **Protecting LGBTQ rights
**🏥 **Lowering healthcare costs I am proud to advocate for these causes every day, but I also know that progress can never come quickly enough. Here’s a list of just a couple of issues I’ve worked on during my time in Congress: 🟠 Ending the gun violence epidemic 🌎 Combating climate change 🌊 Protecting our Great Lakes 🏥 Defending reproductive rights 🏳️🌈 Protecting LGBTQ rights 🏥 Lowering healthcare costs I am proud to advocate for these causes every day, but I also know that progress can never come quickly enough. = | = | = Anything you can invest today – even $5 – will allow me to stay focused on the issues that matter during my time in Congress, advocating for the priorities of my district instead of worrying about fundraising for the next campaign. = | = | = Gratefully, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Ohioans just scored an incredible victory: We defeated Republicans’ disgusting attempt to change election rules ahead of a critical vote on reproductive freedom. But the biggest fight is yet to come.

We only have 82 days until Election Day, and we’re going to spend every minute talking to voters in every part of the state – from Athens to Zanesville and everywhere in between.

But in order to make that happen, we can’t fall behind on our fundraising goals. At midnight, we’re facing our August mid-month fundraising deadline and we need grassroots support to make sure we hit our $25,000 goal.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
| | | [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=67e58c274ba949dfba4369ad3051eeba&_e=H_HlO6pOm4VxA0ofPhx8rgKI1-9PBiVpGIHy_cwEae117gp9HnAM79p9ssAyY-WiHcQTZe2yP1MjrtoeZpbqoju8w6aJV_wVVtL1YpzQOK22MYRwykvDBver5ln2BY-4QtP3SqkJK6A3yGiXRPGI95A_8Tup6gq1FKO8YfcdDMrx-O-yxqyWYNUPwLCKzgYcFhzG14uF_9oHff9uO75HwvlL7Bv99mRAoLK0hKh8EN_6ArhvhrB7DXMZ1rFHFzt5CQhJubqYlva-L-q1y_A3YswmKpf7CedZIkbYeIEl7kSyJN3mtX7o3RCd49LXSr4HOFT1fFLLT4L-_S48ZiE2coM4ilQfIaHeiXF_i6ZNdLjzxZM5iMh-AZL3aYkVUnqCa-MzI746Z-0mMWo7_h1iSQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=67e58c274ba949dfba4369ad3051eeba&_e=H_HlO6pOm4VxA0ofPhx8rgKI1-9PBiVpGIHy_cwEae117gp9HnAM79p9ssAyY-WiHcQTZe2yP1MjrtoeZpbqoju8w6aJV_wVVtL1YpzQOK22MYRwykvDBver5ln2BY-4QtP3SqkJK6A3yGiXRPGI95A_8Tup6gq1FKO8YfcdDMrx-O-yxqyWYNUPwLCKzgYcFhzG14uF_9oHff9uO75HwvlL7Bv99mRAoLK0hKh8EN_6ArhvhrB7DXMZ1rFHFzt5kcPOgjMrnAkp4vEvydpde-DtI9URhmzG0fvB30TX57OwAvzXe_ii7HryzBItddO7tmWcoImwfTJqvMsHTcdHh9hnzD_4ZnL580xPhUs7bx2TC-RFYuPgXfpm0MZw_P7OcNFTkMlbiAyYIvXrE0L7DA%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Electing Democrats at home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081623_CDPBennet_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081623_CDPBennet_actrs]
Hi folks, Senator Bennet here.
I’ve got an important ask for you, but first, let me explain why I’m emailing you.
When I was first elected in 2010, I won my race by less than 2 points. Colorado was a true battleground state.
Thanks to your hard work, we’ve made huge gains across our state over the past couple of election cycles. Today, we have two Democratic senators, five Democratic Congresspeople, a Democratic governor and a majority in the Colorado General Assembly.
This wouldn’t have been possible without the community of organizers, advocates, and volunteers who stepped up – and we can’t take this progress for granted.
There’s still so much work to do. Republicans have a lock on local offices across the state, including school boards and town councils.
By electing and re-electing Democrats statewide, we’ll continue making strides to protect our public lands; secure reproductive rights; and build an economy that works for everyone, not just a few at the top. We can protect our democracy and leave it stronger for the next generation.
That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and the Colorado Democratic Party. Even $5, $10, or $15 can make a difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081623_CDPBennet_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Colorado Democratic Party and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

The Colorado Democratic Party’s work is indispensable for our mission to elect and re-elect Democrats. We’re laying the groundwork for 2024 to protect the gains we’ve made, defeat MAGA Republicans, and flip local seats blue.
We’re going to need you on this team, friend, to get it done. Split a donation between my campaign and the Colorado Democratic Party today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081623_CDPBennet_actrs]

We’re out in the community every single day talking to voters - and let me tell you, Peter, they’re pretty scared of the direction Republicans are taking this country.
“I’m really concerned about our democracy!” - Richard in Scottsdale
“I want someone who’s gonna really take it to Schweikert” - Susan in Phoenix
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=08162023 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=08162023]Here’s what The People’s Campaign means: It means that we’re knocking on doors talking to voters; it means we’re telling people the unvarnished truth; it means we don’t waffle on our positions; and it sure as hell means we’re going to fight for you and not special interests.
I’ve been a public servant my entire life. My moral compass is your moral compass. My values are your values. My life’s mission is to help people and now I need your help.
David Schweikert votes however the NRA or any other deep-pocketed organization tells him to vote. We’re building a real grassroots campaign that can stand up to the corrupt pressures that weak politicians like Schweikert succumb to every single time.
So, Peter, I need your help: we need to raise $1,500 by midnight to stay on track. If you want a candidate of the people, by the people and for the people, then we need your help. Can you rush in a contribution right now so we can stay on track? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=08162023]
Thanks,
Team Kroemer
