clean_body: [] We’re out in the community every single day talking to voters - and let me tell you, Peter, they’re pretty scared of the direction Republicans are taking this country. “I’m really concerned about our democracy!” - Richard in Scottsdale “I want someone who’s gonna really take it to Schweikert” - Susan in Phoenix [’s what The People’s Campaign means: It means that we’re knocking on doors talking to voters; it means we’re telling people the unvarnished truth; it means we don’t waffle on our positions; and it sure as hell means we’re going to fight for you and not special interests. I’ve been a public servant my entire life. My moral compass is your moral compass. My values are your values. My life’s mission is to help people and now I need your help. David Schweikert votes however the NRA or any other deep-pocketed organization tells him to vote. We’re building a real grassroots campaign that can stand up to the corrupt pressures that weak politicians like Schweikert succumb to every single time. So, Peter, I need your help: we need to raise $1,500 by midnight to stay on track. If you want a candidate of the people, by the people and for the people, then we need your help. Peter, Republican legislators just pushed through a slew of legislation enshrining the right to _discriminate_ against LGBTQ+ North Carolinians. I vetoed their bills, but the GOP used their one-vote supermajorities to pass them anyway. **[We have to defeat the Republican supermajorities so they cannot take their war against LGBTQ+ North Carolinians even further, Peter. You can help by donating immediately to support our fight to break the supermajorities>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68204509/422273733/435245919?refcode=ea.c44f2d37-853c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c44f2d37-853c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDRmMmQzNy04NTNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbd8O8rmf6NOkoU83oMfjRqmh8Wir3tDrfsXg0aNPnQ=)** It’s clear that Republican leadership is focused on the wrong priorities. Instead of working hard to pass a budget and start Medicaid Expansion (that we’ve already agreed to) when North Carolinians are getting kicked off their health plans, they’re choosing to discriminate. Far-right members of the GOP would rather spend their time dividing us — and attacking some of the most vulnerable among us — than doing the work of serving the needs of our communities. subject: The most vulnerable Senator running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Hey—

I’ll keep this quick.

I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. **And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline today.**

National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.

[**That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and Jared Moskowitz to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. subject: Did you see what President Biden said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
In a recent interview with The Weather Channel, President Biden called climate change an “existential threat” facing humanity.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68204585/422273983/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230816-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmE1MTU1LTg2M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QQA8SOMvN0KY7g0BrS32mYtRp4mPGy85u3sq0nLWuSU=)
---
Did you see this? In a recent interview with The Weather Channel, President Biden called climate change an _**“existential threat”**_ facing humanity.

The climate crisis is the most important issue of our lifetime and it’s not just about science anymore. The impacts of climate change are being felt in the form of extreme heat waves, floods, drought, and wildfires across the continent and vulnerable frontline communities are disproportionately facing the brunt of the climate crisis.

While the Biden Administration has made progress on climate with the historic climate investments in the Inflation Reduction Act, he is unfortunately continuing the pattern of approving dangerous fossil fuel projects like Willow, and trading away key environmental protections due to pressure from within his own party.

That’s why it’s important to elect climate champions at every level to pass climate legislation that will have an impact across every state, and we need your help.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to help the Jane Fonda Climate PAC elect more climate champions in 2023 and beyond?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68204586/422273984/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230816-2-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNmE1MTU1LTg2M2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QQA8SOMvN0KY7g0BrS32mYtRp4mPGy85u3sq0nLWuSU=)

clean_body: In a recent interview with The Weather Channel, President Biden called climate change an “existential threat” facing humanity. | = Did you see this? In a recent interview with The Weather Channel, President Biden called climate change an “existential threat” facing humanity. The climate crisis is the most important issue of our lifetime and it’s not just about science anymore. The impacts of climate change are being felt in the form of extreme heat waves, floods, drought, and wildfires across the continent and vulnerable frontline communities are disproportionately facing the brunt of the climate crisis. While the Biden Administration has made progress on climate with the historic climate investments in the Inflation Reduction Act, he is unfortunately continuing the pattern of approving dangerous fossil fuel projects like Willow, and trading away key environmental protections due to pressure from within his own party. That’s why it’s important to elect climate champions at every level to pass climate legislation that will have an impact across every state, and we need your help. = | = We must transition to clean, renewable energy and end the era of fossil fuels to combat planet-warming emissions. But replacing fossil fuel allies in elected office and demanding climate action requires all our grassroots strength. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight to protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team Cori
subject: Toxic waste from Manhattan Project.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
An important victory, but the fight is not over to clean up dangerous contaminated sites. | |
---
Peter, Last week, over 8,300 people signed on in support of Rep. Cori Bush’s _Justice for Jana Elementary Act of 2023_ , which would create a fund to clean up and test schools impacted by toxic radioactive waste from the government’s Manhattan Project. Cori also met with the U.S. Secretary of Energy last week, who oversees the department entrusted with protecting people from radioactive waste. **We saw meaningful action from President Biden, who just came out in support of compensating communities across the country -- like St. Louis -- which are still endangered by the dumping of radioactive waste from the Manhattan Project.** Health care coverage and compensation may be expanded to more states, including Missouri. **This is an important victory, but the fight is not over to clean up dangerous contaminated sites, such as Coldwater Creek in Cori’s district.** [**Please donate today to support Cori Bush’s urgent work to clean up radioactive waste sites and secure environmental justice.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yKvU4sOg08JeqC1C9rvkVu4RPWTd2-Gmd2WUUz10pgD_HidVX8DQAWhnonNWS5ftNqqf199J6iGAFU8RK0O6I6qg6OfVMWDUghtUSOXnGxxvMjOGqei4GhG-2HFdlNJNHON14Dx0QxdxyEknh13Iw7PTBu0JRbiol8hBtMy54Z5_RR0HXZMSU00XLDSvQi46fDcfGJ_KvLXcddy_LDvba9m5XqUNsdAFUmyPnF6URpJ167bUJa1k_RzYDa1hvQGlIgON8yyn0lNM5IW2BGUyeZcC8NSoyJ7dpzVuSUIOa4YoTzA01kuADiV22byzKGK_cz7IZOc_idL20W6T12eRT_/3ys/qu7yPzTnSraHiBwAf-vjZw/h0/1bRmU-hg_EfWx_LAnJLIZKiEKznekYmdRXYZdacQFpE) ** In St. Louis County, Coldwater Creek was a dumping ground for radioactive waste, increasing the risk of cancer for generations of people playing in the Creek. **When Cori used to live near the Creek, her basement would regularly flood with potentially radioactive water.** That toxic waste still endangers the community: A recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school that sits on the Creek. Cori’s advocacy has secured a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek, which is especially urgent now that communities living near the Creek experience more frequent flooding due to climate change. **Cori is a leader on this important issue in Congress, and she’s an environmental justice champion.** Her bill to invest in marginalized frontline communities (the _Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act_) has been signed into law, and she’s continuing to lead transformative policies like the _Green New Deal for Cities_. She’s secured hundreds of millions of dollars for public transit infrastructure across the country, along with funding for federal climate action. **FIRST** , Adam launched his campaign for U.S. Senate just as Kevin McCarthy removed him as the top Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee.
**THEN** , Republicans escalated their attacks — from Trump, McCarthy, and an outrageous MAGA-led effort to censure Adam in the U.S. House of Representatives for standing up to Trump and holding him accountable.
**NOW** , Republicans are planning their next line of attack — with Trump due to travel to California next month to speak at the state GOP convention. And the attacks on Adam are sure to follow.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Policy for the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Without the IRA, and bold progressive voices who aren’t afraid to stand up to the status quo, our country would be far worse off.
#
Peter,
One year ago today, President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act — **the single LARGEST investment in climate action EVER.** Since then, investment in clean energy has soared and green jobs are being created in communities all across the country.
Not only that, the Inflation Reduction Act achieved many of the goals progressive organizers like you and me have been fighting for decades to achieve. For the first time,**Big Pharma lost and the people won.** Medicare was finally able to negotiate the cost of some prescription drugs. And we’re doing it all by taxing the wealthiest corporations to actually begin to pay their fair share.
And we’re just getting started.
**[Peter, can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give today to help boost our momentum and continue fighting for bold policies that protect the people, our planet, and our future?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44429?refcode=em20230816-2820&t=1&akid=2820%2E420207%2EGkJNui)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44429?refcode=em20230816-2820&t=20&akid=2820%2E420207%2EGkJNui)**
The IRA is our movement’s boldest shot at creating a new industrial policy that focuses on the people, our climate, and our workforce first — not big corporate profits.
The Congressional Progressive Caucus spearheaded the efforts to keep hope alive and pass the IRA. You can see just how big that victory is by looking at what the IRA does:
* **Take on climate change in an urgent way,** including investing $369 billion in clean energy and climate action, and cutting carbon emissions by 40% by 2030.
* **Empower Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices,** which will immediately lower prescription costs.
* **Tax the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations** with a minimum corporate tax rate and investing in the IRS to ensure the wealthy pay their fair share.
* **Lower Affordable Care Act premiums for millions** by increasing subsidies to Americans most in need, building on what we did in the American Rescue Plan.

While the GOP and right-wing establishment actors have done more than their fair share to strip the IRA of critical pieces, and even claim the success as their own — we know the truth: **Without the IRA, and bold progressive voices who aren’t afraid to stand up to the status quo, our country would be far worse off.**
These wins are huge, but we must stay vigilant and ready to protect our hard fought progress. **[Chip in today in support of the IRA as well as Pramila and President Biden’s collective work to show up and show out for the people.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44429?refcode=em20230816-2820&t=21&akid=2820%2E420207%2EGkJNui)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230816-2820-footer&t=22&refcode2=2820_420207_GkJNui&akid=2820%2E420207%2EGkJNui)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Without the IRA, and bold progressive voices who aren’t afraid to stand up to the status quo, our country would be far worse off. Peter, One year ago today, President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act — the single LARGEST investment in climate action EVER. Since then, investment in clean energy has soared and green jobs are being created in communities all across the country. Not only that, the Inflation Reduction Act achieved many of the goals progressive organizers like you and me have been fighting for decades to achieve. For the first time,Big Pharma lost and the people won. Medicare was finally able to negotiate the cost of some prescription drugs. And we’re doing it all by taxing the wealthiest corporations to actually begin to pay their fair share. And we’re just getting started. The IRA is our movement’s boldest shot at creating a new industrial policy that focuses on the people, our climate, and our workforce first — not big corporate profits. The Congressional Progressive Caucus spearheaded the efforts to keep hope alive and pass the IRA. You can see just how big that victory is by looking at what the IRA does: Take on climate change in an urgent way, including investing $369 billion in clean energy and climate action, and cutting carbon emissions by 40% by 2030. Empower Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices, which will immediately lower prescription costs. Tax the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations with a minimum corporate tax rate and investing in the IRS to ensure the wealthy pay their fair share. Lower Affordable Care Act premiums for millions by increasing subsidies to Americans most in need, building on what we did in the American Rescue Plan. While the GOP and right-wing establishment actors have done more than their fair share to strip the IRA of critical pieces, and even claim the success as their own — we know the truth: Without the IRA, and bold progressive voices who aren’t afraid to stand up to the status quo, our country would be far worse off. These wins are huge, but we must stay vigilant and ready to protect our hard fought progress. Together, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: Kari and I took a minute out of our schedule to record a special message for you together. | | I need you to see this, fellow conservative. I was recently joined on the campaign trail in Ohio by a fierce fighter for conservative principles and the America First agenda: Kari Lake. Kari and I took a minute out of our schedule to record a special message for you together. You have to see this. Thanks, Bernie Moreno Republican for U.S. Senate Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

| **_USA Today:_
How Republicans flipped America’s state supreme courts

_“State supreme courts were once dominated by Democrats. A concerted effort by right-wing groups has changed that — with massive implications for abortion, LGBTQ+ rights, and elections.”_**
---
[**_Help fight for fairness: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68205596/422277939/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230816_FR_8D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkZGU0YmJhLThhM2MtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BCNpNh-YHG2p0vFi_BK6KBVG89C_2H3RZwLlgAQiGxU=)
We have good news and bad news, team.

**The bad news** is that thanks to years of coordinated efforts and millions in spending from far-right donors, Republican politicians have succeeded in stacking state supreme courts across the country with their preferred judges.

**But the good news** is that ahead of 2024, **_more than 30 states_** across the country will hold races for their highest courts. **This means we have a critical opportunity to work to elect fair-minded judges – but there’s no time to waste.**

Earlier this year, despite GOP megadonors spending millions in an effort to elect their preferred justice, Wisconsin voters made their voices heard by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it **“a critical victory for our democracy.”**
[**_Together, we can repeat this success across the country. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Greg Casar
subject: A bipartisan push for water breaks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68205710/422278287/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTk5MjVhMy04YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMZFn1LdMvxubGLQkFGsBNBx6VmeQ4-lOTBdnbrmC1U=&emci=ea9925a3-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ee9925a3-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter, our nation’s postal workers have a difficult job.

We count on them to deliver our mail six days a week, rain or shine. But recently, the U.S. Postal Service stopped providing water bottles to letter carriers in San Antonio, even amid a record heat wave in Texas.

**That’s why I recently led a bipartisan letter to the Postmaster General asking them to create a plan to protect San Antonio’s postal workers from deadly heat and guarantee their access to cold water on the job.**

[**Can you help us make this push with a $10 donation today? Team Casar is working every day to protect workers in Texas and across the nation—your support makes a HUGE difference in that fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68205711/422278288/-972800284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTk5MjVhMy04YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMZFn1LdMvxubGLQkFGsBNBx6VmeQ4-lOTBdnbrmC1U=)

Peter, Texas and the entire nation is in the middle of a historic heatwave and our workers are on the front lines. That’s why I recently held a thirst strike on the steps of the U.S. Capital to demand federal protections for workers in deadly heat, to guarantee basic things like water breaks.

**There’s no excuse for workers to be denied access to water while working in 100+ degree heat—especially our federal postal workers who we count on for our mail service.

[Help us push to guarantee their access to cold water and breaks in the heat. Chip in $10, or whatever you can, to support Team Casar’s fight for workers in Texas and nationwide.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68205716/422278293/-972800284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTk5MjVhMy04YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMZFn1LdMvxubGLQkFGsBNBx6VmeQ4-lOTBdnbrmC1U=)**

Thank you,

-Greg

Greg Casar

name: Kerry McQuisten
subject: Constitutional Carry hits 10K signatures, more...
body:
| | | | |
---
**Constitutional Carry hits 10,000 signatures!**

---
| | Constitutional Carry for Oregon (CCFO) has hit our first signature-gathering benchmark for IP-21: 10,000 signatures!

We have until July 5, 2024, to submit 160,551 signatures for IP-21 to appear on the November 2024 general election ballot.

During the first month of signature collecting, we finished developing our county-by-county network across the state and held our first major fundraiser with keynote speaker Kari Lake in Salem.

We’re absolutely off to a strong start, but we can’t let up! Here's how you can help:

* If you can't get to a signing location or event, just download the single-signer sheet at [**www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com**](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/W4L9EEVlcLnVBZvfsP7HOw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmv9-VP0UgMzdmOWEwNzMwY2I4ZmFhN2JmMjRhYjAwYTcxNjdiMjFEK2h0dHA6Ly93d3cuQ29uc3RpdHV0aW9uYWxDYXJyeWZvck9yZWdvbi5jb21XBXNwY2V1Qgpk3JVa3WTghqCQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~), print, sign, and mail it in!

* Donate!

* We need a county lead in Benton County. If interested, please reach out.

---
|
---
**On the road...**
---
---
| Oregon's Nat'l Committeeman to the RNC Solomon Yue with Rep. Lily Morgan and me with the Josephine County Republican Women in Grants Pass.

---
---
Vivien and I (behind the camera) hanging out with PCP Ken at the Malheur County Republicans booth at the fair in Ontario.

---
Solomon and I were asked to speak to the Josephine County Republican Women in Grants Pass this week. We spent a couple days in town visiting with the ladies, associate members and some PCPs. It was 111 degrees outside during this toasty, but very informative visit! I gave a brief update on Constitutional Carry. Solomon talked about the 2024 presidential election cycle and gave a behind-the-scenes look at the RNC's latest - such as the Bank the Vote project. _A HUGE thanks to Linda Smith for inviting us!_

Back on the 4th, Vivien and I headed over to Ontario where people are very enthusiastic about Constitutional Carry! As the event was so close to the state line, about 2/3 of the crowd that day was from Idaho. They already have what we're trying to get on the ballot! If you want to sign, go to our website for contact info and permanent signing locations. The Malheur County Republicans also have sheets. _Thank you, John Gaskill and Christine Hood for the invitation!_
---
| [Visit KerryMcQuisten.com](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/pB3rcXsF7KDLjc-T6BR4dQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmv9-VP0UgMmY1ZDI1MGJkODE1NjZjYTMxYjk2ZDg1N2Q3ODZjMWFEH2h0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmtlcnJ5bWNxdWlzdGVuLmNvbS9XBXNwY2V1Qgpk3JVa3WTghqCQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~ "Visit KerryMcQuisten.com")
---
| | You received this email because you subscribed to our list. If a friend or family member subscribed for you and you don't wish to receive these newsletters, you can:
[Unsubscribe from this list](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/3xHCHqzbg_B88MK0GBmTbg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmv9-~~) at any time.

Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary is a private newsletter blog not associated with any PAC.
PO Box 567, Baker City, Oregon, 97814, United States of America
---

Solomon and I were asked to speak to the Josephine County Republican Women in Grants Pass this week. We spent a couple days in town visiting with the ladies, associate members and some PCPs. It was 111 degrees outside during this toasty, but very informative visit! I gave a brief update on Constitutional Carry. Solomon talked about the 2024 presidential election cycle and gave a behind-the-scenes look at the RNC's latest - such as the Bank the Vote project. A HUGE thanks to Linda Smith for inviting us! Back on the 4th, Vivien and I headed over to Ontario where people are very enthusiastic about Constitutional Carry! As the event was so close to the state line, about 2/3 of the crowd that day was from Idaho. They already have what we're trying to get on the ballot! If you want to sign, go to our website for contact info and permanent signing locations. The Malheur County Republicans also have sheets. Thank you, John Gaskill and Christine Hood for the invitation! | ~~ "Visit KerryMcQuisten.com" | | You received this email because you subscribed to our list. If a friend or family member subscribed for you and you don't wish to receive these newsletters, you can: ~~ at any time. Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary is a private newsletter blog not associated with any PAC. PO Box 567, Baker City, Oregon, 97814, United States of America

name: Katie Porter
subject: One year anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate to be a fierce advocate for working people so we can continue building on legislation like this.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)
Today marks one year since President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law. That’s the landmark piece of legislation Democrats passed to reduce inflation and invest in families, **which included two of my proposals to take on Big Oil and Big Pharma.**
While some of this bill's provisions have already taken effect, others are still to come. Here are a few highlights:
* **Medicare will be legally allowed to negotiate drug prices,** lowering the cost of some of the most commonly used prescriptions.
* This bill will lower healthcare costs for millions of Americans by capping Medicare prescription costs and bolstering Affordable Care Act premiums.
* Historic new investments in clean energy are allowing us to **lower emissions by 40% by the year 2030.**
* Corporations making $1 billion or more a year will be subject to a 15% minimum tax, which will bring in an estimated $300 billion in new revenue.
* The IRS has been better funded to **hold ultra-wealthy tax-cheats accountable.**

This bill was an exciting and important step forward for our country. But there’s still so much more to do to lower costs for families and build a strong, stable, globally competitive economy. **[I’m running for the U.S. Senate to be a fierce advocate for working people so we can continue building on legislation like this.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230816-2?refcode=EMAK16_2_IRA_20230816_V1_F&refcode2=28310_3422442_PGDDgN&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230816-2?refcode=EMAK16_2_IRA_20230816_V1_F&refcode2=28310_3422442_PGDDgN&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)
Thanks for following along,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK16_2_IRA_20230816_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28310_3422442_PGDDgN&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28310%2E3422442%2EPGDDgN)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

Peter,

\- NY Post__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68206080/422279382/1307438508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRhMmNiYS04ZjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lozUyYff0KeHdxLtqqXFFY06dpbl4EMJeMEfYgpDzM=&emci=344a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=354a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68206081/422279383/1307438508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRhMmNiYS04ZjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lozUyYff0KeHdxLtqqXFFY06dpbl4EMJeMEfYgpDzM=&emci=344a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=354a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)
---
Congress has a stock trading problem, and the reality is that it’s an issue for both parties. A 2022 _New York Times_ report revealed that **over half** of U.S. House members owned stock, and upwards of 97 reported trades that could have overlapped with their legislative committee work.
The rest of us would be sent to jail for something as corrupt as insider trading. Not only are some politicians getting rich off inside knowledge, as it stands, the practice is perfectly legal.**That has to change. **
**If elected, I’ll vote to ban members of Congress from trading stocks.** Not only would this go a long way in restoring the public trust, it would ensure that politicians aren’t putting their own personal portfolios ahead of the people they’re elected to serve.
**[If you’re with me, sign your name in support of banning members of Congress from trading stocks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68206082/422279384/1307438508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTRhMmNiYS04ZjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lozUyYff0KeHdxLtqqXFFY06dpbl4EMJeMEfYgpDzM=&emci=344a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=354a2cba-8f3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)**

Will

clean_body: | = Peter, Members of Congress should not be allowed to trade stocks while holding office. This shouldn't be controversial, and yet every week it seems another story breaks about members engaging in questionable practices related to stock trading. ⬇️ | [“[Marjorie Taylor] Greene made defense stock purchases days before Russia invaded Ukraine” - The Atlanta Journal-Constitution]() Congress has a stock trading problem, and the reality is that it’s an issue for both parties. A 2022 New York Times report revealed that over half of U.S. House members owned stock, and upwards of 97 reported trades that could have overlapped with their legislative committee work. The rest of us would be sent to jail for something as corrupt as insider trading. Not only are some politicians getting rich off inside knowledge, as it stands, the practice is perfectly legal.That has to change. If elected, I’ll vote to ban members of Congress from trading stocks. Not only would this go a long way in restoring the public trust, it would ensure that politicians aren’t putting their own personal portfolios ahead of the people they’re elected to serve. Thanks for signing, Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District.
